name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I don’t take this lightly, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Your trust in me means the world.
#
Peter — I know that millions of people who are absolutely disgusted with Donald Trump’s presidency are looking to next month’s election to provide some hope.
I know that whether we win or lose — and believe me, it’s looking close — will set the tone for what comes next in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
I know that if we lose, Trump will just be emboldened to attack our institutions and our communities even more aggressively.
But I also know that if we win, we can start to turn the tide in a better direction. And that we will send a powerful message — to Donald Trump and to the entire country — that the American people do not accept the past nine months of cruelty and authoritarianism as our new normal.
**Peter, my first and last thought every single day is how much is riding on our success in this election. But together, I know we can get this done. We can show the country who we are and what we stand for — and rally the American people behind a future that is not dictated by Donald Trump and his right-wing allies.**
**[If we’re going to get there, I need your help — because this is a neck-and-neck race, and every single vote will make a difference. Will you split $15 between my team and State Democrats Committee today to help our campaign win this election and show the country Donald Trump’s dark path doesn’t need to be our future?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96924?refcode=em20251025-9626&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9626%2E614464%2EHjILUR)**

clean_body: Your trust in me means the world. Peter — I know that millions of people who are absolutely disgusted with Donald Trump’s presidency are looking to next month’s election to provide some hope. I know that whether we win or lose — and believe me, it’s looking close — will set the tone for what comes next in 2026, 2028, and beyond. I know that if we lose, Trump will just be emboldened to attack our institutions and our communities even more aggressively. But I also know that if we win, we can start to turn the tide in a better direction. And that we will send a powerful message — to Donald Trump and to the entire country — that the American people do not accept the past nine months of cruelty and authoritarianism as our new normal. Peter, my first and last thought every single day is how much is riding on our success in this election. But together, I know we can get this done. We can show the country who we are and what we stand for — and rally the American people behind a future that is not dictated by Donald Trump and his right-wing allies. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Add your name to defend the Voting Rights Act before it’s too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
The cornerstone of our democracy is under attack
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118002385/578366600/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2Y4YmJhMS0wOWIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IR80HsOkpuTdw7Km5mXBBu3EPq-HkUlHALNcNCYaNoA=)
Hi, it's Robert Garcia — the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
**I won’t sugarcoat it:_Right now, the Voting Rights Act — the cornerstone of American democracy — is under attack._**
Section 2 of the VRA outlaws racial discrimination in voting. It’s what ensures every voter — no matter their race, zip code, or background — has a fair shot at electing leaders who truly represent their communities.
But extremist politicians are trying to gut it, paving the way for more gerrymandering, more voter suppression, and less representation for communities of color.
**The Supreme Court must protect the Voting Rights Act.** We cannot go back to an era where politicians pick their voters instead of voters picking their representatives. We cannot allow decades of civil rights progress to be erased in a single court decision.
**[That’s why I’m calling on you to join me in demanding that SCOTUS uphold Section 2 and preserve the VRA — because free and fair elections are not negotiable. Add your name to our petition right now to stand up for the Voting Rights Act and defend every American’s right to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118002386/578366601/1472272769?refcode=251025_RG_VRA-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2Y4YmJhMS0wOWIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IR80HsOkpuTdw7Km5mXBBu3EPq-HkUlHALNcNCYaNoA=&emci=2042ae35-01b2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=43f8bba1-09b2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118002387/578366602/1472272769?refcode=251025_RG_VRA-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2Y4YmJhMS0wOWIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IR80HsOkpuTdw7Km5mXBBu3EPq-HkUlHALNcNCYaNoA=&emci=2042ae35-01b2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=43f8bba1-09b2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
We’ve come too far to go backward. Let’s make sure the Court — and the country — hears us loud and clear.
Thank you
Robert Garcia

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118002388/578366603/-309737922?refcode=251025_RG_VRA-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2Y4YmJhMS0wOWIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IR80HsOkpuTdw7Km5mXBBu3EPq-HkUlHALNcNCYaNoA=)

**Paging Alaskans Across This Wonderful State, I need volunteers to work on Eaglexit, we are doing door knocking this winter / spring and plan to start collecting signatures next year. You do not have to be an Eagle River / Chugiak Resident to collect signatures. I am looking at recruiting people in Mat-Su and Anchorage / Fairbanks and Kenai to come help. I can help cover gas etc. If you are interested in working directly with me on a new project, come one, come all, let’s help Eagle River / Chugiak become their own borough.**

#### **Eaglexit is hosting businesses owners in Eagle River and Chugiak to discuss the future. Please reply to this email or sign up on their website.**

|

## **Frozen Odds Movie Update:**
**I am so thankful to all the people who bought tickets to “Frozen Odds” I was able to put together an amazing setup for equipment and little did I know that AFPI, America First Policy Institute would be so interested in working directly with me to help make content, do presentations, and show my movie all over the country. I have been working with them for a couple months now planning our strategy in Michigan, which is facing a ballot measure to get RCV in Michigan in 2026. The movie will be 45 minutes, the first trailer will come out in October and the movie release will be December or January for Alaska.****I am working directly with AFPI executive team and we plan to bring big name people to various events to get large crowds, their goal is 400-500+ per event and plan to do events across Michigan, having my movie as the main showcase with a panel doing Q &A at the end.****I am not charging AFPI for the movie, videos, or content I have created for them. I believe they will pay for the events, marketing, and flying me to Michigan for the various events. I had no idea that my work would make such a difference and I am very proud and thankful to all the people that have supported all of my efforts.****Seeing Charlie Kirk die reminds me that the work doesn’t stop, it never will and we have to carry on doing what he started.****Our work doesn’t stop in Michigan, I am also working with AFPI in Georgia and Minnesota next.**
---
|
---
---
|
---
**Based on my research. A newborn Alaskan child could potentially have a significant amount of money diverted from their PFD.****So far if a baby was born in 2016, they have had $16,376 diverted from each Alaskan Baby. That is a tax. An income tax on babies?****Projected diversions put Alaska on track to have $45,000 diverted from each Alaska child from birth to 18.****What could your kid do with $45,000, better question is what are the teachers unions and NGOs going to do with your kids $45,000?****It gets better, because they are taxing you too, and most are too checked out to even realize it.****The average effective tax rate on ALL ALASKAN CHILDREN IS 54.86% if they all only receive the PFD as income from 2016-2025.** 2016 Income: $2,052 2016 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,030 - tax rate 50.19%2017 Income: $2,300 2017 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,200 - tax rate 52.17%2018 Income: $2,900 2018 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,300 - tax rate 44.83%2019 Income: $3,004 2019 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,398 - tax rate 46.54%2020: Income: $3,106 2020 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,114 - tax rate 68.06%2021 Income: $4,198 2021 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $3,084 - tax rate 73.46%2022 Income: $4,200 2022 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $914- tax rate 21.77%2023 Income: $3,641 2023 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,329 - tax rate 63.96%2024 Income: $3,644 2024 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,942 - tax rate 53.30%2025 Income: $3,892 2025 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,892 - tax rate 74.30%In 2022, there was a one time energy relief payment that created an outlier in the data set.

|

#### **Education Is Key, Learn Why Jungle Primary And Ranked Choice Voting Are Bad For Alaska And America.**
[https://tropictundra.com/governor](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68fd78dd552b6215b826661e&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FBJRA6sBsbW&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68fd789a552b6215b8265610&l=en-US&s=AnhnqQogoRI3KGWpQDv5qv_fAjU%3D)

I built RCV Election Simulators, they’ve been picked up [@Stop_RCV](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68fd78dd552b6215b826661e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FStop_RCV&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68fd789a552b6215b8265610&l=en-US&s=HXWgnZL3TifEGbU2hk57KHzF8sc%3D) StopRCV, as well as [@A1Policy](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68fd78dd552b6215b826661e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FA1Policy&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68fd789a552b6215b8265610&l=en-US&s=N95Iv9KN2WqBq-9ZK9fx3YAF9Xo%3D) America First Policy Institute to educate people about RCV. Right here in Alaska, one man is trying to make a difference for the country, national groups are using my designs, ideas, videos, and content. Very humbled.StopRCV just made my election simulators live on their website. I built these custom for them.
---
#### **Check Out The Custom Simulators on StopRCV.com**
#### [**https://stoprcv.com/rcv-in-action**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68fd78dd552b6215b826661e&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FFs48fz7UWJ&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68fd789a552b6215b8265610&l=en-US&s=13C86NjYedGjOr-MN1bQ0mIcvDU%3D)
---
|
---
Our partners at Michigan Fair Elections Institute (MFEI) have released a of comprehensive fact based assessment on RCV: _[Ranked Choice Voting: A Threat to Our Electoral Process](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68fd78dd552b6215b826661e&u=https%3A%2F%2Faa3979fb-9421-4dd8-ba7d-8ead2d346103.usrfiles.com%2Fugd%2Faa3979_1c9e4b6a7e6247988eb011ff3524a789.pdf&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68fd789a552b6215b8265610&l=en-US&s=wqw8aH0QmyzwroHRAtkV4P6ob2Y%3D)_ It is peer-reviewed and based on data from major US universities and the London School of Economics. Unlike the left and a handful of well-paid "Republican" RCV supporters, it has actual, you know, data and history that proves the absolute folly of RCV. It is critical that Michigan voters understand that RCV acts against them. If you don't want your ballot sent to the trash can (ie, eliminated through RCV recounting) then please make sure you oppose the pro-RCV Constitutional Amendment coming to MI in 2026. Oh. And its not just Michigan. Sixteen states (WV, WY, TN, FL, ID, SD, MT, KY, AL, MS, LA, OK, MO, AR, KS, ND) have banned RCV. If you're not in one of those - look out - oppose RCV now before it's too late.
---
#### **I was asked to write a testimonial**

|
---

An income tax on babies?Projected diversions put Alaska on track to have $45,000 diverted from each Alaska child from birth to 18.What could your kid do with $45,000, better question is what are the teachers unions and NGOs going to do with your kids $45,000?It gets better, because they are taxing you too, and most are too checked out to even realize it.The average effective tax rate on ALL ALASKAN CHILDREN IS 54.86% if they all only receive the PFD as income from 2016-2025. 2016 Income: $2,052 2016 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,030 - tax rate 50.19%2017 Income: $2,300 2017 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,200 - tax rate 52.17%2018 Income: $2,900 2018 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,300 - tax rate 44.83%2019 Income: $3,004 2019 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,398 - tax rate 46.54%2020: Income: $3,106 2020 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,114 - tax rate 68.06%2021 Income: $4,198 2021 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $3,084 - tax rate 73.46%2022 Income: $4,200 2022 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $914- tax rate 21.77%2023 Income: $3,641 2023 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,329 - tax rate 63.96%2024 Income: $3,644 2024 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,942 - tax rate 53.30%2025 Income: $3,892 2025 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,892 - tax rate 74.30%In 2022, there was a one time energy relief payment that created an outlier in the data set. | | Education Is Key, Learn Why Jungle Primary And Ranked Choice Voting Are Bad For Alaska And America. | I built RCV Election Simulators, they’ve been picked up StopRCV, as well as America First Policy Institute to educate people about RCV. Right here in Alaska, one man is trying to make a difference for the country, national groups are using my designs, ideas, videos, and content. Very humbled.StopRCV just made my election simulators live on their website. I built these custom for them. Check Out The Custom Simulators on StopRCV.com | Our partners at Michigan Fair Elections Institute (MFEI) have released a of comprehensive fact based assessment on RCV: It is peer-reviewed and based on data from major US universities and the London School of Economics. Unlike the left and a handful of well-paid "Republican" RCV supporters, it has actual, you know, data and history that proves the absolute folly of RCV. It is critical that Michigan voters understand that RCV acts against them. If you don't want your ballot sent to the trash can (ie, eliminated through RCV recounting) then please make sure you oppose the pro-RCV Constitutional Amendment coming to MI in 2026. Oh. And its not just Michigan. Sixteen states (WV, WY, TN, FL, ID, SD, MT, KY, AL, MS, LA, OK, MO, AR, KS, ND) have banned RCV. If you're not in one of those - look out - oppose RCV now before it's too late. body:

* The lies that her momentum is dead on arrival

* Winsome wants to spread her positive story of the American Dream
* Supporters across Virginia are excited to elect Winsome!

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsvlddhh7ihorp0rg264m9m4b60ecsvk3bm3rb8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs5nahpr31mochpgh0l8dpbuf3nmnp4o71d3pnug_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt7loccmh3j0s4p6g2k0h56dntefiqmce3espg8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo0t63o2dicp7si7h3j33b25j1uudfhr8c6kjc18_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbn8ietajuua147undun6rqplprc1p1qknej1k98_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqqrpfc7jhklkg6ch1uthmp0lct3138toa8g1fk8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4ub03vg2m2u2jqfhfbmn5ubhf1ier4s94mal19o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ovjch1nvhnf29fogv12n8ahashsonjej0h9i20_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0af8pekjgd95ll78h69oldpuhpbsbtc972ctrbo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jm4o72cth2bs)
---

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: We are Charlie Kirk
body:
Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom.

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zibbq7gbbgcndqdmb101ujikmm033t61b65o2k9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp8077n1advmqj69lsce8vhav284doothn16bjso_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8887tfbne223jvqmdl4i5keog2ud1082o03tpb0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8fn58eqcbe5jlbmv24procoauaarn0q5ljnhob8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo8kf47prgq85ieqvt09c35uebuejn7u50lmg6oo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zps4i5ab75jf2hdsobcdo0268psb4nh6p5so5pto_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt98pfet1fb4vaav1r1ncnm5elc3e6h9mbgasumg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp7id72ths460panmttgtkb7lja56r4jri5lbgq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3o6huqlpqlm8gjstvlal5q4qh31d3e21rcbnodg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)
---
| | |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9nnjfv8gq9bqm59u5nk9e17svega5l6brd83d18_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)

name: Vivek for Ohio
subject: The teacher who never stopped rooting for Vivek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Once upon a time, in a small classroom at Evendale Elementary in Ohio, there was a little boy named Vivek.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ef37n21hbm6feu9719grsrpf4qt2cfhrqp42ao_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)Once upon a time, in a small classroom at Evendale Elementary in Ohio, there was a little boy named Vivek.
He loved to learn. He loved to dream big.
And his teacher, Mrs. Hendel, always believed in him.
Years passed, the boy grew up, and life took him many places.
Then, on his 40th birthday and in the middle of a heated campaign, Mrs. Hendel showed up with a very special gift:[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7q7i64ckm0909c8tdg1istglc0a1mtjou1pmpc0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)It wasn't just paper. It was a reminder that great teachers see the best in their students - sometimes long before the world does.**
**And it was a sign that the American Dream still matters.
And that hard work, grit, and faith can take you anywhere.**
**Some gifts are priceless. This campaign is one of them.
[Let's make Mrs. Hendel's certificate come true:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb7s8jrfo149v8c5efgaaa36h0u79mg8s0uaofo8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)[HELP VIVEK WIN
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3u4ch2sf3aof1p84a3c30jg8k9o8pkkhs2lqs6o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)\- Team Vivek
* * *
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zemc57743uhkpqt5si9l55v6bcgrfu9saisscoi8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs) **The race for Governor of Ohio is a****COIN FLIP! **
The Democrat Machine has already thrown its weight behind Amy Acton - they'll spend whatever it takes to flip Ohio. If we're going to hold this lead, we urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now:
****[The ONLY thing we ask is for every America First patriot to chip in SOMETHING - whether you live in Ohio or not.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ar2jpok5j02460ipklvf9unsms2hhbfbhqs0t8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmcpr4clh2bs)
The fight for Ohio is the fight for America - and in a race this close, your support could be the difference between victory and disaster.[CHIP IN A FEW BUCKS

We have been losing hundreds of billions and even trillions of dollars to China over a period of many years. A steady stream of $500 billion a year and more in the trade deficit alone. Our wealth has been shattered.

subject: Jaw Dropping Taxpayer Scam Exposed
body:
Our explosive new investigation rips the lid off a $100 billion federal contracting fraud that's bleeding American taxpayers dry.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z22m7npgf03tune7skapl474uq4srmhugdtlolm0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmepj4c3h2bs)
Dear Patriot,

[**Our explosive new investigation rips the lid off a**$100 billion federal contracting fraud** that's bleeding American taxpayers dry.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0e0thpabkn1i125q0fqsfh12hao8gmkn3i65v0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmepj4c3h2bs)

[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkg21l2616167rn0tqg6pan05jndmc5062k0upn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmepj4c3h2bs)
Non-Native executives at ATI Government Solutions are gaming the system with fake "pass-through" schemes and shell companies, exploiting Native American set-aside programs to snag no-bid contracts--then subcontracting **80% of the work** while pocketing millions. They do **20% of the job** but keep **65% of the cash**. This isn't business; it's **theft on a massive scale**.

We went undercover, posing as potential partners, and caught ATI's Director of Contracts, **Meline Cromwell** , on tape admitting it all: "**51% on paper? Correct ... As long as it's on paper.**" And "**I sit back, collect my percentage, and they do the work.** "

**[**WATCH AND DONATE TODAY!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6jasmka18jd11gm9bvctk8k1hgnmp6vqatvu5n8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmepj4c3h2bs)**

CEO Fermage Crutchfield and his team have ballooned profits from $2 million to $100 million in five years by starting fresh companies whenever they hit SBA limits--resetting the scam clock. The Susanville Indian Rancheria holds nominal ownership, but they're sidelined while Washington insiders feast. This microcosm of corruption could be costing **you** up to $100 billion yearly--more than most scandals combined.

**Enough is enough.**

The Department of Justice must act, but they won't unless **we** force their hand.

**That 's where you come in**.

Our deep-dive investigations--like this one--demand bold resources: hidden cameras, travel across the country, legal armor against smears, and a team of fearless journalists willing to risk it all. [**Without**your donations** , these truths stay hidden, and the crooks keep winning
**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55945lma4g44k7c9mteics2t9cumoh9s9l3v9vg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmepj4c3h2bs)**[

[**Just**$25** helps equip our next sting. **$50** helps cover travel to chase leads. **$100** or more? That powers a full expose that shakes the system.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvm1v7g2vrmoh571vk1ngime1ne4blvtj6830os8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5jmepj4c3h2bs)

clean_body: Our explosive new investigation rips the lid off a $100 billion federal contracting fraud that's bleeding American taxpayers dry. | Dear Patriot, Non-Native executives at ATI Government Solutions are gaming the system with fake "pass-through" schemes and shell companies, exploiting Native American set-aside programs to snag no-bid contracts--then subcontracting 80% of the work while pocketing millions. They do 20% of the job but keep 65% of the cash. This isn't business; it's theft on a massive scale. We went undercover, posing as potential partners, and caught ATI's Director of Contracts, Meline Cromwell , on tape admitting it all: "51% on paper? Correct ... As long as it's on paper." And "I sit back, collect my percentage, and they do the work. " CEO Fermage Crutchfield and his team have ballooned profits from $2 million to $100 million in five years by starting fresh companies whenever they hit SBA limits--resetting the scam clock. The Susanville Indian Rancheria holds nominal ownership, but they're sidelined while Washington insiders feast. This microcosm of corruption could be costing you up to $100 billion yearly--more than most scandals combined. Enough is enough. The Department of Justice must act, but they won't unless we force their hand. That 's where you come in. Our deep-dive investigations--like this one--demand bold resources: hidden cameras, travel across the country, legal armor against smears, and a team of fearless journalists willing to risk it all. ** Together, we're unstoppable. .** In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1l2jv0h33vt6tna19e31jk4ilntuf538hnpp83g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8p5do4rmco3per6sv2naupp841qbmftvem48ado_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0bp82rn1bm60eif6eem7qtma2oq238asohkt7qo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z72672572vmdq6ham664srivbr9dauhebpd6cj00_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1pm0ua6dmkocr37l6f95sthmtqg7d55nicas6rg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpk97cm1it8diqt7aj89rsca8rtiifg0q4u1jj60_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbllum862jp9b0jff10u5ktnp7hvom24snn30uho_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztdlnpm8kvlh6lkvo72a5hlsjvv36qjusihqe7s8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmmcvv7gpbva8op8kclaflt0vrgbamuq3doab4n0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4c5ge0o32clh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---

The Contrast Couldn't be Clearer

Dear Hoosier Republicans,

Last week, Governor Mike Braun stood alongside Border Czar Tom Homan and Attorney General Todd Rokita at the Indiana Statehouse to call on lawmakers to pass the Fairness Act—legislation that would penalize employers who knowingly hire illegal immigrants.

While Democrats in Washington continue to keep the government closed in a bid to demand healthcare benefits for illegal immigrants, Indiana is proving that conservative, pro-growth policies work.

Governor Braun promised to streamline government and cut costs, now Hoosiers are seeing the results. In September alone, the state brought in $2.3 billion in revenue ($107 million above projections), marking five straight months of better-than-predicted results. Moody’s Analytics reports that while 22 states are experiencing recessions, Indiana's economy continues to experience incredible growth.

The contrast couldn't be clearer, while Democrats in Washington hold veterans, law enforcement, and taxpayers hostage to score political points, Governor Braun and President Trump are delivering results—securing the border, protecting jobs, and driving economic growth.

As always, thank you for being a part of our team, and please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.

Yours in service,

Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman

Governor Braun Urges Lawmakers to Pass Fairness Act

Last week, Governor Mike Braun joined Border Czar Tom Homan and Attorney General Todd Rokita at the Indiana Statehouse to urge lawmakers to pass the “Fairness Act,” a proposal that would penalize employers who knowingly hire undocumented immigrants. Braun emphasized that the legislation is necessary to strengthen state enforcement after a similar bill failed in the Senate last session.

“Let’s get it over the finish line this time,” Governor Braun said. “Hoosiers deserve it.”

Governor Braun told Fox 59, CBS 4 [https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/border-czar-tom-homan-tells-indiana-lawmakers-to-help-president-trump-by-passing-the-fairness-act/]

Indiana Revenues Surpass Expectations for Fifth Straight Month

Indiana’s September revenues reached $2.3 billion, exceeding projections by $107 million, or 4.9%, and marking the fifth consecutive month of stronger-than-expected collections. Year-to-date, the state has collected nearly $5.5 billion—$185 million above forecast.

“Our state’s monthly revenue report once again exceeds expectations—proof that the strong, pro-growth foundation built under President Trump continues to fuel our economy,” said Governor Braun. “We’ll keep building on that momentum to deliver results for Hoosiers through fiscal responsibility and conservative leadership."

Governor Braun told Inside Indiana Business [https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/articles/state-revenues-again-outpace-projections-in-september]

Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester

📱 News You Can Use

Governor Mike Braun spoke [https://x.com/GovBraun/status/1981343318136046004] at the Indiana Mental Health Roundtable, writing, "As we work to make healthcare more transparent and bring down costs, companies and individuals will be better equipped to prioritize mental health — something that has taken a back seat for far too long."

Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith issued [https://events.in.gov/event/lieutenant-governor-beckwith-statement-on-the-redistricing-in-indiana?utm_campaign=widget&utm_medium=widget&utm_source=State+of+Indiana] a statement on redistricting in Indiana. He said, "I am calling on my Republican colleagues in the Indiana Senate to find your backbone, to remember who sent you here, and to reclaim Indiana's rightful voice in Congress by drawing a 9-0 map."

Secretary Diego Morales concluded [https://events.in.gov/event/secretary-of-state-diego-morales-office-concludes-statewide-public-meetings-on-election-topics?utm_campaign=widget&utm_medium=widget&utm_source=State+of+Indiana] a series of informative public meetings on election issues. Under his leadership, Indiana is ranked #7 in the nation for election integrity.

Treasurer Daniel Elliott addressed [https://x.com/TOS_Elliott/status/1980648770435211560] the AIM Board of Directors to give updates on his office's programs and continued efforts to help cities make government more efficient and cost-effective for taxpayers.

Comptroller Elise Nieshalla sounded [https://x.com/Comp_Nieshalla/status/1981467310951932276] the alarm on the national debt topping $38T this week, urging us to "rein in spending, balance the budget, and grow the economy."

Attorney General Todd Rokita voiced [https://x.com/AGToddRokita/status/1978591135900500106] his support for the Fairness Act, which would ensure Indiana law enforcement is in full cooperation with ICE, strengthen our anti-sanctuary laws, hold employers accountable for hiring illegal aliens over Hoosiers, and increase oversight of state benefits like Medicaid.

Senator Todd Young joined [https://www.young.senate.gov/newsroom/press-releases/young-johnson-introduce-legislation-to-ensure-hard-working-americans-are-paid-during-government-shutdowns/] Senator Ron Johnson in introducing the Shutdown Fairness Act to ensure that hard-working Americans are paid during government shutdowns.

Senator Jim Banks urged [https://www.banks.senate.gov/news/press-releases/sen-banks-urges-fda-to-step-up-inspections-of-foreign-drug-plants/] the FDA to increase inspections of foreign drug manufacturing plants. He warned that inspections remain below pre-pandemic levels and called for strong oversight to prevent poor-quality drugs from entering the market.

Congressman Rudy Yakym commented [https://yakym.house.gov/posts/rep-yakym-on-hostage-release-today-marks-a-new-dawn-for-the-middle-east-and-the-world] on the hostage release following President Trump's peace plan between Israel and Hamas. He stated, “Today marks a new dawn for the Middle East and the world. After two horrific years in Hamas’ captivity, the hostages are finally home."

Congressman Marlin Stutzman introduced [https://stutzman.house.gov/media/press-releases/rep-stutzman-introduces-house-companion-sen-cruzs-nigeria-religious-freedom] the Nigeria Religious Freedom Accountability Act of 2025 in the House, saying, "Implementing Sharia law and condoning the murder of innocent people is barbaric. We must use the targeted tools we have at our disposal to combat religious violence in all its forms."

Congressman Jim Baird voted [https://baird.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=2500] in the House Foreign Affairs Committee to pass a package to reauthorize the U.S. Department of State and implement critical reforms to restore accountability and ensure the department is properly advancing U.S. interests abroad.

Congresswoman Victoria Spartz commented [https://x.com/RepSpartz/status/1977811708879249894] on President Trump's historic Middle East peace agreement, saying, "Significant accomplishment by President Trump — leadership does matter!"

Congressman Jefferson Shreve toured [https://x.com/RepShreve/status/1980673020222919064] the Toyota Material Handling plant in Columbus for an up-close look at what makes them the global leader in forklift production and sales.

Congressman Mark Messmer met [https://x.com/RepMessmer/status/1978828589626757197] with officials from Daviess Community Hospital, showing his support for rural hospitals and those who fight for the health and well-being of Indiana communities.

Congresswoman Erin Houchin issued [https://x.com/RepHouchin/status/1978523527276835240] a statement on the ongoing government shutdown. She wrote about the Biden administration's misuse of tax dollars and how the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act removed these provisions, which Senate Democrats are fighting to include, among other Medicaid items, in the ever-failing continuing resolution that has kept the government shut down."

subject: U.S. Sanctions Colombia, Harris May Run Again, and Diving Monkeys
body:
The [U.S. on Friday imposed sanctions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu3CAYBODT4A4LMIZ1QZHG3aZNaYH5sf8IgwV4nb19tJHyLvDaKUbzza_n8rQYMW0_7QGmhbwkuGuE1qAsV602rQ1zqmuO-XBod1sK1kUwMVLOqFCLtxjfi-y8CQAChg4M14pLPbBBdbtxbuQjF17JIBRjWoWJuYd1Uxhl0IF3aD5tnAnFGRtG2U9acT9ODw6OOTcBkQw8tlz63xlT2yHEd35B6dd8dNHsrZ2VDD-ImImY2w5nwdR6TETMdy7REzFflX5R6H9LomeBih5So3ZdrwqV7njQHKiNMd-YNgp_Tpsq5vRJfbk22or1QMQstGZSKiLmrhh_3hgjVqWJZNthMf4b17716MuIvwEAAP__ffeMXQ) on Colombian President Gustavo Petro and his family after President Trump called Petro an “illegal drug dealer,” accusing him of failing to curb drug trafficking.

| | |

| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUBeCnwVssuNg4HhgqVd7StSPi5xLfFpsIaNy8fZX2EbqeTzpHOu8Xc7GUaL--2Q11i9nseNSErWExX7Xa3TfKe_U55c2RXW0pVA1wGE-Cn0CZYCk9zNAFHREBZYdaTEoMk-RSdauWbkCEWTmY3QgOoodzmM-Ce1SjcNCRfrYJDkpwLsehnyclwjifBTru3Ixs4Bio5dJ_ZNrbijE98h1L7_PWJb22dqtMvjBYGCzHcfSP8t3K55MZLDZG45lccoxYDAUmX0FwAAbqSX8BF9AVHW4HpURVTWzg181S-p1o__rlruEnAAD__8SndRQ) | |
# Sunday, October 26, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1881, the Earp brothers confronted the Clanton-McLaury gang in a [famous shootout at the O.K. Corral](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQxfGnMZ2RPXyFwsU2dNl2S2TwEM-uYSJ7EsTbr3J13-DWP-kc6f_nPt89JToev_2OTjaeDzxLQhHM86sUf6xCfJSVE-8L-ehzpjKDgU5bo6Gfg6d0zW0V3IYI2FTo7NDbdmhM01fR-WXbGr9BN3YD3PxtAewgjG2wobVhDRW5z5o10Ftjmq6tx6G3oRtvFhezLCOq1mAg4Vz_ZTok4pYufmOuV96r5KLIs6jml4JJwXSeZx2pCOfr4womiVR08JemQ3-LgolX4QWzhl7BVCKz8Eu0Fy0RNf_TK-fsU5VdeJ6UEpV-UK157J7S16_8KNbbwf8AAAD__768gC8) in Tombstone, Arizona. Today's [_Podcast Extra_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMV3QYJsBCheRonS57dVWaIwnYXYNzmInKG-_yr7CtudIX_H_v4wXkijr7R8t7Mo1jSvvOXIpvI2PnGmdiqQ1TymmxQvNtG2SRw26PTRw0DgGkvgabRXclVmzqdg1HTa2M2Cwml2ADiigRcIhAPqppx592xN4O5C3lbi31oDGBsC0th46bEI79A178H5gZYGDlLTVn0nWMvM1vtKTt3pKSxXdXMo9K3NU-qz0ed_3-pUe5eH5_b8XKtOszPmpzOmL7ofv3O0fclQaizIng5irzYX7LjFKxk5ZuC0k8Vcvf0rydPonAAD___9odGk) examines the penny's renewed attention and how a nationwide shortage could spark new legislation on the coin's future. If you're tired of overpaying for home and auto insurance, today's sponsor, [FinanceBuzz](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUBeCnwVssuNg4HhgqVd7StSPi5xLfFpsIaNy8fZX2EbqeTzpHOu8Xc7GUaL--2Q11i9nseNSErWExX7Xa3TfKe_U55c2RXW0pVA1wGE-Cn0CZYCk9zNAFHREBZYdaTEoMk-RSdauWbkCEWTmY3QgOoodzmM-Ce1SjcNCRfrYJDkpwLsehnyclwjifBTru3Ixs4Bio5dJ_ZNrbijE98h1L7_PWJb22dqtMvjBYGCzHcfSP8t3K55MZLDZG45lccoxYDAUmX0FwAAbqSX8BF9AVHW4HpURVTWzg181S-p1o__rlruEnAAD__8SndRQ), makes it easy to compare top providers and find smarter ways to save in minutes with their free comparison tool.
|
---
## U.S. Sanctions Colombian Leader
The [U.S. on Friday imposed sanctions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu3CAYBODT4A4LMIZ1QZHG3aZNaYH5sf8IgwV4nb19tJHyLvDaKUbzza_n8rQYMW0_7QGmhbwkuGuE1qAsV602rQ1zqmuO-XBod1sK1kUwMVLOqFCLtxjfi-y8CQAChg4M14pLPbBBdbtxbuQjF17JIBRjWoWJuYd1Uxhl0IF3aD5tnAnFGRtG2U9acT9ODw6OOTcBkQw8tlz63xlT2yHEd35B6dd8dNHsrZ2VDD-ImImY2w5nwdR6TETMdy7REzFflX5R6H9LomeBih5So3ZdrwqV7njQHKiNMd-YNgp_Tpsq5vRJfbk22or1QMQstGZSKiLmrhh_3hgjVqWJZNthMf4b17716MuIvwEAAP__ffeMXQ) on Colombian President Gustavo Petro and his family after President Donald Trump called Petro an “illegal drug leader,” accusing him of failing to curb drug trafficking. The two leaders have [clashed over U.S. strikes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUBeCnwVssuBDsDAxdvKVrR8TPtX1bbCKgcfP2lfsK3Y50pE865-Nu744S7cu729C0Odsdj5qwNSz2u1a3h0Z5ryGnvHlyqyuFqgUO14vgF9A2Okovq7poZkRA2aERgxZqkFzqbjWjBg8jKFTBSw5D1OBmqbXC0cGodEfm1AQHLTiXV9XfBi3i9TYK9Nz7GzLFMVLLpf_MtLcV5_TKTyx9yFuXzNraozL5xmBiMB3H0Xsfzo7BdI5hMLnSKCQ8YyhfCeIGS_rJXTHxcVBKVPXAFF82R-lPbf-64mngNwAA__83cHJA) on boats allegedly used to smuggle drugs, killing dozens, including some Colombian nationals. Trump has said other nations had failed to stop the boats, while Petro has accused him of "murder." The [U.S. carried out its 10th strike](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUL1uhDAYexrYgvIDCRkydLntunZE-fmArxfIKckd4u0r2kfoZEuWbdlf9-luMeK-fNoNTJ3TtMNRItQKeXqVYndfMe3Fp5g2h3a1OWOZOOUDYZRwOQWL8Zz6NpgZgINowTAlWa8EFbJdjRNWj45pF-SoR65G4Xs6e88GRdWsXYvmSmOUS0apGPpOK8nCoEcGjjqnoekpBKwpd98J97rCHM_0htz5tLXRrLU-SyM-Gn5r-O04js67cq249IbfLvoH5FVIqRkfQGyMsEAgIb8W4pKt5IExFiLJCkuBupJiz8vWZhOeB8aIRaqmp8tmMf4213_d9Tb8JwAA___4woAI) on Friday against a vessel allegedly operated by the Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua. U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said in a statement: _"Since President Gustavo Petro came to power, cocaine production in Colombia has exploded to the highest rate in decades, flooding the United States and poisoning Americans.”_
## Pentagon Accepts Payment for Military
The Pentagon confirmed on Friday that it has accepted [an anonymous $130 million gift](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAUhJ8GOq-Of7DXhYs02920KZHBh-VE_kG2uSvePiKvcMvRaEbzzZ-v-ctTpPz-7RO6vpU546dF7B3rfLbm89qp5LaWWNJCfve1UpsFiIlxYELPwVO8ZjUGtyEKlCM6bjRXRoLU4-4WDFZZKXXQPFi_yE0o-7Qrtz5swM1I7m7jIDQHkJN6WKN5mOyT4wLLYnFQgIF6qY-_hXLfcYtX-cb6WEsao9t7P9ogfw3iNYiXP26A27pF7bRGHMTrfQdywtxZ288eyiezRJG6rxc7_FVLjMznkq9UzsZCyf7mZr2e6WAohVklaGEFKGmmKdhgAIzkIC0-5VhdOD4UIzVtBgXv5Cn-n9d_9Om3E_8CAAD__z93i6E) to help pay members of the military during the government shutdown. President Trump said the donation was made by an unnamed friend who “loves the military and loves the country” and wanted no recognition. However, the move has prompted [questions about its legality](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkE3upCAUxE-DOzp8KOiCxWzc9WxnaVCeLRPgGXjdHW8_ca7w31VSlV-q6s9zefqYYnn99hkc7bgU-LYERFCXd2u-bBSxtA0T5jX6w9ca26KEGrgUXJkl-Jiupe-C2wEU6A6ctEb2VgttusNZuws72XXctJFaj6MKcl-tXr0fQG6mi-6mSaGMFEIP_WOyRoZhGiWsYl0nYL2AEAnr4y_GQgfs6cIP1MeGuUvuIDob07-Ympmay3Vio9tiar7BTM1S3Lpnan43fu9jag5w-koZCnHc-ddXXmGD-IHGpRY8x5QiFr5XzDxfjaBePGDBygn56S9OFfG8SV114fze-WYs68Ur-5j-d6MfHfpx6l8AAAD___9Sigk). The military typically relies on money appropriated by Congress for funding. [Senate Democrats blocked](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFuhCAYBOCnwZsb-BHUA4cmjbfttUcD8rPQIBhgd-PbN_YVep7km8x839e7DjGkx5feUTWX14TvGrE1LOuzVp22FnKqW455N0F7XUqoK1AQPaM9yNXqEM916KxyiIC8Q8VGyYaRUy47r-S0gXFiMsPMwCJK6YQeqAG0VIyMdkFdGqMgGaVcDLd5lMyKeWJoqDEzkoGiDS2X208OqXl08cwvLLct711UvrWjEv5BYCGwNI8-xHhlBJYjx7CdBBaLDlNFAosQI_B56lvJ-aj9oc---mez-Z16m5O-5l4UX5op6Aj_9EdXlD3eIcZQ5UgG-th1-Kvo2r8-eyn4DQAA___KIoBr) the Shutdown Fairness Act of 2025 in a 54-45 vote that would have paid active-duty service members and other essential federal workers.
## List: Most Popular Halloween Candies
Reese’s Peanut Butter Cups are [the most popular candy](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAURp8GOwwg4lBQbGM3225pEK4jmysYuDPGt9_MvsJff8l3Ts6f5_L0CVN-_fYHONrKkuFqCERQl3drPgdKJbdQsBxr8ruvNbVFCTVyKbgyS_QJ70V30W0ACoYOnJyM1NMgBtPt7hHMZgOYUTyskmAn2OykhR20NsaasUvu-yaFMlKIYdS9nYyMo31IWMW6WmBaQExUav-3pEw7bHiXD9Q-lKNDtxOdjQ2_mJqZmq_r6mv8TkzNvlIKCEzNR2nEz3K-0Ve-e8RyAWQefI43X2_eyBPwrwhTc1ddPK-EmJqZmBavwyf8T6MfJfo49S8AAP__Jx96Vg) given to trick-or-treaters, according to a new study on Halloween candy. Reese’s Cups are the top treat handed out in 14 states. M&M’s, Hershey’s Milk Chocolate Bar, Snickers, and Skittles round out the top five. The list was compiled from DoorDash receipts last October when consumers were stocking up for the holiday. So, where is the best place for ghosts and goblins to make a big Halloween haul? [Pennsylvania gives out more candy](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkc2uozAMhZ8m7KhCAqFdsBipYndnO8vIJAY8yk-VuEV9-xG38wZ3-9mfraPz58t-AQVK22-IOPGabcKjBmTGYp-1QnJMOVWXQ44LwQ6lULVKqqHtZKuM9UDhbfvGTyuiQt3g1I2m60cttWn2yfTjgn5wxq3GSLWu7gqoh5u6Yg9u1A1N57VOKtNJqYf-chtN54fbtcNFLssNRS_RE-dy-Zsp8Y5reOcXlovLsQnTzvyoQv8SahZqPo7jUvw5EmqGwuQCCjVXBsbabvTCNj-53SGEfCCm1kHy79PVMyW2DuIDaEtC3zkulgsmbws6Kk4oc27U_CwOhb57Kuj4P43o6Rk_1uf7N34EcBgxsdD3SmkLaB0U35TJPw4KgaoZRS-3CBS-8_CPSnhN6l8AAAD__xgdn90) than any other state, followed by Kentucky, Utah, Idaho, and New Hampshire.

**Whatever happened to Dan Quayle?** Dan Quayle served as President George H. W. Bush’s vice president from 1989 to 1993 after previously serving as an Indiana congressman and then the state's youngest-ever senator. As vice president, he was a frequent target for media critics over his perceived gaffes and culture-war battles.

The most famous of these battles was sparked by Quayle’s criticism of the TV show _Murphy Brown_ , about a fictional news anchor who became an unwed mother. He accused the show of diminishing the importance of fathers, a point that was ridiculed by critics at the time but began a debate that continues today.

After leaving office in 1993, he moved to Arizona and into private business, emerging briefly in 1999-2000 to run for president before dropping out and throwing his support to George W. Bush, the eventual winner of the 2000 election.

Since then, Quayle [has become chairman of Cerberus Global Investments](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb7YuYONkYOjiLV07Wvxc4lthSAHHyttX6St0-4ZP50jn67beDEVK90-zo24hrwnPGrE1LOtRq0muUU7V5Zh3S2YzpVBdBYip59ALtXpD8bWOndcBUaDsUPNZ8XGWIFW3aSWlcJcwWhOUdf7iANTELVjlw-Qm6Ei_aRyE4gByGofrrLifrheOFqy9IhsBPbVchu9MqW0Y4is_sQwu713UW2uPyuQHEwsTy3meg8NisRz1fWBiyUfpA5X3jGg8lrrRg4nFm9T_HOYVkYmlK9o_ToqRqprZCPfdUPwztH9leWrxGwAA__-fdneE) and part of Cerberus’s senior leadership. He also authored three books, including _Standing Firm: A Vice-Presidential Memoir_.

He also still does occasional on-stage interviews and policy chats, and his name is on the Quayle Vice Presidential Learning Center, a Huntington, Indiana, museum dedicated to the office of the vice president. _What are your thoughts on Dan Quayle's vice presidency? Let us know by replying to this email._

Refill your body’s tank and feel the difference— | Whatever happened to Dan Quayle? Dan Quayle served as President George H. W. Bush’s vice president from 1989 to 1993 after previously serving as an Indiana congressman and then the state's youngest-ever senator. As vice president, he was a frequent target for media critics over his perceived gaffes and culture-war battles. The most famous of these battles was sparked by Quayle’s criticism of the TV show Murphy Brown , about a fictional news anchor who became an unwed mother. He accused the show of diminishing the importance of fathers, a point that was ridiculed by critics at the time but began a debate that continues today. After leaving office in 1993, he moved to Arizona and into private business, emerging briefly in 1999-2000 to run for president before dropping out and throwing his support to George W. Bush, the eventual winner of the 2000 election. Since then, Quayle and part of Cerberus’s senior leadership. He also authored three books, including Standing Firm: A Vice-Presidential Memoir. He also still does occasional on-stage interviews and policy chats, and his name is on the Quayle Vice Presidential Learning Center, a Huntington, Indiana, museum dedicated to the office of the vice president. name: Troy Downing
subject: God Works
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
When I was deployed to Afghanistan, I prayed my family would be safe... God answered.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAyNl9LSS1CSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzY2MjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMjZfS0ktQkguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzM2NjI4LTI4OTkifQ/eZB2xly1_Wp8rzKE4epwZA)God works in mysterious ways...
When I started my first business, I prayed it would be successful... **God answered.**
When I was deployed to Afghanistan, I prayed my family would be safe... **God answered.**
When I saw career politicians turn their backs on Americans to put their pet projects before the interest of the American people, I prayed for a better outcome...
I was surprised when **_God called on ME_** to run for office.
I'm Troy Downing. You might not recognize my name, but that's okay.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & a proud dad.
**[I'm also the Republican running for re-election in Congress for Montana in the biggest race in the country.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAyNl9LSS1CSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzY2MjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMjZfS0ktQkguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzM2NjI4LTI4OTkifQ/3uqofTxzVvWhNHCNKlqw3Q)**
I'm not in this to become a household name or for the title. I don't care about any of that.
I'm a simple man who enjoys a beer, likes to hunt and fish with my buddies & puts my family before anything else.
**__But I'm at my wits' end with two-faced politicians and DC bigwigs who say one thing to your face, only to turn around & stab hard-working folks like you & me in the back.__**
I'll always tell the truth. I'll always put America first. I'll always stand up for what's right.
The Radical Left will spread lies about me & throw me under the bus just to end my campaign before the midterms.
**[Peter, can you take a leap of faith on a simple combat vet like me to beat the Left & save our country?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAyNl9LSS1CSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzY2MjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMjZfS0ktQkguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzM2NjI4LTI4OTkifQ/_CsH3CNjjWN2CesVkFdGmw)**[HELP A COMBAT VET
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAyNl9LSS1CSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MzY2MjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMjZfS0ktQkguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzM2NjI4LTI4OTkifQ/MlvfG7xXhCJ17iN5A1WLeg)I know if we win this race, we can bring the entire Democrat Machine to its knees.
Thank you & God Bless,
Troy Downing (R-MT)| |

I was surprised when God called on ME to run for office. I'm Troy Downing. You might not recognize my name, but that's okay. I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & a proud dad. I'm not in this to become a household name or for the title. I don't care about any of that. I'm a simple man who enjoys a beer, likes to hunt and fish with my buddies & puts my family before anything else. But I'm at my wits' end with two-faced politicians and DC bigwigs who say one thing to your face, only to turn around & stab hard-working folks like you & me in the back. I'll always tell the truth. I'll always put America first. I'll always stand up for what's right. The Radical Left will spread lies about me & throw me under the bus just to end my campaign before the midterms. know if we win this race, we can bring the entire Democrat Machine to its knees. Thank you & God Bless, Troy Downing (R-MT)| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of War. Troy Downing For Congress P.O. Box 20333 Billings, MT 59104 To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress,

## Hundreds of Thousands Without Power After Storms
Severe thunderstorms throughout Southeast Texas late Friday night and early Saturday morning [led](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy6iAQhp8m6cgAItGC4jZ23vaUGQiLYSRsBlbRtz8TfYRT7s7O_t_3_1ynq40p5tt_u4KhV8ApQ6sJiKBMlbCs9Z5xvuODNmxQGqzO5klyeWSCM6knb2N6T6r3xnF_Fj0YMWqhRq1Op34xDvzxMDp39lorLazis3cuqGC90GGWfTT7M8GlFoILOQ5KqCA4BGf9WYswdoqDj4RloAUIXraG9MYnlGHGtU9mIdpqd_jXyUsnL621IeCrgaXle7IvvxPb3Tp5qfCEAoyWR_ZQvpasNoCNLfiohJl9cpgtYBnOhA4K2zH7YvzWYkqx6h3sttqYPhz0t_aeRv4GAAD__44liM0) to power outages affecting more than 260,000 residents. The storms brought torrential rain, lightning, and winds that measured over 60 miles per hour, shutting off power for 150,000 Houston residents. Flood watches were issued for most of Eastern Texas through Saturday for widespread rainfall expected to total 2-4 inches. You can see a live map of any remaining outages [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQhuGrsTtbgDEkBcWRjtJl2y0RmCFG4ceCSZzc_SqW9gq2fYvRM9_3VV9NiCHfvkwChS9fdIa9RUCEqhuWmto9l-VeHriVHeoOyZqsGWHzQMnAhHYmxLfmvVOWuDPtQVEpKJeCn079qqy1joGHaZGCwyyFJDOZxHyWFAhntg_qc4wSJigllMmRU-4pAW-NOwvqZccJuICljrgCwss0H9_lCXVcSuqjWhG31k3_Onbp2OVQlgeaG4yPdrSpY0KHjEvauum_f-16B4Mr1OHzqzYVwxJBJxPysJSMkPE3Dra4t2aa91W5bQ8xhiY-olsyIR4A_NtsT8V-AgAA__800oSW).
## DART Silver Line Passenger Rail Makes Debut
The Dallas Area Rapid Transit Silver Line [made](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ8GMo_8NxgCgkvI9tILURu3F2saPLJ7x7tvf2JeYbOSSvpUX_37WD8gUTo__8KBM3_HvJ7YKiEzlrVyLkd9nHl75C9-5oal4eHhXLXUd6Gk0MMaINHPavswexkm1eOs3KCsG-w49vtsvL6D806ZyYF0YTRmDEYb7501U7j3ab5gSupBKam0u1llo5IYPYRpUNF1VmJInMuNd2T8hhrpJ7-w3LZ89DTvzM_amT-dXjq9tNZuLQJcZacXKJw2wk4vl1enF8obUKeXAIWrqIleWASlE0XJRCJ_sWiJd9EQH3gGURk45VNsSOjLO18YPTphbIRJIQptohI2yk1M42aECZu8e-UQ0PdlDs-WiFIdLpPPAxK9h_Pv7n7N-n8AAAD__wq_lIw) its grand debut Saturday, spanning seven cities and 26 miles, following five years of construction that cost $2.1 billion. The passenger rail system will connect Plano, Richardson, Dallas, Addison, Carrollton, Coppell, Grapevine, and DFW Airport, and rides cost just $3. The trains will feature bike and luggage racks, USB chargers, and ADA-compliant boarding, with service running daily from 4 a.m. to 1 a.m. You can find more information on the new system and how to buy a pass [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGyozAQRE8DmShJlgEHCjYh86YbUgMaGZWFRI1mLfv2WzjYC_wD9OvX_ec-3yHEkB6_YUfLb5_nhLVEZEaaC2fayzPl9Zn_8pErUsV9gTRrqa9CSaH72UGIn9m0zi7S3VSLVg29MkNvxrHdrLssWhkj3epHJ70B78blcjXq6rUZ5NoGe8KU1L1SUumhM8p4JdEv4G698kNjJLrAmTrekPENxcdPfiF1a97baDfmozSXX42eGj3VWrsnEpwzukyPRk9MkMqRiYFDTo2e_tubRk8OiEUJ8YUkYkgoUibexLdIOF9FSIyUvlmIAgKdqJasO2qIMZT-NHzsEOJXiH9248vqfwEAAP__iyuKBg).
## The Most Romantic Restaurant in Texas
Fredericksburg's Cabernet Grill, a rustic-themed eatery that serves gourmet steak, seafood, and luxurious wines, [was ranked](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGngQ4040vsULi42lW6pFittCWa4AGsGIzsCSRvv0peYfuj80n_z7k7kw9-GS80s5XHELuF9xxYhFOXJaY535bY3-Jd1rhz2nm-0tIpUIcKoVK6c-TDs2tKZ6_gWizZotHYGN0cj-VkQQPQwRzBcdu02oA2rkfNGpxhR1B6-zpDUBoRUJm6wWZA4OFKrtU4mKIBdl5iqmVi4QflITzjxqnu41wGO4msufj3v1CnQp32fa8l-ZXc5nN8bwp1-k60ceCUP6boe66-OAvdEy2Sq_6ThC9-nKQascUyWbfuPgSf9cseZ_LhTcnfAm1W_QYAAP__ICR8fA) the best date night restaurant in Texas by TripAdvisor's Best Date Night Restaurants in the U.S. Cabernet Grill was ranked the 18th-best date night spot in the country due to its laid-back style, creative spin on Texas classics, and friendly staff. The storms brought torrential rain, lightning, and winds that measured over 60 miles per hour, shutting off power for 150,000 Houston residents. Flood watches were issued for most of Eastern Texas through Saturday for widespread rainfall expected to total 2-4 inches. You can see a live map of any remaining outages . DART Silver Line Passenger Rail Makes Debut The Dallas Area Rapid Transit Silver Line its grand debut Saturday, spanning seven cities and 26 miles, following five years of construction that cost $2.1 billion. The passenger rail system will connect Plano, Richardson, Dallas, Addison, Carrollton, Coppell, Grapevine, and DFW Airport, and rides cost just $3. The trains will feature bike and luggage racks, USB chargers, and ADA-compliant boarding, with service running daily from 4 a.m. to 1 a.m. You can find more information on the new system and how to buy a pass . The Fredericksburg eatery was Texas' highest and only ranked restaurant on the list. Friend, we are Charlie Kirk. That’s the rally cry on the lips of millions of Americans – and the message they’re carrying out into the world with their “We are Charlie Kirk” wristbands. We want you to have one. To be a part of the incredible movement carrying Charlie’s legacy forward. **When you make a gift of any amount today, we’ll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the movement Charlie started and the mission we carry on.**

This isn’t just a wristband, friend. It’s a symbol of bold conviction. It’s a tribute to Charlie’s legacy of courage. **And when you wear it, you’re sending a statement.** You’re declaring that you stand for America. For faith, for family, and for freedom. _And most of all, for the vision Charlie ignited._ Your donation will help carry this vision forward and fuel the next generation of leaders who will defend these values — and never surrender. **And when you give any amount today, we’ll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**
