This fight will impact real families deciding whether they can afford to run their air conditioning in the Florida heat. It will affect small businesses watching their operating costs spiral out of control. It will force seniors on fixed incomes to choose between paying their electric bill and buying groceries.
**Where is our Attorney General while FPL tries to pick the pockets of 12 million Floridians? Silent.**
James Uthmeier won't stand up to the utility giants because he's too busy serving Trump and DeSantis instead of fighting for you.
As your next Attorney General, Jose Javier Rodriguez will fight for zero rate increases and take FPL to court if necessary to protect consumers. He's taken them on before — and he'll do it again. But we need to know you're with us.

clean_body: Claim your 2025 personalized Membership Card now We've reached out a few times Fellow American about the change in your membership status and we really hope you understand what's at stake. ---
Fellow Patriot,
---
I know this seems hard to believe...
---
_...But it’s the honest-to-God truth!_
---
**James Comey, the disgraced FBI Director who helped orchestrate one of the most vile witch hunts in history against President Trump, will go to TRIAL the __VERY_ _SAME_ _DAY__ that a Democrat Attorney General is making _me_ stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes.**
---
**This leftist Attorney General knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court. _You see, the deck is stacked!_ **
---
This day will truly be a split-screen moment for the history books:
---
_Comey, the _REAL_ criminal, and then yours truly, facing down the rest of my life in prison as an INNOCENT man. _
---
But in the end, this is what it’s all about for the Democrats... **_shameless vengeance_**.
---
President Trump and his administration are holding these Deep State crooks and thugs to account. Scoundrels like James Comey could _FINALLY_ face justice for their crimes!
---
And what is the Deep State doing in return? Trying to JAIL Rudy W. Giuliani.
---
Because if the Democrats can’t beat President Trump, their next best prize is to viciously prosecute his close friends and allies.
---
Look, as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ witch hunts, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
_**The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**_
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Fellow Patriot, just months out from the **TRIAL OF MY LIFE** , the situation I now find myself in is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
**That’s why I’m making a final plea, a Hail Mary, to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in these final months of what is no doubt the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fc7b84263865492abcbfcc4b938fa876&_e=EHrsobEf4WcfSDHf1_RVW_uh-X9K84ii_WBekqp_hjVJY7g86M8U7O-9XtIhaEP-4jzaf4xaFKnq7AfIDw6GeI4K_rDU2LpoEvt-GGTRXQDyKq82C-HrQDuzOBIv7rCE1p6pNGb6Ja_LfDvZtOjKXquI0y9xte31bshcMVZ4NbmdRnIScyqU6zYQaACBeoXIlvOgyPKr7ex9wHtVMqha8Z-a2t-fh_KicUNMQZR4ZC0Y4puHVLb7bOFFFvVgo6iRlYkNYzUc3loovZgUZE5Mq9Mh_sN7-TOuPQt_Rwf3VSwsUsIIKPVsNp4HLWvUV491evUWLytS11tvV2pIAVv7QtD5l6qa9uO5UmCmzPpbrsY2IqNps9cJvEHON6yei4VJJjUT5P3ZJmOBCvFNRAs2H2LvNQBoneAKtSRhdC91csBsndrSrfswatYeHQT9dHpbDtW7IO-bEVLXbpyR2woU1Yz2yYmACANWCf5PokozU-x-ZdMtOkohahvmT-s7qyZTYdrVHyr25xLe_jyd9oR9JtLINhF1-tPEF1SQrlpUXf6tm0hks7iGjrpgnmhOvuzxyT5jnIOeMtGFuKUX3p8ZzCND0x6lN5PQagg_q9vVMoIbOBWwlQgqSHBDWcjzu1xl4m5Jilu_4oZObDXyArVcAQ%3D%3D)

This day will truly be a split-screen moment for the history books: Comey, the REAL criminal, and then yours truly, facing down the rest of my life in prison as an INNOCENT man. But in the end, this is what it’s all about for the Democrats... shameless vengeance. President Trump and his administration are holding these Deep State crooks and thugs to account. Scoundrels like James Comey could FINALLY face justice for their crimes! And what is the Deep State doing in return? Trying to JAIL Rudy W. Giuliani. Because if the Democrats can’t beat President Trump, their next best prize is to viciously prosecute his close friends and allies. Look, as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ witch hunts, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Fellow Patriot, just months out from the TRIAL OF MY LIFE , the situation I now find myself in is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea, a Hail Mary, to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Trump bailed out Argentina. Our farmers got nothing.
body:
|
#
Friend, Across mid-Michigan, farmers are feeling the weight of this administration’s failed trade policies. Soybean sales have plummeted – and family farms are struggling to stay afloat. For months, they’ve asked for one simple thing: that Trump fix the policies that are cutting off their markets. But those pleas fell on deaf ears. And now, in the thick of harvest season, China has bought exactly _zero_ soybeans from American farmers, despite purchasing $12.6 billion worth last year. **Instead, China is buying its soybeans from Argentina. Yes, the same Argentina that the Trump Administration just bailed out with $20 billion in American taxpayer money.** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118027270/578419881/-185804085?refcode=em-10.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTBiMzQxMy03NGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=apaXCWoXvvsKSzg62a0iBzfVPCAjrw0_fhYTQjQ_1n8=)
**Farmers struggle under Trump's tariffs.** **But he has a plan ... to save Argentina**
---
Instead of standing with the people who grow our food and power our economy, the Trump Administration is bailing out Argentina and giving tax breaks to billionaires here at home. That’s not leadership – and it’s certainly not putting America first.
We deserve leadership that is committed to prioritizing American farmers, lowering costs for families, and strengthening our nation, not bailing out others at the expense of our people.
[**This campaign is about putting Michigan’s families and farmers first. If you’re with me in that fight, I’m asking you to chip in $3 today to keep MI-08 blue and fight for an economy that works for everyone – not just the wealthy and well-connected.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118027273/578419887/-185804085?refcode=em-10.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTBiMzQxMy03NGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=apaXCWoXvvsKSzg62a0iBzfVPCAjrw0_fhYTQjQ_1n8=)

clean_body: | Friend, Across mid-Michigan, farmers are feeling the weight of this administration’s failed trade policies. Soybean sales have plummeted – and family farms are struggling to stay afloat. For months, they’ve asked for one simple thing: that Trump fix the policies that are cutting off their markets. But those pleas fell on deaf ears. And now, in the thick of harvest season, China has bought exactly zero soybeans from American farmers, despite purchasing $12.6 billion worth last year. Instead, China is buying its soybeans from Argentina. Yes, the same Argentina that the Trump Administration just bailed out with $20 billion in American taxpayer money. | = Farmers struggle under Trump's tariffs. But he has a plan ... to save Argentina Instead of standing with the people who grow our food and power our economy, the Trump Administration is bailing out Argentina and giving tax breaks to billionaires here at home. That’s not leadership – and it’s certainly not putting America first. We deserve leadership that is committed to prioritizing American farmers, lowering costs for families, and strengthening our nation, not bailing out others at the expense of our people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Esosa, Onyx Impact
subject: Demolishing the White House and Black Progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
With the Fair Fight Action team on board, we will continue pushing back against this coordinated campaign to erase, distort, and suppress Black progress in America. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118027426/578420346/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251026_T1_OnyxSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBiMzQxMy03NGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NP3YpUbfDJVCdlJbOnuafbetCWGuhOpiUDqN1tce6w0=&emci=5ee9c51d-1eb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f80b3413-74b2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277)

| | Hi there, When I served as deputy executive director of Fair Fight Action, I had the privilege of working alongside this grassroots movement — and I know the impact you can make to defend our equal rights and fundamental freedoms. So now that I’ve started a new organization, Onyx Impact, to continue advancing our shared goals, I’m asking you to help amplify our latest report. | [SPLIT A DONATION BETWEEN ONYX IMPACT AND FAIR FIGHT ACTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118027427/578420348/-528497807?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251026_T1_OnyxSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBiMzQxMy03NGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NP3YpUbfDJVCdlJbOnuafbetCWGuhOpiUDqN1tce6w0=)
---

**We just released[the Blackout Report](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118027430/578420355/-1526185131?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251026_T1_OnyxSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBiMzQxMy03NGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NP3YpUbfDJVCdlJbOnuafbetCWGuhOpiUDqN1tce6w0=&emci=5ee9c51d-1eb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f80b3413-74b2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277), which exposes the real-world cost of a concerted effort to erase, distort, and suppress Black progress.**
This isn’t a culture war. It’s a power grab to gain illegitimate control by demolishing the White House and Black progress. And the stakes for Black Americans are generational — with jobs lost, grants slashed, data deleted, and opportunities blocked, all in under nine months:
* 306,000 Black women have lost jobs from cuts in both federal agencies and the private sector.

* $3.4 billion+ has been cut or frozen from grants for programs and research serving HBCUs, Black entrepreneurs, and Black communities.

* Over 6,000 federal datasets have been distorted, including data about maternal mortality, sickle cell disease, and other health care issues that disproportionately affect Black Americans.

[**Read the Blackout Report here, and share it with your networks to help get out the truth. We have to work fast and work together to protect our future.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118027434/578420363/-1526185131?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251026_T1_OnyxSplit_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBiMzQxMy03NGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NP3YpUbfDJVCdlJbOnuafbetCWGuhOpiUDqN1tce6w0=&emci=5ee9c51d-1eb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f80b3413-74b2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277)
Of course, gaining illegitimate control by taking opportunities away from Black Americans is an all-too-familiar story when it comes to voting rights as well.
Time and time again, we see leaders try to hold onto power not by trying to earn Black votes but by trying to suppress them.
It’s Jim Crow 2.0.
But Fair Fight Action pushes back for equal access to the ballot box.
Just this month, they called the nation’s attention to how a potential Supreme Court ruling could gut Black political representation in the South through a new wave of discriminatory gerrymandering.
Now they’re mobilizing pro-voter advocates to demand fair maps with fair representation.
They will also keep holding the line against voter suppression legislation in Georgia and around the country that could place additional obstacles between Black Americans and the ballot box.
And given the rise of disinformation that aims to keep Black communities from voting, Fair Fight Action strives to make sure voters have accurate election information so they can use their power in our democracy.
At Onyx Impact, we’re also dedicated to fighting the spread of harmful information, amplifying Black voices, and empowering Black communities.
[**And I’d be honored to keep working by your side. clean_body: With the Fair Fight Action team on board, we will continue pushing back against this coordinated campaign to erase, distort, and suppress Black progress in America. | | | Hi there, When I served as deputy executive director of Fair Fight Action, I had the privilege of working alongside this grassroots movement — and I know the impact you can make to defend our equal rights and fundamental freedoms. So now that I’ve started a new organization, Onyx Impact, to continue advancing our shared goals, I’m asking you to help amplify our latest report. | = We just released, which exposes the real-world cost of a concerted effort to erase, distort, and suppress Black progress. This isn’t a culture war. It’s a power grab to gain illegitimate control by demolishing the White House and Black progress. And the stakes for Black Americans are generational — with jobs lost, grants slashed, data deleted, and opportunities blocked, all in under nine months: 306,000 Black women have lost jobs from cuts in both federal agencies and the private sector. $3.4 billion+ has been cut or frozen from grants for programs and research serving HBCUs, Black entrepreneurs, and Black communities. Over 6,000 federal datasets have been distorted, including data about maternal mortality, sickle cell disease, and other health care issues that disproportionately affect Black Americans. Of course, gaining illegitimate control by taking opportunities away from Black Americans is an all-too-familiar story when it comes to voting rights as well. Time and time again, we see leaders try to hold onto power not by trying to earn Black votes but by trying to suppress them. It’s Jim Crow 2.0. But Fair Fight Action pushes back for equal access to the ballot box. Just this month, they called the nation’s attention to how a potential Supreme Court ruling could gut Black political representation in the South through a new wave of discriminatory gerrymandering. Now they’re mobilizing pro-voter advocates to demand fair maps with fair representation. They will also keep holding the line against voter suppression legislation in Georgia and around the country that could place additional obstacles between Black Americans and the ballot box. And given the rise of disinformation that aims to keep Black communities from voting, Fair Fight Action strives to make sure voters have accurate election information so they can use their power in our democracy. At Onyx Impact, we’re also dedicated to fighting the spread of harmful information, amplifying Black voices, and empowering Black communities. = Thanks for everything you do, Esosa Osa Founder & CEO, Onyx Impact = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Haley Stevens
subject: We Need To Be Honest About This:
disclaimer_text: paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health insurance
body:
MAGA Republicans Shut Down the Government

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1174%2E49239%2Ef5yDI3)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7373?t=2&akid=1174%2E49239%2Ef5yDI3)
---
Hey there,

I’m going to be totally honest with you about what’s happening right now. There’s been a lot of spin and nonsense coming out of the White House, but you deserve the truth. Here it is: **Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in Washington are the reason the federal government is shut down.**
It’s not an accident. This crisis is 100% manufactured – and regular people, including Michiganders, are paying the price.

But let’s back up. This didn’t start two nights ago – it started months ago when Donald Trump handed the keys to the federal government to his billionaire donor Elon Musk and his DOGE clowns.
Since then, we’ve seen deep, harmful cuts to critical services – from rural health care to infrastructure to clean water protections. All of it chipped away as working people were pushed aside.
Then came the GOP’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” – a massive tax giveaway to billionaires, paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health insurance. They slashed Medicaid. And they did it in the name of “efficiency,” pretending it was good fiscal policy. It wasn’t. **_It was cruelty with a calculator._** And now they’re targeting subsidies that help working families afford basic care.
**Because Republicans refuse to reverse those health care cuts or renew the health insurance subsidies set to expire soon, the government is shut down and health care costs are still going up.**
This isn’t some abstract budget fight. This is real, and for me, it’s personal.

Here’s why: Rural hospitals across the Midwest are preparing to shut their doors. Premiums are spiking. And families who rely on Medicaid are suddenly unsure if they’ll be able to afford medicine or even a doctor visit.
Let’s be clear about what this means for Michiganders: In my district alone, more than 31,000 people will have to pay more for their health care – _in some cases hundreds of dollars more_ – if Republicans succeed in letting these subsidies expire. That’s 31,000 hardworking folks who will be facing impossible choices – all so billionaires can buy another mansion or jet or whatever.

That’s why I’m not budging – I can’t support any deal that slashes health care and does nothing to cut costs for Michiganders. My priorities have always been lower costs, affordable health care, a strong workforce, and a government that works for Michigan.
**Because if it doesn’t work for Michigan, it doesn’t work for me.
**
I didn’t come to Congress to play political games. I didn’t come to stand by while the people I love get ripped off. I came to Congress to get things done – and to protect the working people who make our state, and our country, great.
So if you’re angry, you’re not alone. I am too.

If you’re frustrated, you have every right to be.

If you’re scared, I understand.
Families are stretched thin. Groceries cost more. Gas costs more. Health care costs more. And now we’ve got a shutdown caused by Republicans who couldn’t care less what that might mean for working families.

Here’s my promise to you: I’m not backing down. I’ll keep showing up. I’ll keep pushing for a deal that restores health care access, reverses the cuts, and puts people – not politics – first.
My Stevens doggedness is in overdrive. I promise to fight as hard as I can.

Will you join me? **[If you agree Republicans are to blame for this reckless shutdown, add your name to our new petition now:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7364?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1174%2E49239%2Ef5yDI3)**
| | [Sign The Petition](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7364?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1174%2E49239%2Ef5yDI3)
---
I want to show the strength of this grassroots movement, and it all starts with you.

Thanks for reading this. And for being in this fight with me.
More soon,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7374?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1174%2E49239%2Ef5yDI3) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7373?t=6&akid=1174%2E49239%2Ef5yDI3)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=7&akid=1174%2E49239%2Ef5yDI3)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

clean_body: National Republicans are investing another $1.5 million into Virginia to clobber us with attack ads. = Peter, you need to see this breaking news in the Governor's race: = First, Trump went all in on attacking Abigail Spanberger. Now, national Republicans are pouring money into Virginia to clobber us with attack ads. = = = = = = = We refuse to take anything for granted in this race, and here's why: Back in 2021, Democrats led in polls all year long, only for the tide to turn against us in the immediate leadup to Election Day. Now, with nine days to go, the polls are all over the place, with one showing us up double digits and another showing our opponent narrowing the gap to just three points. Consider for a moment what it will mean for Winsome to have another $1.5 million in her account. Even more attacks. Even more lies. And even more work we must do to set the record straight. That's why Abigail needs you to stand beside her again today, Peter. Every donation — whatever the amount — will help us keep our organizers in the field and our ads on the air. = = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. body:
Your trust in me means the world.

| **It’s pretty clear that Donald Trump is afraid of me.**

Trump has publicly endorsed my opponent (after Jack shamelessly begged for his support). He’s attacked me by name in multiple, unhinged rants on social media. His administration _illegally leaked my private records to Jack’s campaign ally._

**But Peter, Trump is even more afraid of the movement we’ve built together here in New Jersey — because if we win, we will send a powerful message to the nation that the people do not support his destructive and incompetent presidency.**

That’s why he’s doing _everything he can_ to stop us from winning this upcoming election, and is rallying the support of his deep-pocketed allies to flood this race with spending against us.

[_**Donald Trump knows that as governor, I’m going to do everything in my power to fight back against his disastrous agenda. But polling shows a neck-and-neck race, Peter, which means we absolutely can’t let Trump’s attacks go unanswered. name: Scott Presler
subject: Our ballot return rate is AMAZING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action New Jersey Inc
body:
It’s time to chase like our lives depend on it
| | | | |
---
Fellow Patriot, right now Early Vote Action ballot chasers are blanketing the state getting Republican voters to request mail-in ballots and chasing down outstanding mail-in ballots.
Polling in the New Jersey’s governor’s race has started to show what I’ve been seeing for a long time.**The race is officially tied.**

The polling for Republican nominee Jack Ciattarelli continued to improve this week and we are truly in the midst of a tectonic shift in New Jersey... All that’s left now is to do the hard work between now and Election Day to turn out every Republican voter in the state.

That’s where my team and I come in. My grassroots team is on the ground right now registering voters, chasing mail-in ballots, and preparing to launch our massive get out the early vote program.
****
**And if you take a look at these numbers,****__you know we’re making an impact_._**

clean_body: It’s time to chase like our lives depend on it | | | | | Fellow Patriot, right now Early Vote Action ballot chasers are blanketing the state getting Republican voters to request mail-in ballots and chasing down outstanding mail-in ballots. Polling in the New Jersey’s governor’s race has started to show what I’ve been seeing for a long time.The race is officially tied. The polling for Republican nominee Jack Ciattarelli continued to improve this week and we are truly in the midst of a tectonic shift in New Jersey... All that’s left now is to do the hard work between now and Election Day to turn out every Republican voter in the state. That’s where my team and I come in. My grassroots team is on the ground right now registering voters, chasing mail-in ballots, and preparing to launch our massive get out the early vote program. ** And if you take a look at these numbers,**you know we’re making an impact. Patriot, that’s where you come in. We need your help to make the difference. By sponsoring an Early Vote Action ballot chaser, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025. . Fellow Patriot, I’m counting on you to deliver the resources we need to win again, you know I’ll be on the ground doing the hard work with the grassroots either way, but with your support our impact will be felt by far more voters. . In Liberty, Scott Presler | | | | | |

name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: I will always stand with you
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/111773/images/AL%20Green/al%20green%20talking%20to%20reporter.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/111773/images/AL%20Green/Scotus%20al%20green.jpg]
Friends,
I continue the Fight For Fair Maps and the protection of the Voting Rights Act by speaking on the steps of the SCOTUS. Our voices matter, we must act now and be heard.
Standing up is never easy, but it is always right. We must fight for those who cannot fight for themselves. My commitment is simple: to fight for justice for all people, for their right to health care and their right to live free.
This commitment has put a target on my back. They want to silence my voice and believe I won't have the funds to fight to retain this seat.
Now, the redistricting fight and the 2026 election cycle are merging into one critical battle. Losing this seat means one less voice for peace, one less voice for Medicaid, one less vote for human rights.
We must build our movement wall strongly. Please, make a contribution to help me continue serving you and fighting for justice for all. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251025txftbackeml]
Together, we can keep a voice in Congress that has a record of fighting for all of us.

Congressman Al Green

name: Team Moore
subject: 3+ candidates ready to defeat Wes
body:
We know their game plan.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=824%2E1086043%2E5HtO0i)
Peter, the Republicans aren’t just running _one_ candidate against Wes.
They’re testing a whole field — Larry Hogan, Andy Harris, even some guy named Ed Hale. They’re doing focus groups and opposition research to find who will be the strongest contender to run against Wes with millions in spending behind him.
**That’s their strategy: Old Republicans with old ideas fighting to undo everything we’ve accomplished together.**
**[If you're ready to stand up to them and reelect Wes Moore, will you chip in any amount today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251026-1.E6jITK&refcode=em-20251026-1&t=4&akid=824%2E1086043%2E5HtO0i)**
Peter, these old guys probably can’t believe that the one to undo their failed policies and reverse Maryland’s multi-billion-dollar deficit is a young, dynamic governor like Wes Moore.
So they think they have their game plan: Hundred-thousand-dollar donor checks that can overwhelm our grassroots movement. They’re hoping that we wait and see the state of the race before taking action.
**But that’s not the kind of leader Wes is, or the kind of campaign he’ll run.** We can start taking action right now if thousands of us get up off the sidelines and support this movement.
**[Peter, will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help us build the resources we need before they even choose their candidate? With your help, we’ll be ready for anything.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251026-1.E6jITK&refcode=em-20251026-1&t=5&akid=824%2E1086043%2E5HtO0i)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251026-1.E6jITK&amount=5&refcode=em-20251026-1&t=24&akid=824%2E1086043%2E5HtO0i)**
Thank you!
— Team Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251026-1&t=25&refcode2=824_1086043_5HtO0i&akid=824%2E1086043%2E5HtO0i)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=824%2E1086043%2E5HtO0i)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=824%2E1086043%2E5HtO0i)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Democrats.org
subject: A quick memo:
body:
Please don't skip this one-minute read:
---
**A quick memo for fellow Democrats** Hi Derek, with less than two weeks until this year’s elections, we’re here with a quick update: Right now, we’re working around the clock to reach as many voters as possible and elect Democrats in states like Virginia and New Jersey on November 4. We’re investing heavily in state Democratic parties across the country, and have deployed volunteers nationwide to reach voters on the ground and persuade those who remain undecided. Now, we’re reaching out to ask you to join your fellow Democrats in helping fund our fight to hold Trump and Republicans accountable and make life easier and more affordable for families nationwide. **Can you make your first contribution of 2025 before Election Day?** Your donation today goes directly toward helping us elect Democrats this year, flip the House and the Senate next year, and take back the White House in 2028. [**If this work is important to you, we’re asking you to please donate $7 to the DNC today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251026_5016_fr&refcode2=5016_22930333_7G8hC0&akid=5016%2E22930333%2E7G8hC0) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251026_5016_fr&refcode2=5016_22930333_7G8hC0&akid=5016%2E22930333%2E7G8hC0)**

body:

Peter Willis,

This is urgent: with just 9 days to go until the election, billionaires
are FLOODING the NYC Mayor’s race with million dollar donations,
DETERMINED to stop our movement from helping Mamdani WIN.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?source=email-20251026&t=1061&akid=9733%2E5885482%2Es5V9YB ]Headline: NYC business leaders drop $3 million over 2 days into mayoral
race in bid to stop Mamdani

The stakes? Sky-high. That’s why Our Revolution is going all-in to elect
Zohran Mamdani – knocking doors, talking to as many voters as we can
face-to-face, and running three phone banks a week to fight back.

We are in an all-out sprint – doing everything humanly possible to win
this race. But while Cuomo’s machine is fueled by billionaire donors
desperate to try to drown out the people’s voice in this final stretch, we
have something stronger: you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251026nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9733%2E5885482%2Es5V9YB ]We’re counting on grassroots supporters to power this fight to the very
end. Please, rush a donation right now to help us go toe-to-toe with
Cuomo’s big money and WIN this race for the people.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

In the final sprint to election day, corporate PACs, real estate
lobbyists, Big Oil, and Wall Street titans are throwing everything they
have at the race – including two separate $1 million checks from Trump
ally and Airbnb co-founder Joe Gebbia, and another from hedge fund mogul
Bill Ackman.

These are some of the biggest, dirtiest donations yet, and they send one
chilling message: billionaires think they can still buy this election. We
cannot – and will not – let them.

We’re down to the last nine days. And now the airwaves are being FLOODED
with Cuomo’s super PAC dollars, doing ANYTHING they can to stop voters
from electing Mamdani.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?source=email-20251026&t=1060&akid=9733%2E5885482%2Es5V9YB ]Headline: Pro-Cuomo PAC launches six-figure anti-Sliwa effort,
targeting Russian-speaking voters

They may have the dark money billionaires, but we have the people.

And every single day, we have to fight back harder – with people power,
not corporate cash. Your donation today will put canvassers on the
streets, print flyers to put in voters’ hands, and fuel phone banks
reaching a critical mass of undecided voters who will decide this race.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251026nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9733%2E5885482%2Es5V9YB ]This is it – the final sprint. Every single dollar means six more
conversations with voters. Every hour counts. Rush a donation right now to
help Our Revolution fight back against Cuomo’s billionaire machine and
power Mamdani to victory.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

---
|

Peter,
This past week Lauren Boebert began propagating a new conspiracy that House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY) is a non-human reptilian.
Her theory draws upon the ideas of Holocaust denier David Icke who claims that Jews and many powerful people across the globe are a disguised reptilian species that are working to exterminate humanity.
Boebert and the far right deploy conspiracies like this to dehumanize and otherize their enemies.
Ask any historian and they will tell you -- dehumanization paves the way for human rights violations, war crimes, and genocide:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1XBiAia45jk3p0LD38RvYH3bdRovP34e3d7cz4eMkBvolpx7sHdrJ8yKgXzhwqpHv6z0Qhn8z51CYZYRiNtaNCAvwzHIr3sC4F6ylRKwJlyEyGbHaDfJVCMlPqJGCRFT_xY5eJ_T3okHseyxDgxGirumFdrJnKF_3O7InYkVXjSBB8Eb_O4p4Cx4_CTzI-konBl_yCH92WcpE5AxVRSZs00s8hqIlQYyysJOT2ddKg=&c=D1cnRSM2yI9sCgcJxJc3-XUtWboDNyy5ZORav4_ByLi4shdgynWi_Q==&ch=rJiPNxJ6DGLiRXqp2foR4SyuZWi2SoJpjiaBfUUfZLA_N43MB2nSRw==)
---
There is no difference between the images on the left and the right.
---
The vast majority of human beings have an innate disinclination towards violence against their fellow man. Dehumanization helps regular people overcome this. When you think of your enemies as inhuman it is easier to commit violence against them.
This is why Trump is saying that Democrats are gnats that must be crushed. It's why Boebert calls Trans people "demonic" and blames them for mass shootings. And it's why she is saying our leaders are reptilian. They are priming their base to accept violence against us.
This will get people killed.
Stopping the far-right's escalating violence starts with taking away Boebert's podium.
She is vulnerable. In 2022 she won by 546 votes and had to flee to a new district. In the new district, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in Colorado's 4th while Boebert massively underperformed Trump.
[To beat her we need thousands of Democrats from across the nation making small dollar contributions--they add up. Please can you make a monthly contribution of $25, $10, or even $5 to help us cut off Boebert's genocidal rhetoric, flip this district, and take back the House?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1XBiAia45jk3p0LD38RvYH3bdRovP34e3d7cz4eMkBvolpx7sHdrJ8yKgXzhwqpDqBGgiWbahIaLTPGSBToe3o683M3t7jnRbrRSLd1X3UogsxcWe5AApIJ9NCdR55_fXIfXxAPRMdMeGILV5csny7HmO6kdBOPDEIdo49zeF-TxsEju2fO5tJjA2VivGDMKtWUpat01mRMxorTNPwk8jPpYaXFjIjbVBPEP55qBLv32J0r3fK06g==&c=D1cnRSM2yI9sCgcJxJc3-XUtWboDNyy5ZORav4_ByLi4shdgynWi_Q==&ch=rJiPNxJ6DGLiRXqp2foR4SyuZWi2SoJpjiaBfUUfZLA_N43MB2nSRw==)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Katie’s whiteboard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Katie showed that by laying out the facts on something as simple as a whiteboard, you can get results.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40316%2E3422442%2E7DDND1)
Peter,
Remember Katie Porter’s whiteboard?
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251026_1_ak.gi38ct&refcode=em20251026-40316&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40316%2E3422442%2E7DDND1)
To some, it might seem like a simple classroom tool, but for Katie**it was a powerful way to speak truth to power.**
Katie used her whiteboard in Congress to expose everything from banking fraud to CEOs underpaying their staff to Big Pharma jacking up the price of life saving medication. She showed that by laying out the facts on something as simple as a whiteboard, you can get results.
The challenges California faces are big, but they aren’t complicated. The economy is set up to benefit CEOs and billionaires while the rest of us get left behind. Katie knows how to expose these simple truths and fight for real change.
Now she’s running for governor to keep up that fight: holding powerful interests accountable, lowering costs, and making California work for us all.
**[A donation, just like the whiteboard, is a simple yet powerful way to make a real difference for our campaign. Can you donate $5 today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251026_1_ak.gi38ct&refcode=em20251026-40316&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40316%2E3422442%2E7DDND1)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251026_1_ak.gi38ct&refcode=em20251026-40316&t=23&akid=40316%2E3422442%2E7DDND1)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251026-40316&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40316_3422442_7DDND1&akid=40316%2E3422442%2E7DDND1)**
---

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump's revenge camapign against Democratic fundraising
body:
Trump's assault on Democracy continues to escalate, and now he's coming after the BACKBONE of Democratic fundraising... that's not a coincidence.
We launched an emergency $25,000 response fund to ENSURE Democrats have the resources needed to FIGHT. Join us in standing up for our shared values - chip in any amount now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=102625_1]
FIRST: Trump tried to overturn the election, fueled an insurrection, and installed loyalists across government to shield himself from accountability.
NEXT: He sent the military into various American cities to SQUASH protests and TERRORIZE citizens exercising their First Amendment rights
THEN: He TORE THE EAST WING OF THE WHITE HOUSE DOWN to build himself a tacky golden Ballroom, with NO permits an NO permission
NOW: He’s targeting ActBlue with an Executive Order that instructs the DOJ to target and investigate it.
DO YOU SEE WHAT'S HAPPENING HERE???
ActBlue is the infrastructure that powers everyything from school board races to the fight to flip the House. It’s the tool MILLIONS of grassroots donors use to fight for reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, climate action, and more.
And Trump has declared war on it.
We launched an emergency $25,000 response fund to push back. If we don’t act now, the right will see our silence as weakness. Chip in $15 or more to show we will not be silenced, defunded, or dismantled. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=102625_1]

The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Team Powered by People
subject: Bad news for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Voter registration in Texas just declined by 135,000 people—the biggest drop in more than a decade. _That’s bad news for democracy._
This is on purpose and by design. Texas Republicans went into overdrive to pass laws to aggressively purge voter rolls. While these purges are supposed to target people who have moved or passed away, **eligible voters are too often wrongly removed—making it harder for them to have their voice heard.**
That’s why the work we do at Powered by People is more important than ever. Our volunteers are out in communities registering voters, helping them check their registration status, and making sure they know when and how to vote.
Republicans try to make voting harder, but we know democracy only works when _everyone_ has a voice. And unlike billionaires funding the opposition, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep this organizing work going.
[**Can you chip in $3 today to help us fight this voter suppression, get boots on the ground, and make sure every eligible voter in Texas can show up and be heard?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251026.UYLBlF&refcode=ema20251026-240423&amount=3&t=2&akid=240423%2E444211%2EWt6bLt)

Team Powered by People

subject: We’ve done the math…

body:
For just $4.59, you can LOCK IN another vote to SAVE New York!
| Fellow Patriot,
---
The polling is clear: Radical Communist Zohran Mamdani’s lead is shrinking as we get closer to Election Day.
---
**If we flood the ballot boxes with enough Republican votes between the start of early voting on October 25th and 9 P.M. on November 4th, he can be defeated.**
---
Since the fate of New York hangs in the balance, I’m leaving no stone unturned!
---
Per _Politico_ :
---
**“New York City Republican voters are going to be hearing from Rep. Elise Stefanik. The potential gubernatorial candidate is the face of a get-out-the-vote effort for Big Apple Republicans... Stefanik and the New York GOP are targeting Republican voters who turned out in the 2024 presidential election, but have _not_ cast ballots in mayoral elections.”**
---
My team has done the math: For roughly every **_$4.59_** we raise, we can get another likely Republican voter to the polls on or before Election Day and ensure their ballot is counted.
---
Trust me, it’s not easy or cheap to turn out voters like this. But the cost of failure is far greater.
---
**Not only will Mamdani impose his Marxist agenda on New York, but he’ll use his victory as a springboard to seek higher office...**
---
_...Just like how an unknown left-wing community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama emerged from the shadows in 2004 – and just 4 years later, was sitting in the White House!_
---
Democrats already see Mamdani as the next Obama. In fact, Obama is calling him to offer advice and serve as his mentor.
---
Knowing what you know now, wouldn’t you gladly give $4.59 to _STOP_ Obama’s rise to power?
---
Well, this is your chance: There’s no better way to STOP Mamdani’s communist takeover than to lock in another vote to help SAVE New York, Fellow Patriot.
---

_“Of course there will be families that are going to suffer... but it is one of the few leverage times we have.”_
Let that sink in.

After almost a month into a government shutdown, with **800,000 federal workers furloughed** , Democrats are **bragging** that American families’ pain is just a _bargaining chip_ to them.

They don’t see struggling parents.

They see “leverage.”

This isn’t compassion. It’s cruelty.

Democrats are demanding **$1.5 trillion** in so-called “health-care funding” that Republicans know includes provisions for _illegal immigrants_. President Trump and House Republicans are standing firm — and I’m with them.

_We will not cave.
We will not pay for open-border welfare.
We will not let Democrats weaponize suffering to fund their radical agenda._

**But we need to hold the line together.**

Every day this shutdown drags on, the Left spends millions online to spin their narrative. We can’t let them dominate the airwaves unchallenged.

clean_body: Democratic Whip Katherine Clark just admitted what we’ve all known deep down | Fellow patriot, House Democratic Whip Katherine Clark just admitted what we’ve all known deep down — and it’s gone viral with over 5 million views: “Of course there will be families that are going to suffer... but it is one of the few leverage times we have.” Let that sink in. After almost a month into a government shutdown, with 800,000 federal workers furloughed , Democrats are bragging that American families’ pain is just a bargaining chip to them. They don’t see struggling parents. They see “leverage.” This isn’t compassion. It’s cruelty. Democrats are demanding $1.5 trillion in so-called “health-care funding” that Republicans know includes provisions for illegal immigrants. President Trump and House Republicans are standing firm — and I’m with them. We will not cave. We will not pay for open-border welfare. We will not let Democrats weaponize suffering to fund their radical agenda. But we need to hold the line together. Every day this shutdown drags on, the Left spends millions online to spin their narrative. We can’t let them dominate the airwaves unchallenged. The Democrats have made their priorities clear. Now it’s time we make ours louder. For Texas and for America, Beth Van Duyne | | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Here’s how we strengthen democracy at all levels of government
body:
Elections are coming up Tuesday Nov 4 and I’m endorsing local public servants. | | |
---
Friend, Right now, a lot of people look at our federal government and feel powerless. But we can have a huge impact by electing more progressive leaders at the local and state level. These positions are powerful, and we need to fill them with grassroots champions for the people who’ll fight back against fascism. With Election Day coming up in a little over one week—on Tuesday, November 4th—I’ve endorsed numerous local candidates who need our support. Today I’m lifting up two dedicated public servants running for office in my district:
* **Lisa Hicks-Clayton, who’s running for re-election as the Treasurer of Dearborn Heights.** In addition to managing a local food pantry, she regularly runs food, clothing, and school supply drives for people in need. She’s dedicated to transparency, holding frequent office hours and meeting with constituents to support them with financial assistance and financial literacy.
* **Stacy Jackson, who’s running for Southfield City Council.** She has founded and collaborated with local organizations to support renters’ rights, prevent home foreclosures, end gun violence, and uplift Black women. If elected, she’ll listen to and prioritize people’s needs. I got to join Stacy last week as she knocked on doors in her community, where her love for her city’s residents shone brightly:

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtQhnH0-JwGUJhHAp7pimN6WyWfIv5f8rB_vm8VkMcwQ1NZktCmg7m-QRTwgpyQ0LO4xOPLGsacxuOBq0MxlDcZzzol1wIc12DfTjiqgLmtXDUaXxVXLVOnzbgQ60gZwvL5SbkI-PjhyOzPxHfDitvciUVVe1En5nuTsbbe-BuuJSMHKWTCBL_jIKKd2bUQKvsBbaRcjF5bUkbTpoABp-LNXsl8wwVfxJXSZBQp5TBHFYyearxoKRpeSyZ1d0LvnzemwifMsd948XGjEhVliu7r0-1b06c0jgXLAYwZG9DcpJQMl0vE7mehPzROAUuhslBKDyuOWjdaY_l_6HgS63l8z66lCFDtJJ24nZtPzS2sLtBJkB21g5Qwf1rhyN9E0-l/4l2/wdv9VJWpQKOlYlRdNq6kNw/h0/h001.a4Zb3lLtZILfbVmP3g4A_KkkaHMXxssH9FzN01GKZjI) **With just over one week left until Election Day, voters have absentee ballots in hand right now, and early in-person voting has begun in many Michigan communities. Stacy and Lisa are running in competitive races and need our support in this crucial final push.** [**Can you help these grassroots people-powered champions serve their communities and deepen our democracy? From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Oct 25, 2025
Subject: Here’s how we strengthen democracy at all levels of government
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Did you know that local and state elections are coming up soon? Don’t forget to vote on or by November 4th!
In this time of federal gridlock, we’ve got to lift up champions for the people at all levels of government. We need more elected leaders who are rooted in their communities, and who will strengthen our democracy through deeply listening to their constituents.
So I’m proudly endorsing progressive leaders running for public office at the local level, where they can make huge impacts in our communities. [**Today I want to highlight two people-powered candidates running in my district who need our support:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtQhnH0-JwGUJhHAp7pimN6aNdq843kqIk1gUv7CU13BcfGnSLZOwtsMa0_kZJZOc8GLvJpOMe48veAcJLgduqwLTt56WXGsbD_jSil-TTOsKyR3IVlH1p8tgicMRscSAUnIjvH9gEWyqPPEQLnFluOlm6kjT6Ms-9e4C6O7zCHy0f8vejfb7n2el9Z3Toi11Z2nj1juOKrtprvdBTTPFIop0gFqW99Y7Xb3Vkz3KK8EUtx0_wq4GrRHi3pvoUQIgYthtkMCH7NCUMYxrR9IBLrCvCUEoeZ1OXRb-34BE0oVjY061LD2eVo-dPrFJavkpIpJiQytWrhUyGZrH7IZ5Y0Jt9OF3mYoqRv0LIHpGwFAg6rief8anWgQGESj7os2da/4l2/wdv9VJWpQKOlYlRdNq6kNw/h8/h001.vmFg08ELcoLjMeO_9p7kZX-QZGOgk6E4ys8J8vGc0NA)
**Stacy Jackson, who’s running for Southfield City Council to be a voice for the people.** She’s been a grassroots leader serving her community for years as a champion for housing rights, equity and social justice, ending gun violence, better infrastructure, and a more responsive government. When I joined Stacy to knock on doors last week, her love for Southfield residents shone through as she spoke with her neighbors:
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtQhnH0-JwGUJhHAp7pimN6bwaxNnX22ZasX_94rZBvDS4bH1VgVMnvS00y-dbxrzdUJ_YtTooMswIuzjbS3PFs4RyMLZk5Uh6SM0wJhkPgV3bwXm12UDNZIxrsUcxL3Pehjgl7oDhs0t6HVogEocMJtuVa--9NrDu-gljWut4CUhUs9aSUJcJbquTELt1m7spRJEF4orbF2oWRC3SaMyRZUe5bZwJ8sWAbch4fyJXTK_9zgF3A1Dq3_0Vv4xRem-pIXOTICfunXnaPnPGilGq8bx5QGANeO1Ttk9ICwQhRbU54CBemuYhDHuMbWYrmbVopCPyz3ONPvScVVlegkWPjwgTU8kj2k_QqJUeoVFeKjRcp8TpUOKUiFeQzW5b1k6c/4l2/wdv9VJWpQKOlYlRdNq6kNw/h9/h001.-RSnmj-cVDOcIBsSTTQ6D1frlxHh5NUCMdXaif5Auwg)
**I’m also proud to endorse Lisa Hicks-Clayton, who’s running for re-election as the Treasurer of Dearborn Heights**. Lisa goes above and beyond to serve her community, including running food, clothing, and school supply drives for people in need. She regularly holds office hours and constituent service days, helping thousands of constituents with tax and water assistance, home foreclosure prevention, and free financial literacy programs.

Like me, Stacy Jackson grew up in Southwest Detroit and experienced environmental injustice firsthand. She’s lost relatives to health issues due to pollution, which sparked her passion for environmental justice. If elected, she’ll be a much-needed fighter for our rights—from our right to clean water and air, to healthcare and education, and constitutional rights such as free speech.
A fighter for working families, Lisa Hicks-Clayton has been endorsed by unions like AFSCME Michigan and the Michigan Regional Council of Carpenters and Millwrights. Lisa also serves the people as a food pantry manager who delivers food to people who are home-bound, and as a board member for two local organizations: the Western Wayne County NAACP and the Dearborn-Dearborn Heights League of Women Voters.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtQhnH0-JwGUJhHAp7pimN6cFmNzQ6AVLc4muH1FR7yX4cneOxWEXhJg4dSxqPVy4qyVqCYczq5XsmDdQctpPHyaXI97NaNHaKrDi80IgF-qhb8YQM8lvNH-ND0t206Wdsxzjpyw8U-BzsFRMz0LueoEymM6Crcl1HjsAUAhJ1Jojx6CUQIAuGcX51NVXSL_7kLIef_4yeVB122RLz_Ie1PLHIERdNcv4hWcsJ0eJmkDUiOf-UNL5497wstvRl8Yz-DQdT0Jlisu1ywK37T8synAKO1bl75BuN248E7hd9_dPEY1th_U_kL6bZSAw_2hOe7qeiMSMD0dHKtY8XNJfOKMeaSpEbhYszSdwZt3fPFr_osJeqpitNuxOzDSaE1PB7/4l2/wdv9VJWpQKOlYlRdNq6kNw/h18/h001.HE5yXjOo-R6IG3cAXGbHnsgB6xgGqyBOXouftpKkM9E)
_Photo of Lisa Hicks-Clayton_
In addition, Lisa has done such a great job as treasurer that the Wayne County Treasurers Association elected her President, and the Michigan Municipal League selected her to join their intensive training program for elected women leaders.
**Both Lisa and Stacy are the fighters for the people that our communities need and deserve. With a little over one week left until Election Day, and with absentee ballots in voters’ hands and early in-person voting available in many MI communities, these candidates urgently need our support.**

clean_body: Elections are coming up Tuesday Nov 4 and I’m endorsing local public servants. | | | Friend, Right now, a lot of people look at our federal government and feel powerless. But we can have a huge impact by electing more progressive leaders at the local and state level. These positions are powerful, and we need to fill them with grassroots champions for the people who’ll fight back against fascism. With Election Day coming up in a little over one week—on Tuesday, November 4th—I’ve endorsed numerous local candidates who need our support. Today I’m lifting up two dedicated public servants running for office in my district: Lisa Hicks-Clayton, who’s running for re-election as the Treasurer of Dearborn Heights. In addition to managing a local food pantry, she regularly runs food, clothing, and school supply drives for people in need. She’s dedicated to transparency, holding frequent office hours and meeting with constituents to support them with financial assistance and financial literacy. Stacy Jackson, who’s running for Southfield City Council. She has founded and collaborated with local organizations to support renters’ rights, prevent home foreclosures, end gun violence, and uplift Black women. If elected, she’ll listen to and prioritize people’s needs. I got to join Stacy last week as she knocked on doors in her community, where her love for her city’s residents shone brightly: With just over one week left until Election Day, voters have absentee ballots in hand right now, and early in-person voting has begun in many Michigan communities. Stacy and Lisa are running in competitive races and need our support in this crucial final push. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Stacy Jackson and Rooted in Community PAC. If you'd like to donate to Lisa Hicks-Clayton, please mail checks made out to Committee to Elect Lisa Hicks-Clayton for Treasurer to: Rashida Tlaib for Congress, PO Box 32777, Detroit, MI 48232 | | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Please feel free to read more about Lisa and Stacy in the email I sent out yesterday, and don’t forget to vote in your local election before or on November 4th! With you in the fight for a better future, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Oct 25, 2025 Subject: Here’s how we strengthen democracy at all levels of government To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Did you know that local and state elections are coming up soon? Don’t forget to vote on or by November 4th! In this time of federal gridlock, we’ve got to lift up champions for the people at all levels of government. We need more elected leaders who are rooted in their communities, and who will strengthen our democracy through deeply listening to their constituents. So I’m proudly endorsing progressive leaders running for public office at the local level, where they can make huge impacts in our communities. Stacy Jackson, who’s running for Southfield City Council to be a voice for the people. She’s been a grassroots leader serving her community for years as a champion for housing rights, equity and social justice, ending gun violence, better infrastructure, and a more responsive government. When I joined Stacy to knock on doors last week, her love for Southfield residents shone through as she spoke with her neighbors: I’m also proud to endorse Lisa Hicks-Clayton, who’s running for re-election as the Treasurer of Dearborn Heights. Lisa goes above and beyond to serve her community, including running food, clothing, and school supply drives for people in need. She regularly holds office hours and constituent service days, helping thousands of constituents with tax and water assistance, home foreclosure prevention, and free financial literacy programs. Both Lisa and Stacy are committed to building trust in government through transparency. We need them and leaders like them in government! But they’re running in competitive races, and with people voting right now by absentee ballot and early in-person voting, they urgently need our support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Stacy Jackson and Rooted in Community PAC. If you'd like to donate to Lisa Hicks-Clayton, please mail checks made out to Committee to Elect Lisa Hicks-Clayton for Treasurer to: Rashida Tlaib for Congress, PO Box 32777, Detroit, MI 48232 | | | | | | | | | Like me, Stacy Jackson grew up in Southwest Detroit and experienced environmental injustice firsthand. She’s lost relatives to health issues due to pollution, which sparked her passion for environmental justice. If elected, she’ll be a much-needed fighter for our rights—from our right to clean water and air, to healthcare and education, and constitutional rights such as free speech. A fighter for working families, Lisa Hicks-Clayton has been endorsed by unions like AFSCME Michigan and the Michigan Regional Council of Carpenters and Millwrights. Lisa also serves the people as a food pantry manager who delivers food to people who are home-bound, and as a board member for two local organizations: the Western Wayne County NAACP and the Dearborn-Dearborn Heights League of Women Voters. Photo of Lisa Hicks-Clayton In addition, Lisa has done such a great job as treasurer that the Wayne County Treasurers Association elected her President, and the Michigan Municipal League selected her to join their intensive training program for elected women leaders. Both Lisa and Stacy are the fighters for the people that our communities need and deserve. With a little over one week left until Election Day, and with absentee ballots in voters’ hands and early in-person voting available in many MI communities, these candidates urgently need our support. Thank you so much for supporting progressive champions at all levels of government. Together, we’re building a more inclusive, responsive, and representative democracy where everyone has what they need to thrive. name: Red wedding
subject: In 9 days, MAGA plot in PA will crown Trump King
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Last weekend's No Kings Day Protests matter because MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R7l5V3ia_ztYr1xtz2km-F6u3fceT4yo0SePeBkH7xuT43DcutyttnYLjHRtUGW8c4pu2AL-nUraa_tLVZSfB8zYy2rrb1zHXA0lyHP8sRCkm2dcVzinCPxxsX7NWJHJaQsi_hTayYXt7CHEzvOvpgvUEDEomFHQHiD7pR5ejGVna61NWhJ7kgFWQXKxfgsVF0zIJwByP9CGvWy6Nm-dVBplhnJPRu0LVwaR25_CCRs=&c=YMS71U-xG-SjBMojf7SOCIXLyNn2i_X5eBWDFwbjNJM1MSajJCM3sQ==&ch=96jsLqygJno9YkKbBi7xmJHDRHYLlaP9-11UuDPkfpBNx5CfkHFQaA==)
---
| Peter,
MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot.
Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention races are usually sleepy affairs. Rare elections that happen only once every 10 years, Justices up for retention hardly ever lose, and both Democrats and Republicans have strayed from spending big in these elections.
But this November's PA Supreme Court retention race is different. Lulled into a false sense of safety assuming that the 3 Democrats on PA's Supreme Court up for retention would face no danger, Democrats let their guard down--unaware that MAGA was plotting a sinister "Red Wedding" style ambush behind their backs:
---

It's all part of Trump's plot to consolidate power and name himself king.
If Trump eliminates the three Democrats off of PA's Supreme Court, he can install puppets loyal to him on the court responsible for overseeing elections in the most crucial swing state in America. This would allow him to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--suppressing Democrat votes, decreeing mail-in ballots illegal, and even prevent Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether.

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/37702ac4-c951-4fd5-989c-01ecab7c86c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The media's hysterical reaction to President Donald Trump's White House ballroom project is the latest example of their reflexive opposition to anything Trump decides to do, regardless of its merit or harmlessness.
Critics clutching their pearls over the East Wing renovation conveniently ignore that bold presidential modifications to the White House aren't just common--they're essential to keeping our nation's executive residence functional and relevant.
* * *
**Become a PolitiBrawl member today and enable our bold, unfiltered coverage of American politics. Support what we do:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KntZuh8N7oK3oS3s4IMuOq8kX_2VPmjsZjqpISDF898?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177182113)
* * *
Trump's grand ballroom is entirely precedented when looking back at history. Theodore Roosevelt didn't apologize when **[he"demolished" greenhouses and stables to build the West Wing in 1902.](https://substack.com/redirect/2d4235fb-11f1-46a6-86be-b9a1bea75cda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Harry Truman didn't seek permission from preservationists when he **[completely gutted the White House interior](https://substack.com/redirect/b9a680eb-dd25-4ae0-91fc-9b6e776137d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** between 1948 and 1952, leaving only the exterior walls standing. Franklin Roosevelt constructed the entire East Wing in 1942--the very structure now being replaced--amid wartime controversy and accusations of using the project to "bolster his presidency's image."
William Howard Taft **[created the first version of the iconic Oval Office](https://substack.com/redirect/5abde695-ec79-4245-b930-e03e13a80319?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in 1909. Woodrow Wilson demolished the colonial garden to modernize it with a rose garden. Richard Nixon converted a swimming pool into the press briefing room. Each generation of leadership has adapted the White House to meet contemporary needs, often facing criticism, but leaving their imprint on the residence regardless, as is their right as president.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
# [The Tinnitus Frequency That's Driving Your Brain Crazy](https://substack.com/redirect/54a7f325-1241-4712-a45e-aab08697fd41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/54a7f325-1241-4712-a45e-aab08697fd41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/54a7f325-1241-4712-a45e-aab08697fd41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
While other presidents might have spent years navigating bureaucratic quicksand, submitting to endless reviews by preservation boards and planning commissions, Trump recognized that this approach would doom the project to death by a thousand papercuts. Consider that a modest fence upgrade after a 2014 security breach required five public meetings over two years. The Eisenhower Memorial, authorized by Congress in 1999, didn't open until 2020--a project that took longer to complete than it took Eisenhower to plan and execute D-Day.
Trump has again demonstrated decisive leadership, cutting through the red tape that shouldn't be there in the first place, and paralyzes American infrastructure innovation. Even prominent Democrats have begun acknowledging **[their party's obsession with process over results,](https://substack.com/redirect/4588e29f-bacd-4890-be2f-80408913808b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the Washington Post noted, exemplified by California's high-speed rail cluster f***--approved by voters in 2008 and still nowhere near completion or under budget.
The practical need for Trump's ballroom is also pretty clear, though critics prefer manufactured outrage to honest judgement. The current State Dining Room seats 140 people. The East Room accommodates about 200. For state dinners honoring world leaders, the administration must erect tents on the South Lawn and provide porta-potties for VIPs. This is absurd and wrong for the world's most powerful nation. Trump's new ballroom will seat 999 guests in proper dignity--and the next Democratic president will be grateful for it, even if they won't admit it publicly.
Here's what really drives the critics mad: Trump is paying for it himself. The $300 million project is entirely privately financed, with $350 million raised from donors including Apple, Lockheed Martin, Amazon, and Comcast. Not one taxpayer dollar will fund this transformative upgrade. Yet somehow, the same voices demanding government efficiency and private sector partnership now condemn exactly that approach when Trump delivers it.
The fundamental question isn't whether the White House should change--history proves it must--but whether it should remain a living, breathing center of American governance or calcify into an untouchable museum. Every functional building requires modernization. The White House has been continuously updated with indoor plumbing, electricity, air conditioning, and security systems as technology evolved. Why should event space be different?
* * *
**Become a PolitiBrawl member today and enable our bold, unfiltered coverage of American politics. Support what we do:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KntZuh8N7oK3oS3s4IMuOq8kX_2VPmjsZjqpISDF898?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177182113)
* * *
Critics accuse Trump of "bulldozing history," but they ignore that the East Wing being replaced is itself less than a century old, built hastily during World War II. It's not the original White House. It's not even particularly historic architecture. It's a 1940s office building that has outlived its usefulness.
The manufactured outrage reveals the media's true priority: opposing Trump at any cost, even when he pursues reasonable objectives through innovative and cost effective means. Trump's ballroom project embodies exactly what Americans elected him to do: think big, cut through bureaucracy, leverage private sector resources, and modernize American institutions without burdening taxpayers.
The White House has always evolved. Trump is simply continuing that proud tradition, building boldly for America's future rather than bowing to those who would trap the progress of our nation's most important residence.

clean_body: The media's hysterical reaction to Trump's new White House ballroom project is the latest example of their reflexive opposition to anything Trump decides to do, regardless of its merit... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The media's hysterical reaction to Trump's new White House ballroom project is the latest example of their reflexive opposition to anything Trump decides to do, regardless of its merit... | | | Oct 26 | | | | | | | | | | | | Opinion: | | ---|---|--- The media's hysterical reaction to President Donald Trump's White House ballroom project is the latest example of their reflexive opposition to anything Trump decides to do, regardless of its merit or harmlessness. Critics clutching their pearls over the East Wing renovation conveniently ignore that bold presidential modifications to the White House aren't just common--they're essential to keeping our nation's executive residence functional and relevant. Become a PolitiBrawl member today and enable our bold, unfiltered coverage of American politics. Support what we do: Trump's grand ballroom is entirely precedented when looking back at history. Theodore Roosevelt didn't apologize when Harry Truman didn't seek permission from preservationists when he between 1948 and 1952, leaving only the exterior walls standing. Franklin Roosevelt constructed the entire East Wing in 1942--the very structure now being replaced--amid wartime controversy and accusations of using the project to "bolster his presidency's image." William Howard Taft in 1909. Woodrow Wilson demolished the colonial garden to modernize it with a rose garden. Richard Nixon converted a swimming pool into the press briefing room. Each generation of leadership has adapted the White House to meet contemporary needs, often facing criticism, but leaving their imprint on the residence regardless, as is their right as president. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) | | ---|---|--- (Piece continues) While other presidents might have spent years navigating bureaucratic quicksand, submitting to endless reviews by preservation boards and planning commissions, Trump recognized that this approach would doom the project to death by a thousand papercuts. Consider that a modest fence upgrade after a 2014 security breach required five public meetings over two years. The Eisenhower Memorial, authorized by Congress in 1999, didn't open until 2020--a project that took longer to complete than it took Eisenhower to plan and execute D-Day. Trump has again demonstrated decisive leadership, cutting through the red tape that shouldn't be there in the first place, and paralyzes American infrastructure innovation. Even prominent Democrats have begun acknowledging the Washington Post noted, exemplified by California's high-speed rail cluster f*--approved by voters in 2008 and still nowhere near completion or under budget. The practical need for Trump's ballroom is also pretty clear, though critics prefer manufactured outrage to honest judgement. The current State Dining Room seats 140 people. The East Room accommodates about 200. For state dinners honoring world leaders, the administration must erect tents on the South Lawn and provide porta-potties for VIPs. This is absurd and wrong for the world's most powerful nation. Trump's new ballroom will seat 999 guests in proper dignity--and the next Democratic president will be grateful for it, even if they won't admit it publicly. Here's what really drives the critics mad: Trump is paying for it himself. The $300 million project is entirely privately financed, with $350 million raised from donors including Apple, Lockheed Martin, Amazon, and Comcast. Not one taxpayer dollar will fund this transformative upgrade. Yet somehow, the same voices demanding government efficiency and private sector partnership now condemn exactly that approach when Trump delivers it. The fundamental question isn't whether the White House should change--history proves it must--but whether it should remain a living, breathing center of American governance or calcify into an untouchable museum. Every functional building requires modernization. The White House has been continuously updated with indoor plumbing, electricity, air conditioning, and security systems as technology evolved. Why should event space be different? Become a PolitiBrawl member today and enable our bold, unfiltered coverage of American politics. Support what we do: Critics accuse Trump of "bulldozing history," but they ignore that the East Wing being replaced is itself less than a century old, built hastily during World War II. It's not the original White House. It's not even particularly historic architecture. It's a 1940s office building that has outlived its usefulness. The manufactured outrage reveals the media's true priority: opposing Trump at any cost, even when he pursues reasonable objectives through innovative and cost effective means. Trump's ballroom project embodies exactly what Americans elected him to do: think big, cut through bureaucracy, leverage private sector resources, and modernize American institutions without burdening taxpayers. The White House has always evolved. Trump is simply continuing that proud tradition, building boldly for America's future rather than bowing to those who would trap the progress of our nation's most important residence. | | POLL What do you think? | ? ? ? body:
Time is running out to make a difference.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118037375/578448498/1328794144?refcode=ea.46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZDFhN2UxLTdmYjItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vi3Xg3aVb75bhwlE8_cXKdcJccc0n5K0NJTbYBkgZms=&emci=3dd1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
There are two possible scenarios waiting for us on November 4th. **Scenario #1:** Our endorsed climate champions sweep Virginia. We flip key seats in states like Pennsylvania, Georgia, and Colorado, electing leaders who'll fight Trump's fossil fuel agenda at every turn. These leaders immediately get to work, blocking new drilling permits, investing in clean energy, and protecting frontline communities from toxic pollution. They become the firewall that stops Donald Trump and the fossil fuel industry from putting corporate profits over the health of our communities and our planet. **Scenario #2:** We stay complacent. Big Oil’s endless spending floods the airwaves. Our candidates lose by razor-thin margins. And Donald Trump gets a blank check to gut more environmental protections and reward fossil fuel executives. **[I’m going all in to make sure our climate movement wins because lives are on the line. But I need you with me. My climate PAC is working to raise $50,000 online before the end of October to fund our final 9-day sprint to Election Day. Can I count on your donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118037376/578448499/2105508926?refcode=ea.46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZDFhN2UxLTdmYjItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vi3Xg3aVb75bhwlE8_cXKdcJccc0n5K0NJTbYBkgZms=)** | [**CHIP IN TODAY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118037377/578448500/2105508926?refcode=ea.46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZDFhN2UxLTdmYjItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vi3Xg3aVb75bhwlE8_cXKdcJccc0n5K0NJTbYBkgZms=)
