Here's why I know we can win: Since launching JanePAC, grassroots supporters like you have helped elect over **160 climate champions.** We've won in red states and blue states. We've defeated candidates backed by millions in Big Oil money.
_We know how to win._
But winning requires resources and people like you who truly understand the stakes. Because fossil fuel billionaires are counting on us to sit this out. They profit from a status quo that lets corporate polluters make billions while our communities pay the price with asthma, cancers, and poisoned air and water.
**We have shown over and over again that the many can beat the money.** And with just 9 days left until Election Day, every hour counts. Voters are already casting their ballots, and your donation right now helps fund the door-knocks, phone calls, texts, and digital ads that will decide the outcome of these races.
**This is our first major test since Trump took office — and our last major fundraising deadline before Election Day.**
**[I’ve been doing this work for decades. The wins keep me going. The losses still sting. I don’t want to wake up on November 5th wishing we’d done more, and I don’t want you to either. Can I count on you to help us reach our goal before our deadline on Friday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118037378/578448501/2105508926?refcode=ea.46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.46d1a7e1-7fb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ZDFhN2UxLTdmYjItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vi3Xg3aVb75bhwlE8_cXKdcJccc0n5K0NJTbYBkgZms=)**

clean_body: Time is running out to make a difference. | There are two possible scenarios waiting for us on November 4th. Scenario #1: Our endorsed climate champions sweep Virginia. We flip key seats in states like Pennsylvania, Georgia, and Colorado, electing leaders who'll fight Trump's fossil fuel agenda at every turn. These leaders immediately get to work, blocking new drilling permits, investing in clean energy, and protecting frontline communities from toxic pollution. They become the firewall that stops Donald Trump and the fossil fuel industry from putting corporate profits over the health of our communities and our planet. Scenario #2: We stay complacent. Big Oil’s endless spending floods the airwaves. Our candidates lose by razor-thin margins. And Donald Trump gets a blank check to gut more environmental protections and reward fossil fuel executives. = | = Here's why I know we can win: Since launching JanePAC, grassroots supporters like you have helped elect over 160 climate champions. We've won in red states and blue states. We've defeated candidates backed by millions in Big Oil money. We know how to win. But winning requires resources and people like you who truly understand the stakes. Because fossil fuel billionaires are counting on us to sit this out. They profit from a status quo that lets corporate polluters make billions while our communities pay the price with asthma, cancers, and poisoned air and water. We have shown over and over again that the many can beat the money. And with just 9 days left until Election Day, every hour counts. Voters are already casting their ballots, and your donation right now helps fund the door-knocks, phone calls, texts, and digital ads that will decide the outcome of these races. This is our first major test since Trump took office — and our last major fundraising deadline before Election Day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Sen. Ruben Gallego
subject: Why we're holding the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
My colleagues and I are standing up to protect 24 million Americans from massive premium increases. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118037473/578448915/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20251026_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGZkYjNiMTktODBiMi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OP1VU84OQVdbbHHKUYltAgg8y4pqyInE-aptjL3O9MA=)
---
Ruben Gallego here. We're about to enter the fifth week of the government shutdown. **Let's be clear: the shutdown sucks.** Nobody wants this. But we have to make tough choices right now, and I want you to understand what's at stake. If we let Republicans have their way, they will **DOUBLE** or **TRIPLE** health insurance premiums for **_24 million Americans_**. All to pay for billionaire tax breaks. That's not a partisan talking point. That's what's on the table. **This moment is about Democrats in Congress standing up for working people and their families.** Republicans have broken their promises before — we've seen it happen over and over again. That's why we need to use our leverage now to protect tens of millions of Americans from getting crushed by healthcare costs they can't afford. In my neighborhood in South Phoenix, I know families who are already struggling with the cost of everything — groceries, rent, gas. Doubling their health insurance premiums would be devastating. These are the people Republicans are willing to sacrifice to protect tax cuts for the wealthy. **I won't let that happen without a fight.** The Arizona Democratic Party understands what this shutdown fight is really about. They're organizing to hold Republicans across the state accountable and support candidates who will actually fight for working Arizonans. **Supporting the Arizona Democratic Party right now puts us in the best possible position to flip Republican-controlled seats statewide in 2026.** That's how we end this cycle of manufactured crises and start delivering real results for families. name: In This Together PAC HQ
subject: Andy stood up to anti-vax extremism once, and he can do it again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Staying silent isn't an option when it's our kids' health that's on the line.
Peter,

Right now, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is leading a movement that’s spreading fear and confusion, _not truth._

He’s questioning proven vaccine schedules, attacking science, and pushing dangerous conspiracy theories that put kids and families at risk.

For Gov. Andy Beshear, this isn't new. He's seen this playbook before, and he’s beaten it.

Back in 2019, Andy ran against Matt Bevin, one of the most outspoken anti-vaccine politicians in the country. Bevin said vaccines were “un-American.” He even bragged about taking his kids to chickenpox parties to deliberately expose them to the virus instead of vaccinating them — a reckless choice that put his own children and others in danger. But Andy stood up, fought back, and said enough was enough. He called out those extremist views for what they were: **Dangerous and out of touch with reality.**

_And Kentuckians agreed._

They came together and elected Andy, and since then, Andy's worked to make healthcare more accessible, to protect families, and to make sure facts, not fear, guide decisions about our health. But now, the same kind of dangerous misinformation is spreading nationwide. RFK Jr's campaign is giving new life to old lies and undermining the scientists, doctors, and parents who are doing their best to keep our communities safe.

We can't go back to a world where conspiracy theories carry more weight than science, where politicians play games with public health, and children are left unprotected. We've beaten this kind of extremism before, and with your help, we'll do it again. It's time to elect leaders who will hold this administration accountable and put our kids, families, and truth first — _always._

[**Can Andy count on you to chip in $5, or, anything you can, to help him fight back against this wave of misinformation and support candidates who believe in facts, decency, and progress? clean_body: Staying silent isn't an option when it's our kids' health that's on the line. Peter, Right now, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is leading a movement that’s spreading fear and confusion, not truth. He’s questioning proven vaccine schedules, attacking science, and pushing dangerous conspiracy theories that put kids and families at risk. For Gov. Andy Beshear, this isn't new. He's seen this playbook before, and he’s beaten it. Back in 2019, Andy ran against Matt Bevin, one of the most outspoken anti-vaccine politicians in the country. Bevin said vaccines were “un-American.” He even bragged about taking his kids to chickenpox parties to deliberately expose them to the virus instead of vaccinating them — a reckless choice that put his own children and others in danger. But Andy stood up, fought back, and said enough was enough. He called out those extremist views for what they were: Dangerous and out of touch with reality. And Kentuckians agreed. They came together and elected Andy, and since then, Andy's worked to make healthcare more accessible, to protect families, and to make sure facts, not fear, guide decisions about our health. But now, the same kind of dangerous misinformation is spreading nationwide. RFK Jr's campaign is giving new life to old lies and undermining the scientists, doctors, and parents who are doing their best to keep our communities safe. We can't go back to a world where conspiracy theories carry more weight than science, where politicians play games with public health, and children are left unprotected. We've beaten this kind of extremism before, and with your help, we'll do it again. It's time to elect leaders who will hold this administration accountable and put our kids, families, and truth first — always. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, In This Together PAC HQ | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Will you donate today to support In This Together's mission? = Paid for by In This Together PAC. InThisTogetherPAC.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Shri Thanedar is spending taxpayer money on TV ads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Representative Shri Thanedar — the do-nothing Democrat being challenged by
working-class progressive Donavan McKinney — is spending taxpayer dollars
on TV ads.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251026.vLn4uu&refcode=em20251026-37140&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37140%2E1203867%2Eg8bJ3h ]Tweet by Shane Goldmacher: Rep. Shri Thanedar (D-MI) is using taxpayer
House funds to run this TV ad about the shutdown... “Every American must
have affordable healthcare, and that’s why I’m fighting in Washington DC,
even if it means shutting this government down,” he says in it.

Instead of hiring caseworkers or legislative staff that could actually
help Detroit families, Shri is spending his taxpayer-funded office budget
on ads that boost his own political profile. Let’s be real: these are
basically taxpayer-funded campaign ads.

Don’t even get us started on the fact that he’s spending taxpayer dollars
on an ad about costs being too high...for taxpayers.

This isn't the first time Shri’s taken advantage of his budget to put
himself first. He has a history of running TV, radio, and other ads
(including gaudy billboards like this one) to boost his own fame while
Michigan suffers:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251026.vLn4uu&refcode=em20251026-37140&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37140%2E1203867%2Eg8bJ3h ]Photo of a Shri Thanedar billboard

Out-of-touch Democrats like Shri, who are more interested in vanity than
helping their working-class constituents, are exactly how our Party got
where it is today.

That’s why we've endorsed Donavan McKinney, a state representative running
to unseat Shri and bring real representation back to his neighbors in
MI-13.

Donavan is part of the next generation of Justice Democrats taking on
incumbents who refuse to fight for the working class with the vision and
urgency this moment demands. If we’re ever going to win Medicare for All,
a Green New Deal, or other big changes to level the playing field for
working families across our country, we need to elect leaders like Donavan
and send corporate shills like Shri packing.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251026.vLn4uu&refcode=em20251026-37140&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37140%2E1203867%2Eg8bJ3h ]Can you chip in $5 to Justice Democrats today to help us
support Donavan and the rest of our slate in their competitive primaries
next year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251026.vLn4uu&refcode=em20251026-37140&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37140%2E1203867%2Eg8bJ3h ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251026-37140-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37140_1203867_g8bJ3h&akid=37140%2E1203867%2Eg8bJ3h

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37140%2E1203867%2Eg8bJ3h

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Something I noticed...

body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for October, and I need to make sure you activate yours before the midnight deadline.

If we want to take back the Senate, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive rights, and the future of our courts are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Virginia is closing rapidly.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by My Faith Votes
body:
Urgent update:
| | | | |
---
|
---
Peter,
The Virginia governor’s race is razor-thin, with RealClearPolitics showing just a **3% difference** between the candidates in the latest poll. That margin could be as high as **95,700 votes** or as low as **82,800**. The difference between godly leadership and policies that ignore biblical values.

With **5.81 million registered voters** in Virginia, turnout on **November 4** could range from **2.76 to 3.19 million** , depending on whether voters show up like they did in **2017 (47.6%)** or **2021 (54.9%)**. Will they be informed? Will they be guided by faith?

My Faith Votes is focused on reaching **low-propensity Christian voters**. Those who are already registered, but don’t vote consistently, especially in off-year elections like this one. Many simply need a reminder, a reason, and a resource to act. That’s where we come in.

Thanks to our army of Action Partners, we’re already sending over **112,000 letters** to low-propensity Christian voters in Virginia and more are being written every day.

_But we must do more._

**Text messaging has been proven to boost turnout.** We want to follow up with those receiving letters and reach even more Christian voters across Virginia with a simple, powerful message and a link to our **Candidate Fact Sheet.**
[**Every dollar you give helps us reach more believers with truth and clarity.**](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=a9d1d1a9c1954749b9db8cbe40d47630&_e=lFvdzi6puIz6IA6b145LRsHMbmEWnakXtHkV-f0Uxgfq4Iaj3EdpWqj5CrD-1Gn3PhiALevhU1xYVx75r-DpYuti_s5ShcsP0CJKYwqTeLTTK9zqFqxDohAnmT-scWUXKzHc6t41AI2fQzMUYkb57QNm0SpBu-CSHWjH4kGIqQ8lAFg9TtHufFDABAJviYbhJxFXZq8Np1vPAN8Eg6ewvTFS7CF_jm824JO6c7zlWNM3FfPQ16vZ5NdL5FzE0iLNbhUnsqG2ATgPfx2_Jgan3p0kopkWtrZ9-bAOab3p0DwguXFbfQohmV2Uz1wZmECuVlKEp4bba9nD_abJEB5DTU8SA2gPFp97O3nYhKtmUAQWK5NCUBk8Y8AUGboN5TCEzrq1s-RT6Mz2HB1rhSErqivCSZjZOqjJ3_ecJfCjOYVp0pLPcvJ5KwYDTTSn3Cd1UZNQFGS91QacbXm20WcKajIVRHzinJU3ido9xfK_5Ee6I4AUm4n7pO2nCUO2l9rOaqJO5OBWY-W7N-C1HpueOY007RDRiJaiWuqmv05TfkBfuU7m4NkPuumtyd2cR4_xyezt6AemegHjVYnC0NaQ6N_edWHkJQ_1iBWevtrOgh-PMGHmgl_Cg9gkdQIkzJU6IMjxhEJHLOVQx6vWFG7dew%3D%3D)

subject: Anything?

body:
| We’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to make it to the top.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5062%2E35263%2EWjOXzh)
I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, Peter. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. **But I have to ask:[Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $10 between Tammy Baldwin and my Senate campaign in Ohio?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-em-brown.jsGxFu&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251026_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5062%2E35263%2EWjOXzh)** What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at _The Cook Political Report_ increased our odds of winning? What if I told you that _CNN_ and _The New York Times_ report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me? What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves – and that whether we’re able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you? **This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio’s Senate seat. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I am reaching out to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. I promise there is a good reason, and after you donate, I hope you’ll keep reading to find out more.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We can organize, mobilize, and reclaim our country.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9117%2E5257348%2EOXzBod)
I’ll be honest — **[I am reaching out to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. I promise there is a good reason, and after you donate, I hope you’ll keep reading to find out more.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20251026_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9117%2E5257348%2EOXzBod)**
We have an end-of-month deadline coming up in just over a week, and there is so much at stake right now.
Here are just _ten_ things that Trump is doing that are making our country less democratic, less safe, and less affordable:
**1\. Undermining trust in science and medicine:**
Trump is defunding our world-class scientific research institutions, shutting out international talent, and spreading misinformation about vaccines and the safety of medicine like Tylenol.
**2\. Slashing food assistance:**
He’s gutting the supplemental nutrition programs that keep millions of American families healthy and ensure our kids don’t go to bed hungry.
**3\. Abandoning our allies:**
Trump is weakening our international partnerships, cozying up with dictators, and making America less safe.
**4\. Sabotaging renewable energy:**
He’s killing clean energy projects, ceding global renewable energy leadership to China, raising utility bills, and making us more dependent on fossil fuels.
**5\. Damaging public health:**
He’s slashing funding for the National Institutes of Health (NIH) and key research programs, meaning cures will be delayed, clinical trials will end, and life-saving care will be harder to access.
**6\. Firing federal workers:**
The Trump administration has already fired over 50,000 federal workers in the first nine months of this administration, and pushed out over 200,000 federal workers in total.
**7\. Tanking the economy with tariffs:**
His trade wars are driving up the costs of everyday goods like clothes and groceries while alienating our allies.
**8\. Stripping away healthcare:**
Under Trump’s new budget, millions of Americans will lose healthcare coverage. Many rural clinics and hospitals will be forced to close, and all of our healthcare costs will go up.
**9\. Undermining the rule of law:**
Trump has been treating the Department of Justice as his own personal political weapon, using it to shield his allies and target his enemies.
**10\. Threatening our freedom of speech:**
Trump wants to decide who gets to speak their mind in this country and who gets punished for exercising their constitutional right to free speech.
So like I said, there is a _lot_ at stake these days — but I believe that together, we can take back our government and end this madness.
The GOP wants to overwhelm us and keep us from acting. But when we come together, we’re not powerless. We can organize, mobilize, and reclaim our country.
**[If you’re with me, please make a contribution before our October fundraising deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20251026_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=9117%2E5257348%2EOXzBod)**
Thanks for stepping up,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20251026_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=9117%2E5257348%2EOXzBod)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q42025_abs_em.Iv4c2K&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20251026_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=9117%2E5257348%2EOXzBod)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: This is about people’s lives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Hi team,

Right now, far-right extremists in Congress are putting health care funding on the chopping block.

If they get their way, critical programs for our seniors, veterans, and working families will face devastating cuts. That means fewer resources for cancer screenings, reduced prescription drug coverage, longer wait times at children’s hospitals, and less support for mental health care, among other things.

This is reckless, plain and simple. Our Jersey families deserve affordable healthcare and are counting on their leaders to find a solution, not to shut down the government.

In Congress, I’m fighting to lower costs and work towards true bipartisan progress, not gut the programs families count on. But I can’t do it alone. Can you chip in $ or anything you can right now to help me protect Jersey families and defend health care funding? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2510?amount=]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2510?amount=]

Let’s stand up to these threats together.

— Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

This isn't a rumor. Not speculation. These are facts the authorities are desperate to hide.

They mocked him for saying the pandemic started in a lab.

Now his latest warning is darker than anything before.

Leaked documents reveal: America’s seniors are quietly being pushed into danger—mysterious illnesses, sudden collapses written off as “normal aging,” and millions funneling into risky prescriptions while the truth remains hidden.

If you were born before **January 1, 1965** , this is your personal risk.

[Watch RFK Jr’s urgent 2025 warning before it disappears.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=001ecf41aa8a4deab02f10b450514f86&_e=VsH-wNAztTVe3eZtPUVwduBhmQCX2X8CUNfghf8WZ0bOpD2fs-qJ0OvTD1W4PqV8IGL5SRwpRsRH87MRPo36P65Kb20eVD641MP1hKXtK_OyMhLnv0z1EE8UG_60gvjG-5HEmC4271kjNt1uCU9GbY0X6sYbOg6XptRggvzScyaZnjfBlsieUzuEEuj2t0wQXTLN7lxCZizEa5Bc3VwmZ8VspzlC1OiSKxNWuWL3DvVoF-L3Ta4pABl-U_tz9yRn53UfkTwaGS8FdLVPhKiuDBEYXHjwwvYxn5XbgFXFPZrs8C0leL3pDzOJ4-c2py4HzFi3lkZqp9I06kA-34L5LqXp4h1ulmLsXhRr2z4ww4sVQQOw6WzEENvBgzL_Cm06bFcluq3quQBZmvTkJZzMEDqnc309GVEIbkad60DVbpPSdmFgV4CyfDR52BLJ6VVxmxGumvJOsbk84ihjfEu64ynJyxXn0PSvOHsMSOGcrr-2sr2W0T2hxKLOMWpzs9PvQxk6BKOuh8xUdgeuGKPrUkGcluY_ECHO467fkJWsAzuiBmyJbNJuXxqva2lu0e7g)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I don’t take this lightly, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Your trust in me means the world.
| | |
---
**It’s pretty clear that Donald Trump is afraid of me.**
Trump has publicly endorsed my opponent (after Jack shamelessly begged for his support). He’s attacked me by name in multiple, unhinged rants on social media. His administration _illegally leaked my private records_ to Jack’s campaign ally.
But Derek, Trump is even more afraid of the movement we’ve built together here in New Jersey — because if we win, we will send a powerful message to the nation that the people do not support his destructive and incompetent presidency.
That’s why he’s doing _everything he can_ to stop us from winning this upcoming election, and is rallying the support of his deep-pocketed allies to flood this race with spending against us.
**[Donald Trump knows that as governor, I’m going to do everything in my power to fight back against his disastrous agenda. But polling shows a neck-and-neck race, Derek, which means we absolutely can’t let Trump’s attacks go unanswered. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Chrissy Houlahan today to help me finish this race with the strength we need to win it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118039227/578453703/-551429629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1181-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmJjZjJkNS04NGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLlTkKtnoEpS7a6UFj4-TXj5TJoefNrJlq6PxofS1hc=)**

Derek, what happens here in New Jersey will set the tone for what happens in our nation in 2026, 2028, and beyond. It will show the nation whether we’re passively accepting Trump’s authoritarianism and his attacks on working families — or whether we’re fighting back and ready to lead in a new direction.
**[The fact is, we are far from guaranteed a victory here. The race is a toss-up, and if we’re going to win, we’ll have to earn it. So I’m calling on the support of my grassroots team for help in this final stretch. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Chrissy Houlahan to help me pull ahead of Jack?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118039241/578453729/-551429629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1181-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmJjZjJkNS04NGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLlTkKtnoEpS7a6UFj4-TXj5TJoefNrJlq6PxofS1hc=)**

I’m honored to have the endorsement of Congressman Eugene Vindman — a true patriot who stands up for his country. This week, Eugene and I hit the doors together, _talking with working families who want what every Virginian deserves_ :

* Affordable healthcare
* Safe workplaces

The message was clear: people are tired of being ignored. They want leaders who show up, listen, and fight for them. That’s exactly what I’m doing. This week, Eugene and I hit the doors together, talking with working families who want what every Virginian deserves : Higher wages Affordable healthcare Safe workplaces Better public schools The message was clear: people are tired of being ignored. They want leaders who show up, listen, and fight for them. That’s exactly what I’m doing. We’re building a movement powered by integrity and courage. But we can’t do it without you. name: Team Walz
subject: The weather’s getting chilly, but this campaign is heating up
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
Time’s flying, so we’re not wasting a second.
#
Hi Peter,
Did you see? Minnesota already got its first snow of the season!
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/95?t=1&akid=29%2E34582%2E-I6Vfb)
Winter will be here before you know it, and 2026 soon after. Time’s flying, **so we’re not wasting a second preparing to reelect Tim Walz next year.**
From International Falls to Rochester, Tim’s been a governor standing up for everyone. He’s bringing us together to make life better for all Minnesotans.
That’s how we fed kids in schools, expanded access to health care, passed paid family medical leave, and so much more. We know there’s more work to be done, which is why we’re reaching out today.
**[So while the weather is getting chilly, this campaign is only heating up. We’re reaching out to Minnesotans everywhere, but we need your help. Can you chip in $5 before our end-of-month deadline to reelect Tim in 2026?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251026.U7IuJD&amount=5&refcode=em20251026-29&t=2&akid=29%2E34582%2E-I6Vfb)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251026.U7IuJD&amount=5&refcode=20251026-29&t=21&akid=29%2E34582%2E-I6Vfb)**
Thank you,
Team Walz

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251026-29&t=22&refcode2=29_34582_-I6Vfb&akid=29%2E34582%2E-I6Vfb)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251026-29&t=23&refcode2=29_34582_-I6Vfb&akid=29%2E34582%2E-I6Vfb)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=29%2E34582%2E-I6Vfb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=29%2E34582%2E-I6Vfb)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

name: Fred Wellman
subject: About my announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
I can’t stand by and do nothing while our country is in danger
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6100?t=1&akid=5651%2E196590%2Ev71XL-)
---
Hi there,

My name is Fred Wellman. I served in the Army for 22 years and am now the host of the _On Democracy_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network. I’m excited to share some big news: **I’m the Democrat running for Congress in one of the most competitive swing districts in the nation.**

This isn’t the email I thought I’d be sending you today. But with the government shutdown and Ann Wagner doing nothing to fix it, we need leaders who will stand up and do whatever it takes to fix it. I’m done waiting.

[_**If you’re ready to join my campaign, can you split a donation of $25 today between The Long Run PAC and me to become one of our first 5,000 Founding Donors? If you want to learn more, please keep reading this.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6100?t=2&akid=5651%2E196590%2Ev71XL-)
| [DONATE NOW ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6100?t=3&akid=5651%2E196590%2Ev71XL-)
---
A Missouri native, I graduated from Kirkwood High School and then attended West Point. In the Army, I served as an aviator and later as a public affairs officer. For much of my career I led soldiers in combat, flew helicopters in Desert Storm and Iraq, and served as a spokesman for generals leading America’s toughest and most important fights.

After retiring from the Army, I kept looking for ways to serve, founding a public affairs firm to advocate for veterans and military families, volunteering at a field hospital in New York at the height of COVID, and working with the Lincoln Project in 2020 to help beat Trump. My oath to serve our country and uphold our Constitution is sacred and endures for life.

I returned home to Missouri four years ago and once again rolled up my sleeves to help organize the thousands of donations for refugees coming to St. Louis from Afghanistan as Kabul fell.

Now, I host the _On Democracy with FPWellman_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network, having key conversations about how to address rising authoritarianism, inequality, and Trump’s assault on our democracy.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6100?t=5&akid=5651%2E196590%2Ev71XL-)
**Meanwhile, my MAGA Congresswoman—Ann Wagner—is content to let Trump rule as a dictator. She has spent her entire career selling us out, ignoring her constituents, and getting richer. She hasn’t even bothered holding an open town hall in thirteen years.
In one of the most critical swing districts in the country, here in my home state of Missouri, this cannot continue.**

That’s why I’m running.

**Because working Americans are getting priced out of the American Dream.
Because our kids deserve the same rights, freedoms, and opportunities we had.
Because the time for sitting on the sidelines is over.**

After two decades in uniform, I know what it looks like to fight for this country. I watched brave men and women give everything to defend our freedoms, including two of my own soldiers in Desert Storm. Their sacrifice reminds me every day that democracy is worth fighting for.

Now Trump wants to crown himself America’s first king and Ann Wagner is helping him get there. They have taken healthcare away from millions, destroyed the economy, gutted the VA, politicized our national defense, and are ripping apart our democratic institutions piece by piece.

**I won’t stand by while they sell out working families. I’m a fighter – and I’m ready to take this fight to Washington. I know you are ready to fight too.**

[_**That’s why I’ll ask one more time, can you split a donation between The Long Run PAC and me to become one of the first 5,000 Founding Donors of our campaign?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6100?t=6&akid=5651%2E196590%2Ev71XL-)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6101?t=7&akid=5651%2E196590%2Ev71XL-)

clean_body: I can’t stand by and do nothing while our country is in danger | - Hi there, My name is Fred Wellman. I served in the Army for 22 years and am now the host of the On Democracy podcast on the MeidasTouch Network. I’m excited to share some big news: I’m the Democrat running for Congress in one of the most competitive swing districts in the nation. This isn’t the email I thought I’d be sending you today. But with the government shutdown and Ann Wagner doing nothing to fix it, we need leaders who will stand up and do whatever it takes to fix it. I’m done waiting. - | - A Missouri native, I graduated from Kirkwood High School and then attended West Point. In the Army, I served as an aviator and later as a public affairs officer. For much of my career I led soldiers in combat, flew helicopters in Desert Storm and Iraq, and served as a spokesman for generals leading America’s toughest and most important fights. After retiring from the Army, I kept looking for ways to serve, founding a public affairs firm to advocate for veterans and military families, volunteering at a field hospital in New York at the height of COVID, and working with the Lincoln Project in 2020 to help beat Trump. My oath to serve our country and uphold our Constitution is sacred and endures for life. I returned home to Missouri four years ago and once again rolled up my sleeves to help organize the thousands of donations for refugees coming to St. Louis from Afghanistan as Kabul fell. Now, I host the On Democracy with FPWellman podcast on the MeidasTouch Network, having key conversations about how to address rising authoritarianism, inequality, and Trump’s assault on our democracy. - Meanwhile, my MAGA Congresswoman—Ann Wagner—is content to let Trump rule as a dictator. She has spent her entire career selling us out, ignoring her constituents, and getting richer. She hasn’t even bothered holding an open town hall in thirteen years. In one of the most critical swing districts in the country, here in my home state of Missouri, this cannot continue. That’s why I’m running. Because working Americans are getting priced out of the American Dream. Because our kids deserve the same rights, freedoms, and opportunities we had. Because the time for sitting on the sidelines is over. After two decades in uniform, I know what it looks like to fight for this country. I watched brave men and women give everything to defend our freedoms, including two of my own soldiers in Desert Storm. Their sacrifice reminds me every day that democracy is worth fighting for. Now Trump wants to crown himself America’s first king and Ann Wagner is helping him get there. They have taken healthcare away from millions, destroyed the economy, gutted the VA, politicized our national defense, and are ripping apart our democratic institutions piece by piece. I won’t stand by while they sell out working families. I’m a fighter – and I’m ready to take this fight to Washington. I know you are ready to fight too. - | | | - | - | - | - | - I’ve got one tattoo. It says “I’m not done yet.” It was the theme of my Army retirement speech. Whenever I hit hard times and thought I was all but finished I remembered that line. I dusted myself off and got back in the fight. I’m not done yet. You’re not done yet. Missouri is not done yet. America is not done yet. Join me. —Fred Wellman Democratic Candidate for MO-2 * | | - Paid for by The Long Run PAC P.O. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: James Comey and I will be put on TRIAL the VERY SAME DAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Only one is INNOCENT!
Only one is INNOCENT!
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10264288/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvakZYUVRmRkFyVQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEwMjY/LbmNsTWxyU0c5OA/qP2hpZHM9bmNHTGRTRDZyc0JLeHZscw/gaP5KoA/s5k352ea769)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
I know this seems hard to believe...
---
_...But it’s the honest-to-God truth!_
---
**James Comey, the disgraced FBI Director who helped orchestrate one of the most vile witch hunts in history against President Trump, will go to TRIAL the __VERY_ _SAME_ _DAY__ that a Democrat Attorney General is making _me_ stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes.**
---
**This leftist Attorney General knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court. _You see, the deck is stacked!_ **
---
This day will truly be a split-screen moment for the history books:
---
_Comey, the _REAL_ criminal, and then yours truly, facing down the rest of my life in prison as an INNOCENT man. _
---
But in the end, this is what it’s all about for the Democrats... **_shameless vengeance_**.
---
President Trump and his administration are holding these Deep State crooks and thugs to account. Scoundrels like James Comey could _FINALLY_ face justice for their crimes!
---
And what is the Deep State doing in return? Trying to JAIL Rudy W. Giuliani.
---
Because if the Democrats can’t beat President Trump, their next best prize is to viciously prosecute his close friends and allies.
---
Look, as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ witch hunts, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
_**The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**_
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Patriot, just months out from the **TRIAL OF MY LIFE** , the situation I now find myself in is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
**That’s why I’m making a final plea, a Hail Mary, to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in these final months of what is no doubt the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

That’s why I’m making a final plea, a Hail Mary, to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. __ Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Hitting our end-of-month goal is critical
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251026-1592-foote&t=1001&akid=1592%2E342411%2ED_A_zg ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Here’s the truth: Trump’s fascist administration and MAGA extremists are
running wild, threatening our democracy, undermining our communities, and
putting people at risk.

That’s why the Squad Victory Fund is on the front lines, and why
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251026-movement.4ApMCz&refcode=em20251026-1592&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1592%2E342411%2ED_A_zg ]hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal is critical.

Every donation, every supporter, every click fuels the fight for
progressive change — pushing back against the far-right’s chaos.

Together, with the power of this grassroots team, we’re working to:

✅ Stop MAGA extremism — We’re fighting back against Trump’s attacks on our
democracy, holding extremists accountable, and making sure their
authoritarian moves don’t go unchecked.

✅ Advance bold progressive policies — From healthcare for all, to climate
action that protects our future, to fighting for racial and economic
justice, we’re advancing policies that put people over politics.

✅ Build grassroots power — Every supporter strengthens our movement and
empowers the Squad to fight on the ground and in Congress with unstoppable
force.

Our Squad doesn’t back down. We don’t play nice with fascists. And we
never stop fighting for the people.

We’ve crushed goals before — and we will again. But we cannot let up now.
Every moment we hesitate, Trump and his extremist allies try to seize more
power.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251026-movement.4ApMCz&refcode=em20251026-1592&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1592%2E342411%2ED_A_zg ]Will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund ahead of
Friday’s end-of-month deadline and help us hit our goal? Let’s show the
GOP what happens when we stand together.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251026-movement.4ApMCz&refcode=em20251026-1592&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1592%2E342411%2ED_A_zg ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1592%2E342411%2ED_A_zg

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| Peter,
MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot.
Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention races are usually sleepy affairs. Rare elections that happen only once every 10 years, Justices up for retention hardly ever lose, and both Democrats and Republicans have strayed from spending big in these elections.
But this November's PA Supreme Court retention race is different. Lulled into a false sense of safety assuming that the 3 Democrats on PA's Supreme Court up for retention would face no danger, Democrats let their guard down--unaware that MAGA was plotting a sinister "Red Wedding" style ambush behind their backs:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dFFG9zCN-Hj3U2FmlI7mGWtNg2lHuQGMbSJTKCe4U8rSiy_KSGANhUPUb_g1HivyXYdDk3DjoQdqPKsY8q8ZEfecXAzT2kErabbwryRqLQ9hqErX1ttp95aqzFH8VuSk0hrZOqXfxRIuQtihFXWvbDgpPelRFzjI0Lgmlcp1xPLgm3-UyNgbxSad-G-WkvgTINDPlR-1mv2fGxrbezP_rRrdNuDwVwU7Es7FqsxQJR8=&c=ipsPSfexGBBXKlDmTw0QWVD-joS5sLa_PWsy1pDKExQ9Qgm-z35R2w==&ch=saN6Bt_Kijo6D_lpJoO2VHpQWa-tENGGDGfLAuSyXO897Vl2It9C1A==)

| | | | In the dead of the night, billionaires under MAGA's banner launched a full out assault, spending millions of dollars in advertisements to convince PA voters to boot the Democratic justices off the court.
It's all part of Trump's plot to consolidate power and name himself king.
If Trump eliminates the three Democrats off of PA's Supreme Court, he can install puppets loyal to him on the court responsible for overseeing elections in the most crucial swing state in America. This would allow him to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--suppressing Democrat votes, decreeing mail-in ballots illegal, and even prevent Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether.
Having heard rumor of this plot from our "little birds" in the capital, Defend Our Courts has been rallying Democrats from across the nation to join in this battle since early summer. Having since raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the most powerful Democrat-aligned forces in this election.
But we need reinforcements from across the realm, MAGA's numbers are overwhelming and we can't hold out for much longer. If the election were held today, MAGA would win. But with 9 days left until the election, there is still hope we can turn the tide. Lulled into a false sense of safety assuming that the 3 Democrats on PA's Supreme Court up for retention would face no danger, Democrats let their guard down--unaware that MAGA was plotting a sinister "Red Wedding" style ambush behind their backs: | == | | | | In the dead of the night, billionaires under MAGA's banner launched a full out assault, spending millions of dollars in advertisements to convince PA voters to boot the Democratic justices off the court. It's all part of Trump's plot to consolidate power and name himself king. If Trump eliminates the three Democrats off of PA's Supreme Court, he can install puppets loyal to him on the court responsible for overseeing elections in the most crucial swing state in America. This would allow him to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--suppressing Democrat votes, decreeing mail-in ballots illegal, and even prevent Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether. Having heard rumor of this plot from our "little birds" in the capital, Defend Our Courts has been rallying Democrats from across the nation to join in this battle since early summer. Having since raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the most powerful Democrat-aligned forces in this election. But we need reinforcements from across the realm, MAGA's numbers are overwhelming and we can't hold out for much longer. If the election were held today, MAGA would win. But with 9 days left until the election, there is still hope we can turn the tide. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Democrats must rally together before PA falls and Trump declares himself King. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

Democratic Secretaries of State are already working to protect fair elections in states across the country. But they cannot fight this fight alone. They need resources now to keep democracy safe : legal support, public communication, and organizing power. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you for stepping up when our democracy needs it most, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Fellow American,

I met with President Trump at the White House this week to discuss the Schumer Shutdown and our ongoing fight to reopen the federal government.

Democrats continue to go on record, openly displaying their willingness to allow American families and our troops to suffer to get what they want: a radical agenda that Americans DID NOT VOTE FOR, and that includes hundreds of billions of dollars in free healthcare for illegal immigrants.

**Let me be clear:** We’re not going to allow Democrats to blackmail America. _**We’re standing firm.**_

clean_body: We’re not going to allow Democrats to blackmail America. | Fellow American, I met with President Trump at the White House this week to discuss the Schumer Shutdown and our ongoing fight to reopen the federal government. Democrats continue to go on record, openly displaying their willingness to allow American families and our troops to suffer to get what they want: a radical agenda that Americans DID NOT VOTE FOR, and that includes hundreds of billions of dollars in free healthcare for illegal immigrants. Let me be clear: We’re not going to allow Democrats to blackmail America. We’re standing firm. President Trump and I need you to stand with us! will let us know you have our backs, will help us continue putting the pressure on Democrats to adhere to the will of the American people, and will fund our fight to win a Senate majority that is immune to the Left’s obstructionist antics. Yours in the fight, Sen. Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: =?utf-8?Q?It=E2=80=99s_now_or_never?=
subject: In 9 days, the fate of Democracy will be decided in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Now with only 9 days to go, we are preparing our final surge—one last hail mary to try and prevent MAGA from seizing the court and Democracy from falling:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y1WxCX-d0t_5uDcaEutGoRhUWUFxpIjkUTMtgvH1Ih46zuv3e3broo4761_qsnIasY-XkcukAndtTal3PmEe86JDobQbR-iT9SMM1LXFsfckzNiVWTfM5Uu-AxJAc7CUZJl9kTck796NTpsXxr7MYi4ia4A_YWmcwN-WMmam5YbFmRqy3IwQxSEOSuk5Ct2vhF5bvdZGH-pMqOLqveV6gadkkLnIssEmmD-Qpmm4J4M=&c=FBag-IJLYwnG-OLlKGVCM2gnChJgzQtUu1M9L13ql4qkzpBEgVmd9A==&ch=kGa7gbsCrfCeqtqHvHXPgG1PFV8iwAf2yMXF2RrSHyW_sqxay89g0w==)
---
| Peter,
There are now only 9 days left until the most critical election of 2025 for Democrats--the November 4th PA Supreme Court retention election.
The stakes of this race are existential for Democrats.
If MAGA and Trump succeed in toppling the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court, they will gain control over the court responsible for how elections are run in the most important swing state in America. This will allow Trump to rig the upcoming '26 & '28 elections--denying Democrats a midterm victory and control of the White House for at least a decade.
Since earlier this summer, Defend Our Courts has been one of the leading Democratic organizations spearheading the defense of this critical court, and we have since rallied tens of thousands of Democrats to come to PA's aid.
Now with only 9 days to go, we are preparing our final surge--one last hail mary to try and prevent MAGA from seizing the court and Democracy from falling:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y1WxCX-d0t_5uDcaEutGoRhUWUFxpIjkUTMtgvH1Ih46zuv3e3broo4761_qsnIasY-XkcukAndtTal3PmEe86JDobQbR-iT9SMM1LXFsfckzNiVWTfM5Uu-AxJAc7CUZJl9kTck796NTpsXxr7MYi4ia4A_YWmcwN-WMmam5YbFmRqy3IwQxSEOSuk5Ct2vhF5bvdZGH-pMqOLqveV6gUUAoR66crkPQnCXJ7-nJDw=&c=FBag-IJLYwnG-OLlKGVCM2gnChJgzQtUu1M9L13ql4qkzpBEgVmd9A==&ch=kGa7gbsCrfCeqtqHvHXPgG1PFV8iwAf2yMXF2RrSHyW_sqxay89g0w==)
---
| | | | Behind the scenes look at the filming of Defend Our Courts closing ads in this critical election.
Just a few days ago, our team wrapped up filming for our final slate of ads for this election. The ads feature Pennsylvanians speaking directly to their neighbors about why voting YES in the retention election matters -- from protecting voting rights and fair districts to defending fundamental freedoms.
The production team is working around the clock to finalize edits, polish color grading, sync sound, and master the ad so that we can roll out these ads out across PA in the final week.
That's why we've set a goal to raise $1 million before Tuesday -- enough to reach every targeted voter in Pennsylvania for less than $1.50 each, blanket the airwaves, and shut out MAGA's billionaire propaganda in the final stretch.
With over 50,000 Defend Our Courts supporters nationwide, if each supporter chipped in just $20, we'd have enough to fund every ad, reach every voter, and blanket Pennsylvania's airwaves before Election Day.

clean_body: Now with only 9 days to go, we are preparing our final surge—one last hail mary to try and prevent MAGA from seizing the court and Democracy from falling: | | | | | == | Peter, There are now only 9 days left until the most critical election of 2025 for Democrats--the November 4th PA Supreme Court retention election. The stakes of this race are existential for Democrats. If MAGA and Trump succeed in toppling the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court, they will gain control over the court responsible for how elections are run in the most important swing state in America. This will allow Trump to rig the upcoming '26 & '28 elections--denying Democrats a midterm victory and control of the White House for at least a decade. Since earlier this summer, Defend Our Courts has been one of the leading Democratic organizations spearheading the defense of this critical court, and we have since rallied tens of thousands of Democrats to come to PA's aid. Now with only 9 days to go, we are preparing our final surge--one last hail mary to try and prevent MAGA from seizing the court and Democracy from falling: | == | | | | Behind the scenes look at the filming of Defend Our Courts closing ads in this critical election. Just a few days ago, our team wrapped up filming for our final slate of ads for this election. The ads feature Pennsylvanians speaking directly to their neighbors about why voting YES in the retention election matters -- from protecting voting rights and fair districts to defending fundamental freedoms. The production team is working around the clock to finalize edits, polish color grading, sync sound, and master the ad so that we can roll out these ads out across PA in the final week. That's why we've set a goal to raise $1 million before Tuesday -- enough to reach every targeted voter in Pennsylvania for less than $1.50 each, blanket the airwaves, and shut out MAGA's billionaire propaganda in the final stretch. With over 50,000 Defend Our Courts supporters nationwide, if each supporter chipped in just $20, we'd have enough to fund every ad, reach every voter, and blanket Pennsylvania's airwaves before Election Day. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | | | | == With just 9 days to go, we're leaving it all on the field. subject: The Trump administration is indicting me

It's New York Attorney General Letitia James. Congresswoman Sarah McBride said I could reach out.
By now, you've likely heard the news: **Donald Trump and his administration have indicted me on baseless charges – all because I’ve done my job as Attorney General.**
For months now, we've seen Trump manipulate the justice system in a coordinated effort to go after his political opponents for defending the rule of law.
I knew that holding the most powerful and corrupt accountable – especially the president – could make me a target. **But I'm not about to back down now, and I know you aren't either.**
**Trump is escalating his political retribution campaign – and I need your immediate help to fight back.**
[**We must show, right now, that the American people reject his dangerous political revenge campaign. name: John Fetterman
subject: it’s harder than ever to buy a home – here’s what i’m doing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10387%2E434096%2EHX9UNV ]John Fetterman

Derek, not one, not two, not three ... SIX former U.S. surgeons general – appointed by every Republican and Democratic president since George H. W. Bush – just banded together to issue a joint warning: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is putting Americans’ health at risk. 🚨

They're not taking this lightly. They know what it's like to work at the top of our nation's health department, they know RFK Jr. is a "driving force" behind our growing public health crisis, and they're sounding the alarm.

This comes right after 1,000 current and former HHS employees sent a blistering letter calling for RFK Jr.'s resignation.

And they're all saying the same thing: From funding cuts to dangerous anti-vaccine theories and so much more, RFK Jr.'s leadership is putting lives at risk.

John Fetterman voted NO on RFK Jr.'s confirmation way back in February. He stands with the surgeons general and the scientists and public health officials at HHS. We need steady, ethical leadership grounded in science, not someone who plays politics with their work.

So we have to know where you stand in the midst of all of this. We need [17] more responses from 18326 to complete our dataset, so please respond now:

How would you grade RFK Jr.'s job performance?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51940?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10387%2E434096%2EHX9UNV

Team Fetterman 💛

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Join my lawsuit against Texas Republicans >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
This is how YOU can fight back against Trump right now
#
Y’all, it’s Jasmine Crockett, coming to you with an urgent message:
**We are currently SUING the Republicans in the state of Texas to make sure that I can represent Texas’s 30th Congressional District.**
Republicans are attempting an anti-democratic gerrymander that would disenfranchise Black and Brown voters all across Texas, and I won’t stand for it.

Hi Peter,

As we speak, MAGA extremists are pouring millions into a campaign designed to deceive voters like you. The time to act is now.

Their latest scheme? A misleading campaign designed to confuse Democrats into voting “NO” on retaining Justices Dougherty, Donohue, and Wecht, the very justices who have:
* **Ended partisan gerrymandering in Pennsylvania,**
* **Protected women’s rights and access to reproductive care, and**
* **Fought for fair funding for our public schools.**

**Let’s be clear:** These attacks aren’t about “judicial fairness.” They’re about power.

Billionaires like Jeffrey Yass and national MAGA groups are trying to flip our Supreme Court by deceiving voters and dismantling the progress Pennsylvania Democrats have fought for. We’re not going to let them.

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: 📱David’s calling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
David wants to thank you for your support at this critical moment.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251026-1&t=1&akid=2771%2E587540%2EQME-vG)
Peter, **David let us know that he wants to call grassroots donors** to thank them for supporting us during this critical moment for Leaders We Deserve.
**[Want a chance to get a call? Donate $5 now and you might be on the list.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251026_1_calls.v588yx&refcode=em20251026-2771&amount=5&t=3&akid=2771%2E587540%2EQME-vG)**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251026_1_calls.v588yx&refcode=em20251026-2771&amount=5&t=4&akid=2771%2E587540%2EQME-vG)
Right now, we’re laser-focused on funding our **$20 million investment** in a new generation of progressive leaders. We have some big plans for this election cycle:
🔴 Defeating vulnerable Republicans and flipping their competitive districts blue.
🔵 Challenging ineffective Democrats in safe-seats with young, bold candidates.
🟣 Running progressive champions for open seats and building a bigger bench.
But we also know that **this work is only possible with your support, Peter.** We aren’t funded by right-wing billionaires and corporate PACs. We rely on people just like you chipping in whatever amount makes sense for them, whenever they can.
If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, we risk needing to scale back on our plans for this election. _We can’t let that happen._
**[Peter, will you make a $5 contribution today? If you donate now, you might get a thank you call from David.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251026_1_calls.v588yx&refcode=em20251026-2771&amount=5&t=5&akid=2771%2E587540%2EQME-vG)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251026_1_calls.v588yx&amount=5&refcode=em20251026-2771&t=24&akid=2771%2E587540%2EQME-vG)**
Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251026-1&t=25&refcode2=2771_587540_QME-vG&akid=2771%2E587540%2EQME-vG)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2771%2E587540%2EQME-vG)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2771%2E587540%2EQME-vG)

To give by check:

611 Pennsylvania Ave SE

name: Team Pou
subject: Fake vs. Real
body:
Republicans tried to spread lies. We showed our strength.

| |
---
Hi friend, Recently, DC Republicans wrote a fake memo, put a Democratic logo on it, and tried to trick the press into publishing it. Then they launched a major advertising campaign to spread more lies about Nellie. But we fought back, exposed the fake news, and turned that story around. Because of support from thousands of supporters, we showed real grassroots strength in the last quarter. A big part of our campaign’s fundraising strategy relies on small donations multiplied by many people. _It’s because of your support that we have the resources to fight back against smears and lies. _ With another deadline fast approaching, we need to keep up the momentum to hit our online fundraising goals. We’ve set a target to bring in 250 more donations online before the end of the month. **[Please chip in whatever you can today to help us show our strong grassroots support, so we can send a clear, powerful message to House Republicans that this seat is not for sale.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118044210/578470731/-3691057?refcode=251026_tp_eom2&ms=251026_tp_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUxNDgwODktOTJiMi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oOAPsEaWOlrA0xjY0u0Lz3wCuQldnBqk7NJFBJfSv44=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118044217/578470738/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251026_tp_eom2&ms=251026_tp_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUxNDgwODktOTJiMi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oOAPsEaWOlrA0xjY0u0Lz3wCuQldnBqk7NJFBJfSv44=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118044218/578470739/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251026_tp_eom2&ms=251026_tp_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUxNDgwODktOTJiMi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oOAPsEaWOlrA0xjY0u0Lz3wCuQldnBqk7NJFBJfSv44=)

clean_body: Republicans tried to spread lies. We showed our strength. | | Hi friend, Recently, DC Republicans wrote a fake memo, put a Democratic logo on it, and tried to trick the press into publishing it. Then they launched a major advertising campaign to spread more lies about Nellie. But we fought back, exposed the fake news, and turned that story around. Because of support from thousands of supporters, we showed real grassroots strength in the last quarter. A big part of our campaign’s fundraising strategy relies on small donations multiplied by many people. It’s because of your support that we have the resources to fight back against smears and lies. With another deadline fast approaching, we need to keep up the momentum to hit our online fundraising goals. We’ve set a target to bring in 250 more donations online before the end of the month. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Virginians are a lot like Michiganders. We work hard, we take care of each other, and at the end of the day, we just want the basics: a good-paying job, an affordable place to call home, a fair shot for our kids.
_That's what Abigail has made her campaign all about._
Her opponent is a different story. Winsome Earle-Sears has bent over backwards to defend the chaos coming out of Washington. She even said, in one instance, that losing your job is "not a huge, huge thing."
_Who does she think she's kidding?_
Look, elections are a team effort. Believe me when I tell you Abigail needs supporters like you to join her donor list to come out ahead and set an example for the nation.

clean_body: Abigail needs supporters like you to join her donor list before Friday's final fundraising deadline. = Peter, in just a few days, we have a chance to stand up to all the chaos coming out of Washington D.C. Here's how: By fighting like hell to elect Abigail Spanberger. She's the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's office blue on November 4th, and it's no surprise that national Republicans are launching nonstop attack ads. They're terrified of coming up short. I was already fired up to help Abigail win, but now I'm ready to go the extra mile to make sure she wins big on November 4th. Are you with me? = = = = = = = Virginians are a lot like Michiganders. We work hard, we take care of each other, and at the end of the day, we just want the basics: a good-paying job, an affordable place to call home, a fair shot for our kids. That's what Abigail has made her campaign all about. Her opponent is a different story. Winsome Earle-Sears has bent over backwards to defend the chaos coming out of Washington. She even said, in one instance, that losing your job is "not a huge, huge thing." Who does she think she's kidding? Look, elections are a team effort. Believe me when I tell you Abigail needs supporters like you to join her donor list to come out ahead and set an example for the nation. = = Every dollar you can pitch in helps Abigail keep airing ads, standing up to Republican attacks, and putting her plans in front of voters. Thanks for stepping up, Gretchen Whitmer Governor, Michigan = By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. How The Affordable Housing Proposed by Connecticut Democrats Will Do the Same to Connecticut
