clean_body: | - This is the end. No, I am not being dramatic. Please read this entire message and take action! I’m locked in the BIGGEST race of 2025. Whether I win or lose this race WILL determine the future of our nation. I’m not in the business of lying to voters and supporters, so I’m going to tell you the TRUTH. Here's the full state of things: Spanberger HID a $900K trust from voters while she was in Congress, so lying isn’t anything new for her. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has taken over $550K in donations from a George Soros-backed group and a Chinese Communist Party member! She doesn’t fight for you, me, or our nation; she’s looking out for megarich liberals and literal COMMUNISTS! Spanberger took cues from Biden 100% of the time while she was in Congress. If she became Governor, she’d bring the same lies and downturn that we saw under BidenIf Spanberger wins in November, we’ll have a HORRIBLE and corrupt career politician as Governor in Virginia. But on top of that, it will signal to National Democrats that this kind of corruption is a recipe for success. Soon, every state would be filled with even more corrupt, lying Democrats in office! I’m fighting everyday to ensure that my team and I pull off this CRITICAL victory. We have the message and momentum we need – recent polls show that we’re SURGING as votes are being cast in Virginia. Here’s my crucial problem: my radical opponent has built a MASSIVE fundraising lead ahead of me! We’re being outraised and outspent by over $10 MILLION. CANNOT let my liberal opponent and her megadonors BUY this election! This isn’t about me and it’s not just about you – this is about the future of our nation. From the bottom of my heart, I’m asking you to support me in this fight! we stand together, I know we can win this thing. I pray you’ll stand with me. Sincerely,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears| . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, and I’ve held many titles in my life. Each one hasn’t been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I’ve tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would’ve made it easier, but I’ve found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Staying up until 3 AM with a newborn
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Iowa is supposed to be a place where families can thrive.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118047957/578483719/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzg0YTBjNi1hNmIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOKEWTKKDU5USNBH_To07T5MN5hJv1u6A-TdPLGeE9s=)
Peter, raising a kid is hard.

Don't get me wrong, loving my daughter is the easiest thing in the world, but being a parent can test your patience and your strength in ways nothing else can.

I still remember those long nights when she was a newborn. It was me and her in the quiet, figuring it out together. I'd look at her tiny face and promise myself that I would do everything I could to give her the world. But giving your child a good start and a good life takes more than love. It takes a lot of hard work and a community that actually supports families.

On the campaign trail, I've been hearing from parents of children of all ages who are trying their best, but it's getting harder and harder. Groceries cost more, child care is a struggle, and so many families are just stretched too thin. **And while we're all trying to make things work, Mariannette Miller-Meeks keeps making life harder and more expensive for Iowa families.**

Iowa is supposed to be a place where families can thrive. That's why I moved here to start a family over twenty-five years ago. But lately, I look around and it's harder to see that promise. From rising grocery prices caused by the tariffs Miller-Meeks supported, to her votes to cut our healthcare and defund our schools, to her refusal to even listen to her constituents — she's turned her back on the families she's supposed to represent.

Being a parent taught me that when something isn't working, you have to try something new. You find a better way forward because you have to. That's exactly why I'm running for Congress. Our families deserve better, and our children deserve a brighter future.

**[As your representative, I'll fight to make sure every family in our district can build a good life right here in IA-01. I'll take your voice to Washington and stand up for our children's future every single day. If you believe in this fight, I'm asking you to join me. Help us reach our end-of-month goal and keep this campaign going strong.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118047958/578483720/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251026_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251026_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5384a0c6-a6b2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzg0YTBjNi1hNmIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOKEWTKKDU5USNBH_To07T5MN5hJv1u6A-TdPLGeE9s=)**

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. We encourage you to thoroughly examine this mеssagе from our associates, as it carries substantial benefits for уоu. | | | 3 Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: I took this advice from Bernie to heart:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
Hi Peter,
Early in my career, Bernie Sanders gave me a piece of advice I’ve never forgotten.
He said, **“In politics, people succeed either by being really good at lying or really good at telling the truth. You strike me as someone who’s not good at lying — so your job is to get _really_ good at telling the truth.”**
So today, I’m going to tell you some truths about our campaign.
We’re just two points behind the AIPAC-backed candidate.
We have the momentum to win.
**This is, no exaggeration, a make-or-break moment for us.**
In preparation for the election year, we need to raise as much as we can to prove that our campaign — one that rejects AIPAC and corporate PAC money — has enough resources to take on the establishment and win.
Finally, one more piece of truth: **I don’t love asking people for money.**
But because this is a 100% people-powered campaign, I’m relying on folks like you who care about the future of our party and our country to pitch in.
If you can contribute today, it would mean the world: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20251026-1-ak**](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251026-1-ak.PXqLEh&amount=5&refcode=em20251026-1166&t=2&akid=1166%2E251025%2EsFMDsM)
Thank you,
Abdul

clean_body: It may seem small, but every donation matters with nine days until Election Day. = $25 , Peter. That's the amount we're asking you to donate to help Abigail Spanberger flip Virginia blue. We know it may seem small, but every donation matters now that Trump has endorsed Winsome Earle-Sears. $25 because the Governor's race is tightening with only nine days until Election Day. $25 because Trump's endorsement will lead to a flood of donations for our opponent. $25 because we're up against a barrage of attacks on TV and social media. Our campaign relies on each of us giving what we can to keep organizing, keep airing ads, and keep reaching voters with the truth. So, what do you say? = = = = = = = Thank you, The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Senator Maggie W. Hassan
subject: John E. Sununu is officially running against my friend, Chris Pappas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Winning the New Hampshire Senate race is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate in 2026.

I’ll cut right to the chase, team: **Ultra-conservative John E. Sununu just entered the race for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire.**

This Senate race is the _key_ to flipping the Senate BLUE in the 2026 midterms — and now, election experts are saying it will be one of the most expensive in New Hampshire history.

With GOP attacks mounting against him, my friend Chris Pappas is going to need a whole lot of support to defeat Sununu and get to the Senate. **_[That’s why I’m asking you to please make a $10 donation — split between Chris Pappas and me — to ensure that Chris has the grassroots support to win:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118048101/578484240/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.26_NH-Senate-Race_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGNkN2NiYS1hOGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ukerFOPeebQTZCarknYsfXhF2TEmoPBnHNlp-gBw0Rw=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ CHIP IN $10 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118048102/578484241/1047731393?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.26_NH-Senate-Race_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGNkN2NiYS1hOGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ukerFOPeebQTZCarknYsfXhF2TEmoPBnHNlp-gBw0Rw=)

**John E. Sununu’s record in the House and Senate nearly 20 years ago speaks for itself — he voted against lowering drug prices four times, voted to restrict abortion access, and led efforts to privatize Social Security.**

Sununu is the GOP’s hand-picked candidate for a reason. They know he will fall in line and work _against_ American families. National Republicans and the president view this race as a top pick-up opportunity.

Democrat Chris Pappas is exactly the leader we need to represent Granite Staters and take on GOP extremism — he’s ready to lower prescription drug prices, expand our health care, support our veterans, and fight for working families.

**_[National Republicans will pull every lever to boost Sununu, which is why I am hoping you will help me fight back. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment, and even just a $10 split donation will go a long way in supporting Chris Pappas’ campaign and defeating Sununu:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118048107/578484246/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.26_NH-Senate-Race_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGNkN2NiYS1hOGIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ukerFOPeebQTZCarknYsfXhF2TEmoPBnHNlp-gBw0Rw=)_**

clean_body: Winning the New Hampshire Senate race is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate in 2026. I’ll cut right to the chase, team: Ultra-conservative John E. Sununu just entered the race for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. This Senate race is the key to flipping the Senate BLUE in the 2026 midterms — and now, election experts are saying it will be one of the most expensive in New Hampshire history. With GOP attacks mounting against him, my friend Chris Pappas is going to need a whole lot of support to defeat Sununu and get to the Senate. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = John E. Sununu’s record in the House and Senate nearly 20 years ago speaks for itself — he voted against lowering drug prices four times, voted to restrict abortion access, and led efforts to privatize Social Security. Sununu is the GOP’s hand-picked candidate for a reason. They know he will fall in line and work against American families. National Republicans and the president view this race as a top pick-up opportunity. Democrat Chris Pappas is exactly the leader we need to represent Granite Staters and take on GOP extremism — he’s ready to lower prescription drug prices, expand our health care, support our veterans, and fight for working families. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = With every good wish, Senator Maggie Hassan If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Breaking News Oregon
subject: REPORT: DOJ sues Oregon
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251026em-bnor-rs-fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251026em-bnor-rs-fr]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251026em-bnor-rs-fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251026em-bnor-rs-fr]
FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251026em-bnor-rs-fr]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against the state of Oregon and Secretary of State Tobias Read.
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Tobias has made it clear: He will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. He will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
But let’s be clear: Tobias has gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against him — and against every voter who values free and fair elections and privacy.
Grassroots support is Tobias’s firewall. That means us. That means you.
We need to demonstrate our support for Tobias in the face of this abuse of power.
Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have Tobias’s back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251026em-bnor-rs-fr]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251026em-bnor-rs-fr]
This is not normal. This is not safe. And we cannot let Trump and his cronies get away with it.
Tobias Read for Oregon

Peter,

Right now, millions of Americans are feeling the real-world consequences of the GOP's government shutdown.

People are missing paychecks, being laid off, and struggling to put food on the table. Families are stressed, seniors are waiting for benefits, and everyday Americans are paying the price for political gamesmanship.

And yet, while real people suffer all across our district and nation, the Trump administration and Republican "leaders" are treating taxpayer dollars like monopoly money.
* **U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem just bought two new jets to fly her around the job while Americans go without basic necessities.**

* **Trump just demolished the East Wing of the White House to put in a lavish new grand ballroom that will cost $300 million.**

* **Trump is now demanding the Department of Justice to pay him over $200 million for past lawsuits filed against him.**

Peter, Americans are simply asking Republicans to do their jobs. _That's it._ But instead, _they're using everyday hardship as leverage for personal and political gain._

Commonsense Democrats like Kim are doing everything they can to fight back against the GOP's reckless spending, call out corruption, and stand up for everyday Americans who are struggling to make ends meet—while extremists refuse to meet them halfway to reopen the government and get people back to work.

[**We can’t let politicians prioritize luxury and personal gain over the people they’re supposed to serve. body:
Our rapid-response programs were built assuming we’d keep pace with MAGA spending. We didn’t. And with just 9 days left until the November elections, we are dangerously close to scaling back.

| Peter,
This is the message we hoped we wouldn't have to send--we're now officially behind budget heading into the final stretch before Pennsylvania votes in their critical November 2025 Supreme Court Election.
If we don't close this gap immediately, we risk running out of resources at the exact moment the far-right is unloading a tidal wave of dark-money ads to steal the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NKeaxqkRLB_xnF6xzdCLwh_Fxaz0XarruY4wlYlVT8RjN3OqV2EVDSCH2BGDCmMUfxZVCkbIwU2sOtCR-3n1jkqa3DVkYstsPRV-Z_GxVLtA3ClydHKRIfjgNIbaQnGcyzwPbvxb-2v6YXO6pMSvIDqPuAfgctM8JVFZKCbYGL-8fhauOSWn-He8dCqdKft4dacyOIJRtj-UDFS_7OQOUNurUFz0NTmug1jbmXE0yew=&c=h1z7-TNYjpIaoLR3-O7tr9CBQq4mH0YGlZjmXXchktljYZCqK0cq_w==&ch=HChnazn14gKgEQjOUwWJgZaXWVbZg2QIQlXr1MQ7cwpVnvZyaAcalw==)

| | | | There is no worse time to fall short than right now.
The truth:
Our rapid-response programs were built assuming we'd keep pace with their spending. We didn't. And with just 9 days left until the November elections, we are dangerously close to scaling back -- just as right-wing spending surges.
If MAGA extremists capture this seat, they'll have a runway to contest the 2028 presidential election with a court primed to rule in their favor. They don't need Congress. They don't need a legislature. They just need one judicial majority -- and Pennsylvania is the one they're targeting.
If we fail to hold the line here, we hand them the legal weapon they tried to use in 2020 -- except next time it won't be blocked.
That is exactly why the right is outspending us: because they know the court can decide the presidency. [We are short right now. We need help today. clean_body: Our rapid-response programs were built assuming we’d keep pace with MAGA spending. We didn’t. And with just 9 days left until the November elections, we are dangerously close to scaling back. | | | | | == | Peter, This is the message we hoped we wouldn't have to send--we're now officially behind budget heading into the final stretch before Pennsylvania votes in their critical November 2025 Supreme Court Election. If we don't close this gap immediately, we risk running out of resources at the exact moment the far-right is unloading a tidal wave of dark-money ads to steal the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. | == | | | | There is no worse time to fall short than right now. The truth: Our rapid-response programs were built assuming we'd keep pace with their spending. We didn't. And with just 9 days left until the November elections, we are dangerously close to scaling back -- just as right-wing spending surges. If MAGA extremists capture this seat, they'll have a runway to contest the 2028 presidential election with a court primed to rule in their favor. They don't need Congress. They don't need a legislature. They just need one judicial majority -- and Pennsylvania is the one they're targeting. If we fail to hold the line here, we hand them the legal weapon they tried to use in 2020 -- except next time it won't be blocked. That is exactly why the right is outspending us: because they know the court can decide the presidency. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == This is not a drill. Our rapid-response programs were built assuming we'd keep pace with their spending. We didn't. And with just 9 days left until the November elections, we are dangerously close to scaling back -- just as right-wing spending surges.

If we fail to hold the line here, we hand them the legal weapon they tried to use in 2020 -- except next time it won't be blocked.

The GOP’s budget will cause irreparable harm.
About 15 million Americans, including up to 200,000 Oregonians, could lose their health coverage. And millions of Americans — including hundreds of thousands of Oregonians — are at risk of losing access to SNAP.
On top of all of that, here in Oregon, 8,300 manufacturing and energy jobs are at risk, and families across OR-05 could see their electricity bills rise by over $400.
**And it’s all so Republicans can pay for huge tax handouts to billionaires.**
I won’t stand for this. I’m working to expose the real harm the Republican budget will have on Oregonians and folks across the country. I’m fighting to restore funding for Medicaid. And I’m determined to take back the House to put an end to the GOP’s trash agenda — and I need your support.
[_**I’m relying on this grassroots team to help protect this MUST-HOLD seat in Oregon and ensure Democrats have a path to victory in the House. If you’re with me, please pitch in whatever amount is right for you to defend OR-05 and do our part to flip the House blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118048330/578484908/1565084121?refcode=email_102625_budget&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGRmZmQzZjMtYWJiMi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LwFdJqEbktBPb4u0E9UjyoNvdj0YzjOi8hhR7QwrAYg=)

clean_body: = Since Republicans passed their trash budget, I’ve traveled all across Oregon’s 5th District to hear from my constituents and understand the real harm these cuts will have on our communities. I’m bringing these concerns back with me to Washington to give Oregonians a voice and fight to restore funding to the critical programs we rely on. But this fight won’t be easy. National Republicans are DETERMINED to keep pushing their disastrous policies, and the only way we can stop them is by taking back the House and putting up roadblocks to their agenda. = | | = The GOP’s budget will cause irreparable harm. About 15 million Americans, including up to 200,000 Oregonians, could lose their health coverage. And millions of Americans — including hundreds of thousands of Oregonians — are at risk of losing access to SNAP. On top of all of that, here in Oregon, 8,300 manufacturing and energy jobs are at risk, and families across OR-05 could see their electricity bills rise by over $400. And it’s all so Republicans can pay for huge tax handouts to billionaires. I won’t stand for this. I’m working to expose the real harm the Republican budget will have on Oregonians and folks across the country. I’m fighting to restore funding for Medicaid. And I’m determined to take back the House to put an end to the GOP’s trash agenda — and I need your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = With gratitude, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. clean_body: | | I'm Retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris -- and I'm running against the most dangerous voice in Congress, Marjorie Taylor Greene. | While Georgia families sit and wonder when their next paycheck will arrive, MTG is playing political games -- and cheering on a government shutdown. She calls it "brave." I call it reckless. Her chaos-first agenda doesn't just hurt our state -- it weakens our country. At a time when we need leaders who bring people together, MTG thrives on tearing us apart. ~~ ~~ ~~ Every dollar helps us reach voters across Northwest Georgia and build the grassroots movement it'll take to finally send her packing. When you’ve been around Montana politics for as long as I have, you learn a thing or two about what it takes to win. It starts with listening.

Too many national Democrats are talking down to people instead of listening, and are leaving behind the working people we're supposed to represent. Then, those same party elites dismiss winnable races in Montana as a lost cause.

Reilly Neill is different.

Instead of courting super PACs and corporate donors, Reilly is on the ground listening to Montanans, working with Montanans, and fighting for Montanans. She knows that votes are earned through candid conversations, not canned sound bites.

I’m proud to endorse her for the U.S. Senate because I trust her to stay in the saddle no matter how hard the establishment bucks. [If you’re riding with us, will you chip in $7 or whatever you can to help her win this race and fight for all Montanans?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquMsbqgvb_9iNr2WTy5P_7nWLwrGEq8WRtV0NBejvsUu_228oEyDi_A5GCSR92aUhPmWolc2gvTW9WnO-YIcnWdU4e1wkxm6BYfIloARtbJ7IpfAueq_7xn9E_jMOZXW1Z1GtftZwezj8JhygAPwMxkT0XPwqljYb2od9R5ztttPiWKOjT1sa5MNa7tnfOphGcfsPb01ilJzdjdOcGzrNDuvT743fTDasJgOveDMh7d9yTPPsK9hwnnEVDj0cL-MKGiP9oCYCJ6m8Gxv0bF_gT9tA4WYhKHqQJlIBmvWB_t1gqINDvvafdWZUUQNhH7awrRrOvSBJBpukmN2Xxx7GHu/4l2/ursN80i2R36arNHbL0zSeQ/h5/h001.Z9N4ecMB3VStPt-M0F3_8jVES2Zk5GgZO6tY9soY8rU)

clean_body: | | Reilly Neill is running to be Montana's next U.S. Senator. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi, former Montana Governor Brian Schweitzer here. I’m reaching out because Reilly Neill is running for Senate, and needs your support. | | When you’ve been around Montana politics for as long as I have, you learn a thing or two about what it takes to win. It starts with listening. Too many national Democrats are talking down to people instead of listening, and are leaving behind the working people we're supposed to represent. Then, those same party elites dismiss winnable races in Montana as a lost cause. Reilly Neill is different. Instead of courting super PACs and corporate donors, Reilly is on the ground listening to Montanans, working with Montanans, and fighting for Montanans. She knows that votes are earned through candid conversations, not canned sound bites. I’m proud to endorse her for the U.S. Senate because I trust her to stay in the saddle no matter how hard the establishment bucks. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | | | | | | – Brian Schweitzer Former Governor of Montana * | Reilly Neill is a different kind of Democrat running a different kind of Senate campaign. subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Democrats MUST hold the line for our healthcare.

body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBMCD1dFJQAsJymSwLq_nT8KKGjEy3P9LyG8jlEEn7EGz-pB3D3pFcdtnJD7ZHkm3Ec2A2ownScp52VUXNQzpo3yfysqRVMhahmvPRYti98tEKxE8t57M3CHbT_kycXA5iQ/4l2/9XNx_FX5RaeEOeKO9PZXjQ/h0/h001.oFgBVb8MwKn3v-bVqSIFHY9uCuV60aZptNgcgwKe_ns)
---
Peter, We are barreling towards Mike Johnson and the rest of the MAGA caucus triggering an insurance crisis that is going to crush American families and crater our economy. **And my opponent is ready to help them do it.** **Here 's the reality that awaits us if Republicans get their way:** On December 31st, the subsidies that help American families afford healthcare through the Affordable Care Act Marketplace will expire. Instantly, 24 million people will see their monthly health insurance costs DOUBLE. **The Democrats have made our position clear:** Our reps in Congress are ready to re-open the government and end this shutdown on the condition that Republicans commit to reauthorizing the ACA tax credits. Mike Johnson is determined to keep the House in recess, the government shut down, and let the ACA get wiped out.
---
[ **TELL DEMS: STAND STRONG FOR HEALTHCARE** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38hEpOxW5JbSk-4TcBb3ShXzaEY4mFDXqfjF9HadFrBJWV06aL4qiKvadgiYoq9dJQe9ufSsZ4HSLGFrDBzpPpSNBlb4v5Wyw0icmo6lEdQaLMwuaJvm2kb0Nt7-AvHWsTu_wSm2ZM82SZYz1QdlBKAn0V0agyVzPs7UwH1fcEO1BHNweAyECmNGImfw6_8PH54FXeZw3KDdwUI5FTvLmSomzZ0EzKD0fWZn2QJu3gFL5bWBo5D_JqDNnbExUuvtS5x_P-A26jD2Qv-qomiNcUlqdxe3jOkYAfXMbYhNK23JVBfEhA31jwaD-HVglNFoIKWNmURONxHr65FqCQMX98Lg4WieKaQs4JdYgYNrvbzVJtJ1mmBSx5vn4ctDQyzwfzPJdDsZhQUhwaEdE9fDu5Nl0Ev-l91Tj8vdrGMjySqMMJvxfYmnVdC2hpwdD4PbXa51HPq8o5mIFYJNxB7KSN2R-FS_sz5K0SDyQcS1MlKuz3OUJr6fICz0UFTWlrq0l0r-WcMmJe5WSV9KWuKGKwnYOdY3vnQ8_0UCUEzvaBv032U35ierGzLpqcKnAO48TgIxzLHRovFQ0tZbZd6VtTSUG7GadWBG43CXNhGr0bv2IzjqzTZiuHPssAu7444eraBxviaww919ml_SjdLrOaDfrru0PWoetE-fJ7iRUqyPFYZxTjAIRfmKT5_3ornSmA/4l2/9XNx_FX5RaeEOeKO9PZXjQ/h1/h001.5zbN-NRxG8p2-2uFxfOIg_qXt3cnFP-meABlLBBuBIA)

What's particularly infuriating is that my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, has repeatedly signaled to Mike Johnson that she's on HIS side. First she told reporters in September that she supported the MAGA funding bill that would lock in huge Medicaid cuts WITHOUT any extension or guarantee to protect the ACA. Then she published an op-ed in our local newspaper chiding Democrats for fighting for our healthcare instead of giving in to Johnson.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38hEpOxW5JbSk-4TcBb3ShXzaEY4mFDXqfjF9HadFrBJWV06aL4qiKvadgiYoq9dJQe9ufSsZ4HSLGFrDBzpPpSNBlb4v5Wyw0icmo6lEdQaLMwuaJvm2kb0Nt7-AvHWsTu_wSm2ZM82SZYz1QdlBKAn0V0agyVzPs7UwH1fcEO1BHNweAyECmNGImfw6_8PH54FXeZw3KDdwUI5FTvLmSomzZ0EzKD0fWZn2QJu3gFL5bWBo5D_JqDNnbExUuvtS5x_P-A26jD2Qv-qomiNcUlqdxe3jOkYAfXMbYhNK23JVBfEhA31jwaD-HVglNFoIKWNmURONxHr65FqCQMX98Lg4WieKaQs4JdYgYNrvbzVJtJ1mmBSx5vn4ctDQyzwfzPJdDsZhQUhwaEdE9fDu5Nl0Ev-l91Tj8vdrGMjySqMMJvxfYmnVdC2hpwdD4PbXY0TYXF9kDyPmYFpNZiHpkttw4Qgp9b4eE0LKs2TR3G6mF5pVtwxUXADWC64F584l6HMWXnxrVhHGblXBGYSvYdcZnnINNfXZYJ-QkoKZrIks8npuBCUohKp1q15tjTFPDLs9j-lexmZD_aBfUWLLc7HdtFi-UOlrlmUVKFJuaTOntaOOkEujBzlF0Xm-8sRe2KYfZFu1p0sluNeSOQPr2A8w8mFuIW0BTVKdT_nsjC-C2pO-9NlxqOWsUCpplhSLI/4l2/9XNx_FX5RaeEOeKO9PZXjQ/h2/h001.3UHmC-tXuRx99mRTSd8xbTEx_h89knvFmvANzM4FbYY)

**Fortunately, the rest of the Democrats are holding strong and we need to keep it that way.** I'm teaming up with Aisha Farooqi, Democratic candidate for Congress in Michigan, along with other candidates and national organizations like Democracy for America, Americans for Health, Democratic Values PAC and others to **tell my future colleagues in Congress to HOLD THE LINE for healthcare.** **Will you add your name alongside mine?**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME NOW** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38hEpOxW5JbSk-4TcBb3ShXzaEY4mFDXqfjF9HadFrBJWV06aL4qiKvadgiYoq9dJQe9ufSsZ4HSLGFrDBzpPpSNBlb4v5Wyw0icmo6lEdQaLMwuaJvm2kb0Nt7-AvHWsTu_wSm2ZM82SZYz1QdlBKAn0V0agyVzPs7UwH1fcEO1BHNweAyECmNGImfw6_8PH54FXeZw3KDdwUI5FTvLmSomzZ0EzKD0fWZn2QJu3gFL5bWBo5D_JqDNnbExUuvtS5x_P-A26jD2Qv-qomiNcUlqdxe3jOkYAfXMbYhNK23JVBfEhA31jwaD-HVglNFoIKWNmURONxHr65FqCQMX98Lg4WieKaQs4JdYgYNrvbzVJtJ1mmBSx5vn4ctDQyzwfzPJdDsZhQUhwaEdE9fDu5Nl0Ev-l91Tj8vdrGMjySqMMJvxfYmnVdC2hpwdD4PbXaE5X61HXCMW0Lh9n3dFzPgHIhr-skRc1Abs8vSgZp24g_ZygjWX6oHD8EHGA-xu0CDXZuGsJXetg5z--izLrpUAjm0eeeT9wXKfWtdAwphCyMpv6AvRXy4yPplA6jFZ3xquF9PZwBxFypQ3362n1HKlDaNaJRCpVqJC4i0zTqH1yWnKE_muPjjln83rp1L9R_JltWXqUtn273DEAzDgTu7FZM0Agtf45cE3V3H96lxeSoR3kw7LvNGCYH9gKXvVrw/4l2/9XNx_FX5RaeEOeKO9PZXjQ/h3/h001.cRxu5xcNC9dhulzWCIu_IhL3B_fgOngbiLWz2x4A69g)

Media reports indicate that Republicans are getting pressure from all sides, including conservative voters, to extend these tax credits immediately and protect our healthcare. But the clock is ticking. Open enrollment in state-run ACA Marketplaces begins November 1st. If the ACA credits are extended, Americans can enroll in the marketplace plans with peace of mind that their health insurance plan will remain affordable. If Congress lets the credits expire, people will rightfully be worried their rates could double at the end of the year - and many won't enroll at all. That's a recipe for disaster for all of us. Tens of millions of Americans will be uninsured. Insurers will raise rates on the rest of us. And the people with the most to lose - those with ongoing medical needs and major disease - will pay the highest price. [**We can 't leave millions of Americans behind. We can't let these tax credits expire. Join me now in telling Democrats to HOLD THE LINE and protect our care.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38hEpOxW5JbSk-4TcBb3ShXzaEY4mFDXqfjF9HadFrBJWV06aL4qiKvadgiYoq9dJQe9ufSsZ4HSLGFrDBzpPpSNBlb4v5Wyw0icmo6lEdQaLMwuaJvm2kb0Nt7-AvHWsTu_wSm2ZM82SZYz1QdlBKAn0V0agyVzPs7UwH1fcEO1BHNweAyECmNGImfw6_8PH54FXeZw3KDdwUI5FTvLmSomzZ0EzKD0fWZn2QJu3gFL5bWBo5D_JqDNnbExUuvtS5x_P-A26jD2Qv-qomiNcUlqdxe3jOkYAfXMbYhNK23JVBfEhA31jwaD-HVglNFoIKWNmURONxHr65FqCQMX98Lg4WieKaQs4JdYgYNrvbzVJtJ1mmBSx5vn4ctDQyzwfzPJdDsZhQUhwaEdE9fDu5Nl0Ev-l91Tj8vdrGMjySqMMJvxfYmnVdC2hpwdD4PbXZfZbiEG4TE5si4jU8XaOQrEUotlkJAtmTlgleN8JwbF9isvKGnkhivbTg51n534uYNqQ0XEV-wIjpLuFlIT25gktjWnzPYKKmgzdZPhfP5zKw_UDRfoX7GpMcb36wOdWQkjUEjOVMiJlMfo8KpZnDZk3VlX7nBeB3YrUor8Nww2uV5ZfKnBHwCRpO_MfN8zX524qeFiuqum-rUNRmF0d80NweyDHI1caba3XgFlaVkOxmKsE1Vmg1sc4JTeovNrMw/4l2/9XNx_FX5RaeEOeKO9PZXjQ/h4/h001.zqjuQdsrwfMItBENAOLTHjP7wormvfUSOPVIMvMDUWM) When you're done, forward this email to your friends and family so they know what's at risk, and ask them to join you in demanding affordable care. clean_body: | | Peter, We are barreling towards Mike Johnson and the rest of the MAGA caucus triggering an insurance crisis that is going to crush American families and crater our economy. And my opponent is ready to help them do it. Here 's the reality that awaits us if Republicans get their way: On December 31st, the subsidies that help American families afford healthcare through the Affordable Care Act Marketplace will expire. Instantly, 24 million people will see their monthly health insurance costs DOUBLE. The Democrats have made our position clear: Our reps in Congress are ready to re-open the government and end this shutdown on the condition that Republicans commit to reauthorizing the ACA tax credits. Mike Johnson is determined to keep the House in recess, the government shut down, and let the ACA get wiped out. What's particularly infuriating is that my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, has repeatedly signaled to Mike Johnson that she's on HIS side. First she told reporters in September that she supported the MAGA funding bill that would lock in huge Medicaid cuts WITHOUT any extension or guarantee to protect the ACA. Then she published an op-ed in our local newspaper chiding Democrats for fighting for our healthcare instead of giving in to Johnson. | Fortunately, the rest of the Democrats are holding strong and we need to keep it that way. I'm teaming up with Aisha Farooqi, Democratic candidate for Congress in Michigan, along with other candidates and national organizations like Democracy for America, Americans for Health, Democratic Values PAC and others to tell my future colleagues in Congress to HOLD THE LINE for healthcare. Will you add your name alongside mine? Media reports indicate that Republicans are getting pressure from all sides, including conservative voters, to extend these tax credits immediately and protect our healthcare. But the clock is ticking. Open enrollment in state-run ACA Marketplaces begins November 1st. If the ACA credits are extended, Americans can enroll in the marketplace plans with peace of mind that their health insurance plan will remain affordable. If Congress lets the credits expire, people will rightfully be worried their rates could double at the end of the year - and many won't enroll at all. That's a recipe for disaster for all of us. Tens of millions of Americans will be uninsured. Insurers will raise rates on the rest of us. And the people with the most to lose - those with ongoing medical needs and major disease - will pay the highest price. When you're done, forward this email to your friends and family so they know what's at risk, and ask them to join you in demanding affordable care. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . Peter, I will stand up to the GOP to deliver for our country. I had to do just that to get Medicaid Expansion passed for North Carolina. So I’m not afraid to stand up against what’s happening now: **Republicans in Washington said they wouldn’t try to cut Medicaid. They lied — and we can’t let them get away with it.** **[Add your name to our petition and call on GOP lawmakers to protect health care like they promised.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118048701/578486286/-640377894?refcode=ea.9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDc3ZGJiYy1hZWIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1BI9_4mdPH6JRynuKqmnFdhddD4K5BDr2kftUBX7kU=&emci=904c9f11-0cb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)** Republicans are trying to take health care away from millions of Americans to fund a tax break for their billionaire donors. It doesn’t get more absurd than that. No American should go without health care. Not in the richest country in the world. That’s why I worked so hard as Governor to get Medicaid Expansion done — and now more than 675,000 more North Carolinians are covered. I was proud to work to achieve a bipartisan deal for NC. Now, Washington Republicans need to come to the table, too. **[If you agree, please sign my petition to demand the GOP end this attack on our health care and protect Medicaid like they promised.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118048703/578486288/-640377894?refcode=ea.9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDc3ZGJiYy1hZWIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1BI9_4mdPH6JRynuKqmnFdhddD4K5BDr2kftUBX7kU=&emci=904c9f11-0cb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118048705/578486290/-640377894?refcode=ea.9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDc3ZGJiYy1hZWIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1BI9_4mdPH6JRynuKqmnFdhddD4K5BDr2kftUBX7kU=&emci=904c9f11-0cb1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9477dbbc-aeb2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)**

clean_body: Derek, like many of you, I’m gearing up to watch the Steelers take it to the Packers tonight. (Feels weird to watch Rodgers take on his old team, right?!) But before the game starts, I need your help holding the line in one of the toughest battleground seats in the country. = | | = Whether it’s our football games or our elections, Pennsylvania is used to having all eyes on us. We have some of the closest and toughest races in the country. In fact, PA-17 was one of the most competitive battleground seats in 2024. But thanks to this team, we put in the hard work and we won. Now, I’m the ONLY Democrat defending a battleground district in Pennsylvania. Republicans think 2026 is their chance to finally beat me. Think again. All they’ll be getting next year is a lame participation trophy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = HERE WE GO! name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Musk may be gone, but DOGE apparently isn't
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CNN: DOGE seeks access to highly sensitive taxpayer data at IRS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/CNN_DOGE_IRS.png]
Elon Musk and his DOGE team took a wrecking ball to the federal government -- with President Trump's approval. And even though Musk has left, OMB Director Russ Vought has taken up the mantle.
Funding has been frozen, key agencies are being shuttered, and multiple outlets have reported that this unelected DOGE team has unfettered access to critical personal taxpayer data like Social Security numbers and IRS returns, despite lacking the security clearances needed to access sensitive government information.
We want to hear from our supporters in your area about DOGE's efforts. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you approve of Trump’s "Department of Government Efficiency"?

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=102625_2&amount=20]

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: We made a tough decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Those polls showing a close race are real, and we’re responding.

|
---
Peter, we’ll get right to the point.

A recent Emerson poll found this race tied — with tons of undecided voters. It’s not an outlier. We’ve lost count of how many polls have come out in recent weeks showing this race functionally tied.

In a race this close, the last thing we can afford is for people who support Mikie Sherrill to not show up to the polls, or leave their mail-in ballot sitting on their kitchen table.

Peter, we just made a decision to MASSIVELY expand our GOTV program between now and Nov. 4 — counting on money that we don’t yet have, because we’re counting on this grassroots team to come in big for us down the stretch.

**[We know it’s asking a lot, but Peter, we need all the help we can get in the final days of this race. clean_body: Those polls showing a close race are real, and we’re responding. | Peter, we’ll get right to the point. A recent Emerson poll found this race tied — with tons of undecided voters. It’s not an outlier. We’ve lost count of how many polls have come out in recent weeks showing this race functionally tied. In a race this close, the last thing we can afford is for people who support Mikie Sherrill to not show up to the polls, or leave their mail-in ballot sitting on their kitchen table. Peter, we just made a decision to MASSIVELY expand our GOTV program between now and Nov. 4 — counting on money that we don’t yet have, because we’re counting on this grassroots team to come in big for us down the stretch. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mikie Sherrill and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | = = = = Thank you, Mikie Sherrill HQ | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. | I want to take a moment to thank you for being part of this grassroots team. I know you hear from me a lot, so I appreciate you taking the time to read these messages.

Every voice and every dollar makes a difference in this fight, and I couldn’t do this without you.

But I also need to be honest with you: Republicans have FIVE times more cash on hand than Democrats. They’re pushing their extremist agenda and trying to silence our voices. **Taking back the House majority is the way we can push back against Republican dysfunction and get things done.**

While we can’t compete with their dark money, we can show the strength of our grassroots movement. We can show them that West Michigan isn’t for sale.

subject: Please have faith in me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
I can guarantee you’ll want to hear this.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e64468/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YveTJGckVxc0huZg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMjY/LbmNsMFpEdVdMQg/qP2hpZHM9bmN3RVB1QUVyc1hLRWxscw/gaP6YEg/sar4b718ade)

I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full. **PLEASE HAVE FAITH IN ME!**
We have officially closed the books on the third quarter of the year, and we’re so close to 2026.
We’ve accomplished a lot of great things - many historic things too!
**But despite all of our victories, the Democrats are angrier and nastier than perhaps ever before in the history of our country. They even shut down the government.**
Never before have they worked so hard to railroad us at every turn. It's almost impressive how much they keep shooting themselves in the foot.
**But one thing is for sure - the more we win... the more ruthless they grow!**
As much as I’d love to take my foot off the gas and enjoy our historic victories, we simply don’t have the time. MAGA is happening right now!

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e64468/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtaW1wLXY1LXMyLXNi/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMjY/LbmNsMFpEdVdMQg/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIxNzM0X2Z0ZDE/gaP6YEg/scj49d62ea7)
As we accelerate into the midterms, the Democrats have made one thing clear: **they’re organizing earlier and spending a lot of money to do it.**
As the leader of our party and the great MAGA movement, I know we are capable of doing even more and better!
Not only will we have to fight back against the Democrats this cycle, we will also have to battle their strongest allies, judges, puppet masters, and the liberal fake news media.
**[With your help today, I know we will win this battle with ease.>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e64468/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtaW1wLXY1LXMyLXNi/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMjY/LbmNsMFpEdVdMQg/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIxNzM0X2Z0ZDE/gaP6YEg/scj49d62ea7)**
Look at any great American accomplishment in the history of the world, and you will find all credit and success is owed to a number of incredible people just like YOU!
**[You are the REAL MAGA Movement, and I’m asking you to sacrifice $15 today for a better MAGA TOMORROW!>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e64468/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtaW1wLXY1LXMyLXNi/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMjY/LbmNsMFpEdVdMQg/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIxNzM0X2Z0ZDE/gaP6YEg/scj49d62ea7)**
The Presidential Fundraising Blitz I just announced ends tonight, so please hurry, so we can meet our goal and crush the Democrats.
Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, and we will KEEP AMERICA GREAT.
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e64468/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtaW1wLXY1LXMyLXNi/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEwMjY/LbmNsMFpEdVdMQg/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIxNzM0X2Z0ZDE/gaP6YEg/scj49d62ea7)

clean_body: I can guarantee you’ll want to hear this. | | | | I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full. PLEASE HAVE FAITH IN ME! We have officially closed the books on the third quarter of the year, and we’re so close to 2026. We’ve accomplished a lot of great things - many historic things too! But despite all of our victories, the Democrats are angrier and nastier than perhaps ever before in the history of our country. They even shut down the government. Never before have they worked so hard to railroad us at every turn. It's almost impressive how much they keep shooting themselves in the foot. But one thing is for sure - the more we win... the more ruthless they grow! As much as I’d love to take my foot off the gas and enjoy our historic victories, we simply don’t have the time. MAGA is happening right now! As we accelerate into the midterms, the Democrats have made one thing clear: they’re organizing earlier and spending a lot of money to do it. As the leader of our party and the great MAGA movement, I know we are capable of doing even more and better! Not only will we have to fight back against the Democrats this cycle, we will also have to battle their strongest allies, judges, puppet masters, and the liberal fake news media. Look at any great American accomplishment in the history of the world, and you will find all credit and success is owed to a number of incredible people just like YOU! The Presidential Fundraising Blitz I just announced ends tonight, so please hurry, so we can meet our goal and crush the Democrats. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, and we will KEEP AMERICA GREAT. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. clean_body: Not even a government shutdown can distract us from this news: | Peter, Republicans shut down the government so they wouldn’t have to answer questions, but not even a shutdown can distract us from this news: Republicans are planning to fire over 2,000 park rangers and federal employees who protect our National Parks and wildlife, all so Big Oil can make even more money off our public lands. = This is just another reward to Big Oil for their role in funding Trump's reelection and another mark of this administration's egregious corruption. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Before Yass ran for office, she was a senior climate policy advisor at the United Nations. She spent her career working on the team that helped to deliver the Paris Climate Accord, so you can trust that she will put people over polluters who only care about their own payday. = Thanks in advance, Team Yass Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

let's help Haley, win this ruff and tumble race

[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7463?t=3&akid=1183%2E49239%2EOouSKk)
**WOOF! WOOF! HI, HUMAN PERSON! 🐾
**
**It’s me,****Bailey the dog!** I’m a very good girl, a treat expert, and a proud campaign pup. My mom is Katelyn, Haley Stevens’ finance director. That means she stares at spreadsheets all day while I nap (priorities, obviously 🐶💤).
But between belly rubs, I’ve picked up some impawtant info:
🐾 **Michigan is one of the biggest Senate races in the country.** All eyes (and ears!) are on us.

🐾 **Haley has the best shot of ANY Democrat to win.** The polls say so.

🐾 **And Haley herself? She’s like me – tough, loyal, and totally pawsome at protecting the people she loves.** 🐕💙
That’s why I’m begging: **[Will you chip in $5 today to help Team Haley flip the Senate and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7464?t=4&akid=1183%2E49239%2EOouSKk)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7463?t=5&akid=1183%2E49239%2EOouSKk)
---
If you donate today, I get extra pets! And most importantly, you’ll help one of my favorite humans, Haley, win this ruff and tumble race.
Thanks fur everything,

Bailey 🐾
(on behalf of my mom, Katelyn, and the whole Team Haley pack!)
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7679?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1183%2E49239%2EOouSKk) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7678?t=7&akid=1183%2E49239%2EOouSKk)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Fellow Conservative,

Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda.

Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back.

I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. **I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos.**

Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans.

_**Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe.

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e9b0e42572d742098574cf84823a11cc&_e=SjxI_XAiNLhn0PBz2ApP8bHKvdQ14KwSksX-xFBB3DCp0oDWqHLgHbCyZcPGRKtWFG-7nQv7uAOVWoQ0NmjqYdjuiii9oJ8y_JX20dHDkU0Qp-VQznbw3mZkhSu94Yb9bxonkEVgqbDju2QtumfzEqJ1s6gdQFfHuki6CC1ROb9WhK-ovHcES382ySYjUecj-sbmmpjaCbfi_3sI6J_EjsUdB23JuGJjSLLGjrLc2lql1M8lS8f-eteWwuqSgbhn3CMfBo0gCDuL7Vx7y_9H0FQurOY0ZEJvEPZF1ZCFDLDAk1xtGHTwE0_C7iNN5lHfoSEXFbZ6N3gMVITHYhnzME-mEwqOhq__6DP31Z42FAgmB9sVHThZSGCKxRS7kukxsaXO6EA4gxqAvPsCNtvsf16pwl18qOTemEkk5V7b2SjwSJTflalPNBoREPj-Asl578yTBpm4erM1C1k6N7VgaDAnKHlWKDy_-KisupNrtidmMdUHUvftNhqkzC6KiyNNpc6vkqKejSXe-4UU_6A83Uq-FwbhR8nAqdFUZZ45-sp5uhnj-a0OKM0tVBrtiLg0oAAmk0dMFQfq7_snxqJAPMfn5GE5U2hlRd1w8E3mPNuaOiGXcPCxv9ap26PtAfVXTPoYzMdUsDiiXDHEjM375YPGfs3kkWppEJYAgDvunsqvtSSxmdABng4oou-chTfi4flf7jKrr2zJ7939dbaNWifLVD-JycUl563chFKT-L-nbmQ3FOqSUfjkCscqGgnOCTCK0Yw7zUQakL9daSe4B0EcrBBjZqyVfA0Tx0eO4LAcEGep3SIHfL0HfEHv6Iq7)

**Here’s the spark:** Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. **With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades.** Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good.

**I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom.**

We’re the underdogs, no question. **Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet.** But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything.

_**[Now, I need you to join me.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e9b0e42572d742098574cf84823a11cc&_e=SjxI_XAiNLhn0PBz2ApP8bHKvdQ14KwSksX-xFBB3DCp0oDWqHLgHbCyZcPGRKtWFG-7nQv7uAOVWoQ0NmjqYdjuiii9oJ8y_JX20dHDkU0Qp-VQznbw3mZkhSu94Yb9bxonkEVgqbDju2QtumfzEqJ1s6gdQFfHuki6CC1ROb9WhK-ovHcES382ySYjUecj-sbmmpjaCbfi_3sI6J_EjsUdB23JuGJjSLLGjrLc2lql1M8lS8f-eteWwuqSgbhn3CMfBo0gCDuL7Vx7y_9H0FQurOY0ZEJvEPZF1ZCFDLDanEaz-VbsMSv3hPjmB6KJQIZA4UrloVal9m_j4TeeyU-KABA8scvGMHE4i1-vURhci2GA9D7Zpsw9WbDoVIUcUVg-ZC-jdtvBh6Ponq4FvsXRoANJhuHO5H8WQudIwpfhy5ysYDHQhEZDHiJBH4lhc3u2Rj_mpEOC969zMQU5Wb9ZP8kMTJtcjyimYYzpvF6eHAv55KZHNhxYSsbxTKR40B7iO9zK2KCGsfsHXSH_VEXkRqOThPDAuqkwLhkatQMtVGTh6IPhcbNekuuIGhSu84uef4C9_9UvkFW45tqX2wPqBMx5cCiJTicLEooukPo9tQ3wUxUlxJjDwj2_i8s-Zu4DZx56ScW76CilosLDLwiIKJR3T3DIhPr_HxtwIK_dj6w7gMxpJWPp2Rg1FdjuLv3w1PJ9W6Me-ucFgcWdZMH4nRfq1YDsl4oiiADntA_XKe9S5EufZp34btY-T5sZqzWzvZywMKtWECAw0uCya4sO65q6jOZuT8UYJCXhRHvTJ8XEGlUAebGKHxwDvat4)**_

clean_body: Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | Fellow Conservative, Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back. I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos. Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans. Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe. Here’s the spark: Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good. I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom. We’re the underdogs, no question. Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet. But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything. Our last fundraising push got us halfway to our goal, but with Q4 filings looming and Flanagan raking in cash from coastal elites, You—retired vets, churchgoers, grandparents who’ve paid your dues—can fuel the ads, the door-knockers, the momentum to shock the system. You’ve got a choice. Delete this and let Democrats keep choking our future. Or stand with a battle-hardened SEAL ready to fight—not with noise, but with the quiet professionalism that wins wars. Help me make it real. Because we built this country on sacrifice and resolve, and we’re not done fighting. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Thank you, Team Warner Before you go: Mark Warner is leading the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable – but that could make his race a top Republican target next year. We need to be prepared for his toughest and most expensive reelection campaign yet. =****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: John James
subject: I urgently need to get in touch with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Friend, I urgently need to get in touch with you as my situation just became more serious. _My name is John James. I’m a Christian, conservative combat veteran working to restore strong leadership to Michigan._ I volunteered to fly Apache helicopters in Iraq to defeat the enemy, and served again to protect our country from the dangers of radical socialism. **I am NOW running for Governor to SAVE Michigan from the clutches of the radical left.** I know you’re just like me. You want to preserve a future for our children. We are fighting for our America First vision in the most competitive swing state in the nation. _**To make matters worse, our campaign deadline is rapidly approaching, and we are significantly behind schedule.**_ **I can’t complete this mission alone. If we’re going to fight back, we’re going to have to start strong. I humbly request that you consider pitching in just a few bucks today to ensure we hit our upcoming deadline in just a few days.
