name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Wisconsinites deserve judges who will protect our freedoms, not question them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251026-747&t=1&akid=754%2E294397%2EOMEIaE)
Remember this headline?
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251026_1_ak.mtYTeD&amount=10&refcode=em20251026-747&t=2&akid=754%2E294397%2EOMEIaE)
Earlier this year, the Wisconsin Supreme Court rejected a 176-year-old abortion ban, safeguarding reproductive healthcare access for our state.
Recently, our far-right opponent, Maria Lazar, was asked about her position on this ruling.
Lazar’s response? _“I don’t know that I would've been in the majority on that case.”_
Wisconsinites deserve judges who will protect our freedoms — not question them.
That’s the difference in this race: **Maria Lazar would threaten our fundamental rights. Judge Chris Taylor will defend them.**
But values alone won’t win this race.
Right-wing special interests could start spending millions to boost Lazar’s campaign without warning, and we’re counting on grassroots support to fight back and win. [**Will you chip in $10 to elect Judge Chris Taylor?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251026_1_ak.mtYTeD&amount=10&refcode=em20251026-747&t=3&akid=754%2E294397%2EOMEIaE)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251026_1_ak.mtYTeD&amount=10&refcode=em20251026-747&t=22&akid=754%2E294397%2EOMEIaE)**
Thanks so much,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251026-747&t=23&refcode2=754_294397_OMEIaE&akid=754%2E294397%2EOMEIaE)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=754%2E294397%2EOMEIaE)

Madison, WI 53701

# [District Round‐up 10.26.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F10%2F26%2Fdistrict-round-up-10-26-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=6a499734c1bef0e1e6059ad7cc0e3959&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| By **Elizabeth Farnham** on October 26, 2025
---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=fa64a731f243e57ae232a87285d13445d6a1442db5751b0f46bd5df338f3fb66&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5265&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=c5b6f28b3365db5a81f78e2e98de8b53&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=c938f2b5bacae99d92c41ea75d3e6750)
In Mercersburg, Pennsylvania, Democracy isn’t safe.
Today, Kelcie, co-chair of the Mercersburg Halloween Parade, sponsored by Lions Club International, told me that I could not use my navy and pink banner that reads, “They sacrificed for our Democracy” to honor my relatives who died in service to our country.
In 1944, my great-uncle, 2nd Lieutenant Harrison Robins III, deployed to India with the 20th Air Force, 58th Bomber wing, 468th Bomber group, 792nd Squadron and was shot down over Yawata, Japan on August 20th of that year. In 1949, when his remains were finally found and recovered, a telegram indicating such was received by his father, my great grandfather, Harrison Robins II, who promptly had a heart attack and died. My family held a double funeral for them.
In 1953, my paternal grandfather, Captain Wesley Yeo Clement, of the United States Air Force brought his family to Frankfort -Rhine Main AFB, Germany while he participated in the Allied occupation of Germany, ensuring fascism would not rise again there. After a mid-air collision took his life and those of his fellow airmen, their remains were interred together at Jefferson Barracks National Cemetery and my family moved back to the United States.
Kelcie explained that my banner couldn’t be used because it had the word, “Democracy” and that if it had said, “They died for our Freedom” or “They sacrificed for America” that might have been okay, but “Democracy” was not. She even added that my name was a problem and only the colors “red, white, and blue” could be used. When I asked for clarification, she repeatedly claimed that it was “a gray area” and alluded to potential controversy.
But the “Freedom,” or even America, Kelcie refers to doesn’t come from a monarchy.
Freedom doesn’t come from fascism.
Freedom doesn’t come from a dictatorship.
Freedom doesn’t come from any kind of authoritarian rule.
Freedom only comes from Democracy.
When the granddaughter and great-niece of those who died in service cannot openly campaign or even honor them in a public parade in a small town in America, then that Freedom doesn’t exist and the only thing these veterans get from Lions Club International for all of their sacrifices is a proverbial slap in the face.
I am a proud descendent of not only those ancestors who served in World War II and the American occupation of Germany, but also those who served in the American Revolutionary War and on the side of the United States of America in the Civil War and World War I. When I, a woman, campaign as Beth Farnham for Congress, I honor them, whether I carry their memorials in the colors I wish or I promote my slogan, “Choose Democracy.” They sacrificed so I could be free to do exactly these things.
Oh sure, the Lions Club claims to be politically neutral and non religious, but in the Mercersburg Halloween Parade 2025, they’ve authorized at least two churches whose messages include, “Feed us with your grace, and grant us the treasure that comes only from you, through Jesus Christ, our Savior and Lord” and “We exist to share the good news of Jesus Christ by reaching out to others...” from their websites. Those aren’t subtle, especially if someone isn’t expecting any church to be in a Halloween parade.
And yet, squeezing out democratic norms, but asserting Christianity, happens all the time in Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional district. It’s why church events and participation are widely visible, but no Chambers of Congress, no newspapers, and no institutions of higher learning in the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Somerset, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset have ever sponsored a debate between me and our US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce.
It’s why John Joyce doesn’t hold in-person town halls or even attend those in Gettysburg and Altoona to which he was invited this year.
As long as you don’t get to participate in the Democratic process, or see candidates in public parades, you might not know what you’re missing. You might not recognize your power to change things for the better instead of losing your job, your healthcare, your food assistance, your Social Security, or anything else you value that comes from the government.
Or maybe Kelcie is just looking out for our safety.
On September 13th, Mercersburg resident Christina Palesky, her husband, Don Palesky who is running for Mercersburg Borough Council, and their minor child, were threatened with physical violence, all because Christina dared to hold a demonstration on the square of Mercersburg several Saturdays in a row.
Perhaps Kelcie is concerned that the Mercersburg families in attendance can’t be trusted not to:
Hurl insults or curse words at an American candidate.
Throw things at an American candidate.
Yell death threats at an American candidate.
Shoot an American candidate.
And so, when we consider what the Mercersburg Halloween Parade of 2025 is, we realize that it’s not about a small town in America losing its charm, but hiding its evil.
I am Beth Farnham, Fighter for FOOD SECURITY.
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2e15089430b601d5c01b6a938d2b9b0e592f314ce43fa2160886713c669f54ed&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5265&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=fa8f2da09433b488e2c5b84f8d11f5c7&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=c938f2b5bacae99d92c41ea75d3e6750)No one in this country should go hungry.
That Republicans are so unwilling to extend Affordable Care Act subsidies that they have shutdown the government resulting in the denial of Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits to hungry Americans beginning November 1st, speaks to their never-ending cruelty.
Remember, in aid to the neediest Americans, Democrats in Congress acheived the social safety nets of:
Medicare
Medicaid
National School Lunch Act
Unemployment Benefits
Social Security
Affordable Care Act
Food Stamp Act (renamed SNAP in 2008)
I am proud to be a Democrat and fight for the basic rights and services of Everyday Americans such as Universal Healthcare, increased minimum wage, and expanded benefits where needed. I would never have voted to take away food assistance or healthcare as our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, did this year.
While Republicans wallow in cruelty, food pantries will be the last resort for Pennsylvanians about to lose their SNAP benefits. In PA-13, those people number over 110, 000 including children and the elderly. Please give to your local food pantries if you can:

[https://www.axios.com/.../gov-shutdown-snap-payments...](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f5afa2897f970edb325ad9c813e7fa32d9414d8b5f90c06d1f1cd864130ad29c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5265&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=f29e60deb8aba0d61b62cfefc0daff6e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tLy4uLi9nb3Ytc2h1dGRvd24tc25hcC1wYXltZW50cy4uLg=&email_id=c938f2b5bacae99d92c41ea75d3e6750)
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

I would never have voted to take away food assistance or healthcare as our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, did this year. While Republicans wallow in cruelty, food pantries will be the last resort for Pennsylvanians about to lose their SNAP benefits. In PA-13, those people number over 110, 000 including children and the elderly. Please give to your local food pantries if you can: Adams County Franklin County Fulton County Bedford County Cambria County Blair County Huntingdon County Juniata County Mifflin County Perry County Somerset County And many thanks to SCAAP for yesterday's Empty Bowls event to support The Gleaning Project of South Central PA. It was a delightful afternoon of good food and fellowship. Together, we and FOOD SECURITY! If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2025. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real‐time notifications - all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110 |

**\---------- Forwarded message from Gabe Vasquez ----------**
It's Gabe Vasquez.
Over his two terms, Donald Trump has officially overseen more days of government shutdown than any other president in U.S. history.
He can add that to his list of “accomplishments.”
Right now, we’re still stuck in the middle of a shutdown that Republicans created and refuse to end. For weeks, they’ve chosen politics over people — and every day they stall, families here in New Mexico are paying the price.
Federal workers are missing paychecks. SNAP benefits are being delayed. Health care costs are climbing. And Speaker Mike Johnson STILL won’t bring the House back into session to turn the lights back on.
Meanwhile, Donald Trump is busy trying to secure a $230 million payout from taxpayers and bulldozing part of the White House to build himself a $300 million vanity ballroom.
**That tells you everything about their priorities.**
Here in New Mexico, we know what real leadership looks like — it’s showing up, doing the work, and fighting for our communities no matter how tough things get. That’s exactly what I’ll keep doing. But I need you with me.
2026 is our chance to end this chaos once and for all. To start building a government that works for the families of NM-02 — not for billionaires and political insiders.
[My team set a $8,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to keep our campaign strong and to keep pressure on Republicans to do their jobs. Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help us reach our goal and get America — and New Mexico — running again?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118050501/578492483/1791986990?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_102625_EOM2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWMwNGZjOS1iZmIyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mke6Sdtu_6my3M6PhlAo302_oh07zaD_FwpRlhufWxU=)

Over his two terms, Donald Trump has officially overseen more days of government shutdown than any other president in U.S. history. He can add that to his list of “accomplishments.” Right now, we’re still stuck in the middle of a shutdown that Republicans created and refuse to end. For weeks, they’ve chosen politics over people — and every day they stall, families here in New Mexico are paying the price. Federal workers are missing paychecks. SNAP benefits are being delayed. Health care costs are climbing. And Speaker Mike Johnson STILL won’t bring the House back into session to turn the lights back on. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is busy trying to secure a $230 million payout from taxpayers and bulldozing part of the White House to build himself a $300 million vanity ballroom. That tells you everything about their priorities. Here in New Mexico, we know what real leadership looks like — it’s showing up, doing the work, and fighting for our communities no matter how tough things get. That’s exactly what I’ll keep doing. But I need you with me. 2026 is our chance to end this chaos once and for all. To start building a government that works for the families of NM-02 — not for billionaires and political insiders. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . You can also =.

name: Jacob Carrel, AOTL
subject: This case would open the floodgates for gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We have to be ready with the organizing might we need to meet this moment.
|
---

Peter,
Right now, the Supreme Court is deliberating on a case, _Louisiana v. Callais_ , that could upend our democracy — and who holds power in it — for decades to come.
At stake is Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA), which prevents states from diluting the votes of people based on their race. If the Supreme Court decides to weaken the VRA or even strike it down, that would open the floodgates for politicians to slice and dice districts in deeply harmful ways that would deny voters of color the opportunity to elect candidates of their choice.
We know where this kind of map-rigging lands us: less power for voters of color and more consolidation for the party in power. We simply can’t let that happen.
Already, politicians are saying publicly that they’re watching the Supreme Court closely — and getting ready to redraw their maps if the Court decides to gut Section 2. That’s where we come in.
**All On The Line has to be ready with the organizing power we need after this critical ruling comes down. We must be prepared to mobilize voters and organize volunteers in the next stage of this fight, regardless of what happens next.[Help All On The Line continue to fight for fairness and lead the movement to ensure equitable representation — not just in next year’s midterms, but for years to come.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118050592/578492662/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_LAOralArguments_email_20251026-AOTL-Tier1-LAOralArguments_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251026-AOTL-Tier1-LAOralArguments_&utm_campaign=LAOralArguments&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3YTQyYzg0LWJmYjItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3O6VocrKJlt-VnOk5EE4YiO5znZR_pRJrFfeIHRumiM=)**

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
The entire country is watching this race
There are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race:
**This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall.** In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey — making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was.
**I’m showing our nation a new way forward.** My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to -- no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it.
**As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation.** What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism -- and show the nation that there’s a better path forward.
[**All eyes are on New Jersey, and this race is a toss-up. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Chris Pappas today to help me win and chart a better path forward for my state and our country?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251026_2_sherrill.VBVVez&refcode=em20251026-2&t=1&akid=3112%2E582294%2EMi26hA)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251026_2_sherrill.VBVVez&amount=5&refcode=em20251026-2&t=20&akid=3112%2E582294%2EMi26hA)**
Mikie
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251026-2&t=21&refcode2=3112_582294_Mi26hA&akid=3112%2E582294%2EMi26hA)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Senate Democrats’ shutdown is putting America at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
The Senate Democrats’ reckless shutdown has real consequences for hardworking Americans.

| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The Senate Democrats’ reckless shutdown has real consequences for hardworking Americans.While Chuck Schumer and his allies play politics, air traffic controllers are working without pay. Federal law enforcement officers are still showing up for duty without a paycheck. And the team responsible for maintaining America’s nuclear weapons has been _furloughed._ All because Democrats are refusing to support the responsible funding bills passed by the House.Let’s be honest — this isn’t just about a budget disagreement. What we’re seeing is part of a broader political crusade by Senate Democrats who still refuse to accept that Donald Trump is the duly elected President of the United States. They’ve spent years painting him as unfit or illegitimate, and now they’re using the federal budget as their latest battlefield.But the American people decided this question already. The President was chosen in a free election. His Cabinet was confirmed. His policies have passed Congress and been upheld in court. Whether or not Democrats like it, that’s how our democracy works.Instead of respecting that process, they’re risking the livelihoods of millions of Americans to score political points. They’re willing to put national security, public safety, and our economy on the line — all to make a statement against a President they don’t like.When this shutdown ends, the truth will be the same as it was before: our government will reopen, our air traffic controllers and law enforcement officers will finally be paid, our national parks will reopen, and yes — Donald Trump will still be the President of the United States.In the House, my colleagues and I have done our jobs. We’ve passed responsible, conservative funding bills that keep our country safe, protect our borders, and make government accountable to the people — not to partisan politics.I’m standing firm, and I won’t cave to the far-left’s demands. The American people deserve a government that works — not one that shuts down for political theater.Thank you for standing with me,
Michael Baumgartner
---

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: EXCITING DC TRIP -- AND MY VIRAL VIDEO ON ZOHRAN MAMDANI
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/exciting-dc-trip-and-my-viral-video-on-zohran-mamdani?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# EXCITING DC TRIP -- AND MY VIRAL VIDEO ON ZOHRAN MAMDANI

EXCITING DC TRIP I had a most exciting DC trip last week! I visited staff at the White House Executive Office Building, followed by a very special visit with US Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy. You may recall that Secretary Kennedy endorsed me in my New Hampshire 2nd District Congressional campaign last year, just two days before the election. Last week I finally got a chance to thank him in person. He is very genuine. From an impoverished little girl who survived Mao’s brutal regime to a Congressional candidate visiting the White House, I am humbled. I am truly blessed to be an American living in the Granite State!

After my White House visit, I headed to the US Capitol, where I made this video to call out Democrats who shut down our government and have refused to pay essential Federal employees: _[https://youtube.com/shorts/n4OofACDuwc?si=-ZHi1jNEM9ydmdkO](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=d1e576a6c9&e=c338950e03)_
GOING VIRAL ON X My recent video on the Communist candidate for NYC Mayor, Zohran Mamdani, now has over 500,000 views! Please view and share the video: [https://x.com/i/status/1982134272925241357](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=b8b6056381&e=c338950e03)
All my supporters know me as a passionate defender of American values and the US Constitution. Could you please join us in contributing to my Congressional campaign in New Hampshire? Thank you to those who have already contributed \-- I am asking for your continued support, please! We ended the last quarter with $420,000 in donations-- most of those from my home state of New Hampshire. I am truly a grassroots candidate supported by the people. Contrast that against my opponent, Rep. Maggie Goodlander, who has $1.2 million cash on hand - mostly from large and powerful donors _outside_ of New Hampshire. They want to reach in from the outside to continue Democrat control of this seat in Congress and advance their national agenda. Thank you so much for your support at this important time!

Donate Here: [https://www.lilytangwilliams.com/congress/donate/](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=794cbd541b&e=c338950e03) You can also mail a check to: Lily4Congress Committee
PO Box 406
Weare, NH 03281 God Bless You! PS: We just added a Bitcoin donor link on my website as well!

GOTV PAC is helping Democrats turn out every last vote with our winning text and phone bank operation but we need your help to keep it going.

name: Abigail
subject: I'm asking one last time this weekend:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send.

Hi Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger. I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
_This is a crucial moment for our campaign._
Donald Trump has endorsed my opponent, and how much money we raise in response matters a lot. But it's about more than that. _It's about the message we send._
We have momentum on our side right now. But we can't take anything for granted with less than a week left in early voting.
If our fundraising numbers remain strong, we'll be able to continue turning out voters and laying the groundwork to flip Virginia blue. If we fall short, it gives Winsome Earle-Sears and National Republicans an opening to bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth.
**That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big.**
[__**So, I'm asking one last time this weekend: Will you contribute your first $25 to our campaign before midnight?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118051145/578494356/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-26_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcyMzE3YjEtYzNiMi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wh5Iu8WeGy_1W3dXvc-BWon7BvNAW69K3ZRns3Jdm2U=)

clean_body: How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send. Hi Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger. I wanted you to hear this from me personally: This is a crucial moment for our campaign. Donald Trump has endorsed my opponent, and how much money we raise in response matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send. We have momentum on our side right now. But we can't take anything for granted with less than a week left in early voting. If our fundraising numbers remain strong, we'll be able to continue turning out voters and laying the groundwork to flip Virginia blue. If we fall short, it gives Winsome Earle-Sears and National Republicans an opening to bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth. That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big. = = Thank you, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I never planned this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I need you with me, Derek
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_brown2025.ia1R96&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251026_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=9118%2E5257348%2E76WLJ1)
Derek, this is Sherrod Brown.
I never planned on running for office again.
But I see what’s happening in Washington – and I can’t stay on the sidelines.
**I’m jumping in this fight: I’m running for Senate in 2026.**
_Why?_ Because Ohioans are working harder than ever, and they’re still falling behind.
_Why?_ Because wages are flat.
_Why?_ Because costs are rising.
_Why?_ Because the people in power are only looking out for their rich friends and corporate interests.
No one is fighting for Ohio workers and families in the Senate. But with your support, we can change that.
We can build a country where workers share in the wealth they create, where hard work pays off, and where everyone who works hard can afford a decent life.
This won’t be easy – and with Ohio being one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, we know there are many fights ahead. But if we stand together, we will win.
[I need you with me, Derek: Will you chip in $10 split with Adam Schiff right now to help me flip Ohio’s Senate seat and stand up for workers across the country?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5516?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251026_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9118%2E5257348%2E76WLJ1)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Here’s the deal, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
In a race this close and with the stakes this high, we need to have the resources to be able to fight back, and we can only do that with your support.
#
Hey, I know my team and I have been emailing you a lot recently asking for your support. But I wanted to take a second to explain why your support matters in this crucial race.
Not only is my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, endorsed by Donald Trump – he’s also a faithful advocate for the most disastrous elements of Trump’s agenda, and wants to implement them here in New Jersey. He was one of the _biggest cheerleaders_ for the Republican price hike bill that will throw hundreds of thousands of New Jerseyans off their health care.
And now, Ciattarelli’s being supported by a MAGA super PAC that’s pouring _millions of dollars_ into negative ads that make one false assertion after another about my record and my character.
**[In a race this close and with the stakes this high, we need to have the resources to be able to fight back, and we can only do that with your support. Can you split $10 (or whatever you can) between my campaign and State Democrats Committee so we can stop our opponent and protect New Jersey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96865?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96866?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96866?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96866?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96866?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96866?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96866?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96865?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan)
---
But this race isn’t about what we’re fighting against — it’s about what we’re fighting _for._
**My vision for our state is simple: Make life better for New Jerseyans.** I’ll fight to bring health care, housing, child care, and energy costs down, tackle crime and keep our communities safe, and defend our constitutional freedoms from the right-wing extremists who are taking our nation down a destructive path.
Here’s the deal — we’re in an extremely competitive race, but lots of voters still haven’t made up their minds. **[Your support helps us spread our message across New Jersey, so we can build the coalition we need to win this race. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee — it’ll make a critical difference in helping us protect New Jersey.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96865?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96865?refcode=em20251026-9631&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9631%2E614464%2EUSvMan)**
Thank you,
Mikie

clean_body: In a race this close and with the stakes this high, we need to have the resources to be able to fight back, and we can only do that with your support. Hey, I know my team and I have been emailing you a lot recently asking for your support. But I wanted to take a second to explain why your support matters in this crucial race. Not only is my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, endorsed by Donald Trump – he’s also a faithful advocate for the most disastrous elements of Trump’s agenda, and wants to implement them here in New Jersey. He was one of the biggest cheerleaders for the Republican price hike bill that will throw hundreds of thousands of New Jerseyans off their health care. And now, Ciattarelli’s being supported by a MAGA super PAC that’s pouring millions of dollars into negative ads that make one false assertion after another about my record and my character. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: But this race isn’t about what we’re fighting against — it’s about what we’re fighting for. My vision for our state is simple: Make life better for New Jerseyans. I’ll fight to bring health care, housing, child care, and energy costs down, tackle crime and keep our communities safe, and defend our constitutional freedoms from the right-wing extremists who are taking our nation down a destructive path. Here’s the deal — we’re in an extremely competitive race, but lots of voters still haven’t made up their minds. Thank you, Mikie Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com).
